name: Team Barletta
subject: Team Barletta Campaign Update
body: | | | | Updates from the trail --- --- Peter Willis, We're back with another campaign update from Lou's time on the trail. Lou has been going nonstop the last week. _**In the last 6 days alone Lou has driven 1,352 miles across PA and hit 7 different counties along the way: Dauphin, Blair, Adams, Schuylkill, Northampton, Bradford, and Mifflin.**_**** The enthusiasm on the ground has been unbelievable. Folks are fired up and energized and the grassroots momentum continues build. We're working nonstop to win this race and we don't plan on slowing down anytime soon. Stay tuned because we're just getting started. --- _**LOU IN THE NEWS**_ **The Center Square:**[_Poll shows Pennsylvania GOP voters prefer Barletta in governor primary_](https://u21878114.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=QtzNBLELhLe7xI3pbs-2B5EmV993O10AxjwKpULM6N5wOyh0HVv7UAiaS6-2BqrZhndxIp0CrVkGf-2FhGDsRar7N3DU16EKEyk-2B1O6pmdiPCU3Yx-2FlXsLRIyfoPkLTRY1QNW8n3PwmK1-2FNikyP96Fe-2FCrieLeFxy5E7G-2BPbENzzAh4UGHNks4Zh-2BGYXd9M4g6nHghfak82jlhuoJ0yt-2FKiEBccHSAR8bK3YOUz86BXqpkJzs-3DBURx_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz67y4PYNOyKps15SZhuv-2BbM3r9crquzKpBzLF6Hsl-2BatqhygFKpU7sgSyFHdtr6jCE2LwjAL0OwlE-2BQQvbQsDeyvD3p-2Bnw1GSD2iVeGB4FB1XOWuMTJrkbSkJe66fIdaQMTGBE-2B0uInGKhjZlrwGqCJ37wNAaB1Htr6oLc5-2FPEs5ZkjkOMuAmnO5AsJscLOIB5mwnfQVoQ4bVIFpmMgd1VE-2FEiVA-2Bo0ujvujqaSG6IDE44Xaff9mtlD5IPXTRCP-2FFrhJB-2BU-2BF-2FRf7-2FwrPvUIRhvgUjoCum4j9OFO-2B7WR-2FS7oM84nxDhofcU8jZC7N8X2SZJsQLEk31k9LwcMIj43mDT-2F8iSKbFJYTgzpA-2F6chVznxDUOQ-2B3EsARFv9z1UclWU-2FvCJ42DSj8kjJpy2GCUnEzYOO5e2AtjLUwmQB9rq-2Br0D-2BWVAcaTlKotjcdXgrq3-2F-2B7UxCFiMu0DIi8aX0yhnA-2BPaJTS5DRQ3HIAAJ3ExbbJ0fL35yuKEV2mnJk-2FzzCRGe1zuG7qXhdlYlDVtjwb26y1zDoq8MfBdXMIJjKipD2rI6bvNC7tF3BqsZe9mT41fZrQbRb328NUpDIlZaY39ytepnLEH1tqYNhe9y15Bn0zbH6RA3npLdDLgM6uIHxn6UM0ZjHHbUHEuGqEqd9QfGU8CrYZxIStUZW1-2BVYCfkFUYyBntnLl8mPpj4f7YdcvesiLZT7JwpRaYj3UZOncALaV6kY06xOLV6gKiSfaLF-2FQvI9ck-2BQ-2B73R1fPrisEprSitlMlWyPjYhrCOBdLMj-2Bl4peg5D5qGWJtXLCysy2MA75os5ag-2Bgrwzx8WU5sT0ORJRfoNWjcaHe-2FlyMuUiXUyQQ-3D-3D) --- _**HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE TRAIL**_ --- --- --- --- --- **Coal Region for Lou! Grassroots at it's best: Bar Tour in Frackville and Orwigsburg, American Legion in Quakake, and ended the day with some Italian food at La Dolce Casa in Tamaqua!** --- --- --- --- **Running for statewide office is no easy task - it requires a lot of time on the road away from your family. clean_body: | | | | Updates from the trail Peter Willis, We're back with another campaign update from Lou's time on the trail. Lou has been going nonstop the last week. In the last 6 days alone Lou has driven 1,352 miles across PA and hit 7 different counties along the way: Dauphin, Blair, Adams, Schuylkill, Northampton, Bradford, and Mifflin.** The enthusiasm on the ground has been unbelievable. Folks are fired up and energized and the grassroots momentum continues build. We're working nonstop to win this race and we don't plan on slowing down anytime soon. Stay tuned because we're just getting started. LOU IN THE NEWS The Center Square: City & State: " " WYOU-TV (Scranton): " " Washington Examiner: " " Gettysburg Times: Town Hall: " Morning News") HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE TRAIL Coal Region for Lou! Grassroots at it's best: Bar Tour in Frackville and Orwigsburg, American Legion in Quakake, and ended the day with some Italian food at La Dolce Casa in Tamaqua! Running for statewide office is no easy task - it requires a lot of time on the road away from your family. Lou was able to sneak away for a few hours and take some of the grandkids to Cabela's to get some new fishing poles. Lou and Mary Grace had a blast at the Blair Co. Lincoln Day Dinner in Altoona! Packed house with lots of grassroots energy! Lou brought the house down at the Northampton Lincoln Day Breakfast in Bethlehem! Great day in Gettysburg! Thanks to the Adams Co. Council of Republican Women for putting together an amazing Lincoln Day Dinner. Bradford County Lincoln Day Dinner was a big success! Lewistown Main Street Tour with Mayor Deb Bargo. Mifflin County is Barletta Country! HELP LOU RESTORE COMMON SENSE TO THE COMMONWEALTH Chip in $25, $50, or $100 TODAY to help Lou win!** SHOW YOUR SUPPORT & CHECK OUT LOU'S ONLINE CAMPAIGN STORE! For Liberty, Team Barletta | | | | ==

name: Mike Durant
subject: I couldn't be more honored.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE

Thank you, Lieutenant General Michael T. Flynn

Friend,

Lieutenant General Michael T. Flynn just recently endorsed our campaign to stop career politicians and Joe Biden from ruining our great nation, and I couldn’t be happier to accept.

General Flynn knows that career politicians aren’t getting the job done for Alabamians or Americans, and that’s why he’s endorsed our campaign. **He knows that I’m not going to sit by and let the Socialist Left dictate our country’s future.** I will always protect our 2A rights, our borders, and the sanctity of life.
[ ](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=3caf650c60c84ee08a450edc43c6f94b&_e=KdiWjEIfxKwGooYdF1LHWLe2GFDJgXfy5WbQ_S3vrtSP3xX1C4mClTKexc-gdRNVDDO92xzxLfJS3GQWCAvzbtwGnpHI-m6bwrTUs3GLZTzyQvEIqcWg3XmFS0QuqGfbIP0mxKd36w_e_eqXRFbTcnbmuf3YwGorbljaNduKUmge2CF4WOJbo5JWsVCDsaZjtsbtggDw79f7rO8RLsVB7jaPOJ-nJTipirbWDL2diDUJwaPoecb7f62CA03uge0vWaitVd3Uzuqhf8IrQfkLW-X0wxNOp9H9T01xqZMkC1kL7BWIgvhVpwfn-dCyBjvA_kESYH6TzmmQJRuqIoxg7XyINpwapjeBXkyu3IV4aVRo-QlwXMFpYbwcphYsg6hZ2ngomUYVin-uJ_Wkao6kbCC8zNYypBNHUecp-d4-Xv5wyLVC3VLK8Ow0Z628ZD-RksRzfMrPQ8M2SppfVcmNwJVuyiNjboA0Tcjj8ytbpAjVQPBNVLsqg3KSlJsCPS1sxwyvm99n6xoR-J5rullljks2bFLsJpiymvBy31H0QAtg4CZ63snuAGM8zRUGOQGO)

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2397%2E3611125%2EDC2fL1 ][IMG]

Folks, we have good news and bad news.

The good news: Polling shows we have a clear path to winning this seat,
flipping Ohio blue, and expanding our Democratic Senate majority. But it
ONLY works if we have the resources to launch TV ads as early as possible
(and keep them up).

The bad news: TV is the most expensive item in a campaign’s budget, and we
just don’t have the money to get ads up right now.

There’s no way to sugarcoat this, folks—if we don’t get our ads
on the airwaves ASAP, we will lose this race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7989?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2397%2E3611125%2EDC2fL1 ]The only way we can close this budget gap is with the help of thousands
of grassroots supporters like you. Will you rush in a donation of
$25 to give
this campaign its best shot at victory?

We’re counting on you to make it happen.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Purging Us From the Party?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Corruption and cheating is being exposed right now in the Party of "election integrity." And it appears the victims are you and me. **Last week, the Dr Neil Shah for Governor campaign sent out a[press release](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rBhB1H0Y-0KAXn8Uxy6DRlbeS_ey0R5yLd62eka5dH6Yxig9N17eM6Q2xbSkFei3MgMO200JSIihZPQydIz0uy0&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=2) about widespread delegate data anomalies. In some cases, Shah delegates were removed from the records despite being duly elected on caucus night.** Soon after, the Mike Murphy and Kendall Qualls campaigns joined the call for transparency with the MNGOP. Then the Party's staff member in charge of gathering the data "resigned" from the Party. Even worse, at some county level Republican Party units, outright cheating occurred. We know this because **A LOT** of Action 4 Liberty people became delegates in Morrison County. If you haven't seen it yet, we just published a story on the [**Corruption of the Morrison County GOP**](https://www.action4liberty.com/corruption_in_morrison_county_gop?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=3). Give it a read! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/corruption_in_morrison_county_gop?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=4) In one precinct, delegates were removed and a legislator's wife was added. In another precinct, 10 delegates were wiped off of the delegate list, and six people who weren't at caucus were added.
# [==> READ THE STORY](https://www.action4liberty.com/corruption_in_morrison_county_gop?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=5)
The only way for us to ensure a **fair and free political process** is to EXPOSE the corruption and cheating when we see it. It's disgusting to see the Political Class try to cheat good, honest patriots. They are trying to silence our voice - but it won't work. Don't forget, Alpha News [published leaked audio](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkOuIpo2Wq1y8Qyr6RY3RG-rX3TfPkPsyJBTRf5l1GzWnmPcDSupWsHRuM60dFQUIDz0HFq6u0if5PI0o4lwgM_1E4x6_jLQKUFwDbWTaCqQyToS0BHn7KjSpaDIAzM1Dgg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=6) of a secret meeting last July where Former MNGOP Chair Jennifer Carnahan and State Rep Keith Franke discussed "**purging** " Action 4 Liberty supporters from the Party. To defeat the COVID Tyrants and their quest for more power and control over our lives, we MUST organize a powerful resistance. **We aren't afraid to expose corruption and fraud inside the ranks of the Political Parties. That's the only way for us to take back our country and our state.** Thankfully Dr Neil Shah is aligned on this same mission. We learned a lot from his recent Facebook Live event with patriots like Anna Spore (aka No Jab Nurse), Carmelle Eickhoff, Nathan Wesenberg & Cassie Fredregill. He was even joined by a Secretary of State candidate, Kelly Jahner-Byrne. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6rdu3t7F11lVK5qeu9KzziWV0lEQtXX6-kwwbKH5-CZQZRsQmniKdZHw9wtCv_RfTA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=7) The best way to uncover the fraud and cheating is by listening to you. If you feel you've been targeted by the Political Class, and your voice is being silenced or your delegate status has been taken away, we want to hear from you ASAP.
## **Please email us at[delegate@action4liberty.com](mailto:delegate@action4liberty.com)**.
This is critically important because there are top notch legislative candidates who are running for office - we need to ensure a fair process for them. If you want fair and free elections, and I know you do, the cheating by the Political Class must be exposed - then ended. **Action 4 Liberty's mission is to protect liberty for the next generation. That responsibility starts with a fair and free political process. Want to help grow Action 4 Liberty's mission?[Support us today](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=8)!** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=purging_us_from_the_party&n=11), software for leaders.

In some cases, Shah delegates were removed from the records despite being duly elected on caucus night. Soon after, the Mike Murphy and Kendall Qualls campaigns joined the call for transparency with the MNGOP. Then the Party's staff member in charge of gathering the data "resigned" from the Party. Even worse, at some county level Republican Party units, outright cheating occurred. We know this because A LOT of Action 4 Liberty people became delegates in Morrison County. If you haven't seen it yet, we just published a story on the . Give it a read! In one precinct, delegates were removed and a legislator's wife was added. In another precinct, 10 delegates were wiped off of the delegate list, and six people who weren't at caucus were added. The only way for us to ensure a fair and free political process is to EXPOSE the corruption and cheating when we see it. It's disgusting to see the Political Class try to cheat good, honest patriots. They are trying to silence our voice - but it won't work. Don't forget, Alpha News of a secret meeting last July where Former MNGOP Chair Jennifer Carnahan and State Rep Keith Franke discussed "purging " Action 4 Liberty supporters from the Party. To defeat the COVID Tyrants and their quest for more power and control over our lives, we MUST organize a powerful resistance. We aren't afraid to expose corruption and fraud inside the ranks of the Political Parties. That's the only way for us to take back our country and our state. Thankfully Dr Neil Shah is aligned on this same mission. We learned a lot from his recent Facebook Live event with patriots like Anna Spore (aka No Jab Nurse), Carmelle Eickhoff, Nathan Wesenberg & Cassie Fredregill. He was even joined by a Secretary of State candidate, Kelly Jahner-Byrne. The best way to uncover the fraud and cheating is by listening to you. If you feel you've been targeted by the Political Class, and your voice is being silenced or your delegate status has been taken away, we want to hear from you ASAP. Please email us atmailto:delegate@action4liberty.com. This is critically important because there are top notch legislative candidates who are running for office - we need to ensure a fair process for them. If you want fair and free elections, and I know you do, the cheating by the Political Class must be exposed - then ended. Action 4 Liberty's mission is to protect liberty for the next generation. That responsibility starts with a fair and free political process. Want to help grow Action 4 Liberty's mission?! ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Fetterman for PA
subject: Protecting the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
All eyes will be on the Keystone State this November.
#
Derek,
We want to share something our team thinks about every day 👇
**This Senate seat is gonna be a real toss-up, so saving our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority could all come down to Pennsylvania.** All eyes will be on the Keystone State this November.
Don’t just take our word for it. **CNN has consistently rated Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Democratic state in the country.** We all remember what happened when Pennsylvania flipped the other way in 2016. That’s why building support for the long road ahead is so critical right now.
**[Derek, if we’re going to defend + expand our Democratic Senate majority, we need your help so John can win the primary in May, and then go on to win the general election in November. Please, chip in what you can afford today to help support this campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44852?refcode=ema20220221-4677&t=1&akid=4677%2E434096%2E3nAwrT)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44852?refcode=ema20220221-4677&t=2&akid=4677%2E434096%2E3nAwrT)
Right now, there are a couple Democratic Senators who have single handedly held up urgent legislation over the past year and a half.
Derek, when we send John to the Senate this November, not only are we nearly guaranteed to maintain our Democratic majority, but we will also add one more Democrat to our side.
This would make John the 51st Democratic YES vote on urgent changes, like passing vital voting rights legislation + abolishing the filibuster.
**We can’t risk losing our Senate majority or that 51st seat, Derek.** There is simply too much on the line.
**According to the data we’ve seen so far, voters overwhelmingly see our campaign as the *only* campaign that can flip this seat + beat a Republican in the general election.** That’s the kind of momentum we’ve gotta keep up during this early period.
That’s why we need all hands on deck to help John win the May primary election, so we can make sure the strongest possible candidate takes on the GOP in November.
**[Can you please make a donation of $5 or more today to help us send John to the Senate and pass urgently needed Democratic legislation? Your support will all but guarantee we maintain + expand our Democratic majority in the Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44852?refcode=ema20220221-4677&t=3&akid=4677%2E434096%2E3nAwrT)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44852?refcode=em20220221-4677&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4677%2E434096%2E3nAwrT)**
__
Thanks for your support, Derek. We wouldn’t be able to do this without online supporters like you.
—Fetterman for PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220221-4677-footer&t=23&refcode2=4677_434096_3nAwrT&akid=4677%2E434096%2E3nAwrT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4677%2E434096%2E3nAwrT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4677%2E434096%2E3nAwrT)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| | **Around Wyoming **
---
As part of our weekly travels, we made a brief visit to the truck stop where Harriet lived in a 5th-wheel camper while working with a paving crew for a summer job in college. Can you guess where it is? Hint: It is located along I-80 between Laramie and Rawlins.

**In The News **
Harriet made major news this week with the endorsement of both Leader McCarthy and Chairwoman Stefanik. Harriet had the opportunity to speak with both at length about ways to work together in Washington, D.C. to better the lives of those in Wyoming who are working to put food on their table and to raise their families. clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” This was a big week for Team Hageman with major endorsements from Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy and Chairwoman Elise Stefanik! Harriet will be speaking at CPAC this week, so please follow us on and for the most up to date information on how to watch! For Wyoming, Team Hageman | | Around Wyoming As part of our weekly travels, we made a brief visit to the truck stop where Harriet lived in a 5th-wheel camper while working with a paving crew for a summer job in college. Can you guess where it is? Hint: It is located along I-80 between Laramie and Rawlins. Harriet also made it to a community dinner and barn dance in Wheatland! Over 300 people gathered in fellowship and fun. | In The News Harriet made major news this week with the endorsement of both Leader McCarthy and Chairwoman Stefanik. Harriet had the opportunity to speak with both at length about ways to work together in Washington, D.C. to better the lives of those in Wyoming who are working to put food on their table and to raise their families. President Trump also made a statement on the significance of these great endorsements! | | | |

name: Morgan Harper's iPhone
subject: Can you believe it?
disclaimer_text:
paid for by
corporate special interests — anywhere near the U
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220221-697-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=697%2E90090%2E2Tf7Zq ]Morgan Harper

I just got off the debate
stage and debate round 2 with Josh Mandel is officially over! 👏

The difference between me and Josh Mandel couldn't be clearer. I want to
hold corporations accountable and put power back in the hands of working
people — Mandel only cares about earning Trump’s favor and spreading hate
and lies online.

The truth
is Josh Mandel is leading the GOP field for this Senate seat, and that
alone should worry us. We can’t afford to have him — or any of the other
career politicians in this race who’ve been bought and paid for by
corporate special interests — anywhere near the U.S. Senate.

I’m proud to stand with a grassroots movement. [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/26201?t=1003&akid=697%2E90090%2E2Tf7Zq ]Will you chip in
whatever you can now to power our movement?

I’ve been willing to debate anyone, any time, anywhere. I can’t say the
same for my establishment-backed opponent, Tim Ryan, who still hasn’t
debated me.

I need your help to fuel our movement so we have the resources we need to
face our Republican opponents AND the establishment.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/26201?t=1004&akid=697%2E90090%2E2Tf7Zq ]Right now we’re quickly approaching the end of February and we’re
$4,771 away from our end-of-month fundraising goal. Can you donate
$5 or anything you can to help empower our movement?

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/26207?refcode=em20220221-697&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=697%2E90090%2E2Tf7Zq ]Contribute $5

— Morgan

Sent from my iPhone

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1024&akid=697%2E90090%2E2Tf7Zq

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for America
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2evjr4g2ka635nir2b0aju4hf1nb7c3bpeggogg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6ohmeapmccrhm9h79d9kmhgj9cbnmmpr1p3466p76odh61q68o5kejgb2crkm1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9ddk6upbephh6apm9ptgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zolo7a4cbu5tmt8nai0qqcje9ned0kko92tghu90_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties – _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjeni5r9fveb3rp2qtacjd4i179c1m3sk6okelvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7cv00tlij3lqep6u40ll4vfit9669v4u0m47qf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47qmbdvlc408mtfk013bviqik8tr92306tj9s40_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeabc0uildbtod9mnngnan1ibbitatvqkf329vso_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.” _Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate – and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj1gov664dnff8lj8hnj15mnaf9t3cvle56bkk3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z09bb9genc807m94lhot5btf866tf7t8kt24mbf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57itnhhgm2e344dg2l2v5uhqjafcito7n6uq5gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left. We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes—out of school—during the pandemic. We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ocbe5h4tn4bpfv4eng0l1qdesjujepnqd2pc78_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation – and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4tk4e076se8927ub1oq18j2tf0a1avcram7nf70_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhhtg41p67u0dv4v0e36uo3s1nut47agbj0a1je8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpm6m4hob6l351ero53b2loaeimsaeljf86ausbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmg9ehn38t0tcgrran6esoa3lq55k0vn47ub7e5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0ikgao7u5nv00o5pj43juilhb8he3m048chruo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmqm14kbt719l8dejq6vnnhmmp91m9mf10d0gl2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cjh2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: It’s been a tough week…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’ll be honest - last week was a tough week... I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Now, with th
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zka27j3k7ipeo29r69rf162s4c3ath25gael20o8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8pr5cli76p1n65rjcd1j6crjdcj1chojadpn69ob1pr4s2pm8ttim5j64cpjm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmccdgmdijfcjjcoo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgmapb2cthmcpj24no)
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl9qf21j09bl884r65e99ga8j2f82tko523983oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cph2bs)
---
| Friend,

I’ll be honest - last week was a tough week...

**I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. **Now, with the six month anniversary of Joe Biden abandoning our allies and betraying the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace, it’s easy to get disheartened...

**I’ve been fighting on my two metal legs to get accountability.** But some days it feels like nobody is fighting beside me. It can feel that way because after 6 months, Biden still hasn’t been forced to resign, impeached or even acknowledged responsibility at all.

Not to mention the fact that Democrats in Congress are giving him the green light to SHRED the evidence we need to hold him accountable.

**That’s why I’m reaching out.** I need backup, and I’m hoping you’ll fight beside me. Can I count on you?
---
| [HELP ME FIGHT TO STOP BIDEN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zae10vfgfela8sqnd610drlmhasae3idl32lihh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cph2bs "HELP ME FIGHT TO STOP BIDEN")
---
| If you’ll indulge a slightly longer email, please let me explain why this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster for me...

**On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target.** As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs.

**That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it.** I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn’t sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren’t.

**Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan.** The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones—I made it home.

**6 months ago Joe Biden sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death.** He got Americans killed and abandoned others behind enemy lines. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind.

[**As a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words “commander” or “chief” anywhere in his title. If you agree, please help me defeat him and stop his disastrous America Last agenda.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlhf84gg40vvuir31pfa6ftojotji02vd2vd12e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cph2bs)

**Another lesson I learned in the Army is that nobody can do it alone: we need our whole team to work together, especially when there are life or death consequences on the line.** That’s why I’m determined to stay in the fight for freedom now. Even if my injury cut short my time on the battlefield in Afghanistan, I am going to keep fighting to protect my fellow soldiers and our allies.

**To do that, we must come together to defeat Joe Biden, elect more conservative veterans to Congress and restore the America First agenda that President Trump championed.**

[**So, I’m asking: just like I relied on my fellow soldiers in Afghanistan to save my life, I need to rely on you now. Can I count on you to help?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs5eog6fqk2b1uaeqfnugp2i4d3e882mkki4qtmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clh6eor6cph2bs)

clean_body: I’ll be honest - last week was a tough week... I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Now, with th |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | | Friend, I’ll be honest - last week was a tough week... I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Now, with the six month anniversary of Joe Biden abandoning our allies and betraying the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace, it’s easy to get disheartened... I’ve been fighting on my two metal legs to get accountability. But some days it feels like nobody is fighting beside me. It can feel that way because after 6 months, Biden still hasn’t been forced to resign, impeached or even acknowledged responsibility at all. Not to mention the fact that Democrats in Congress are giving him the green light to SHRED the evidence we need to hold him accountable. That’s why I’m reaching out. I need backup, and I’m hoping you’ll fight beside me. Can I count on you? | "HELP ME FIGHT TO STOP BIDEN" | If you’ll indulge a slightly longer email, please let me explain why this is a particularly heart-wrenching disaster for me... On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. That was the night I discovered the last explosive device I ever found by stepping on it. I remember every moment of the explosion, down to my teeth rattling so hard I wasn’t sure that they were still in my mouth. The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren’t. Every day since when I wake up I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones—I made it home. 6 months ago Joe Biden sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He got Americans killed and abandoned others behind enemy lines. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. Another lesson I learned in the Army is that nobody can do it alone: we need our whole team to work together, especially when there are life or death consequences on the line. That’s why I’m determined to stay in the fight for freedom now. Even if my injury cut short my time on the battlefield in Afghanistan, I am going to keep fighting to protect my fellow soldiers and our allies. To do that, we must come together to defeat Joe Biden, elect more conservative veterans to Congress and restore the America First agenda that President Trump championed. | "HELP DEFEND AMERICA!" | | Thank you in advance for your support. I need it more than you could possibly know. | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS | | Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9593%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=vygap0f%2b6VfXXvNfhjGDuA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skzlNbARUjEWqumw8eEXLA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14843%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JFgXCz5Ke6mkf7RU7HIenw&sysid=1)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skzlNbARUjEWqumw8eEXLA&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skzlNbARUjEWqumw8eEXLA&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skzlNbARUjEWqumw8eEXLA&sysid=1) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.” _Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skzlNbARUjEWqumw8eEXLA&sysid=1) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skzlNbARUjEWqumw8eEXLA&sysid=1) That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14844%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lLLLLSZjUzcPaAPhGkUpBA&sysid=1) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left. We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14955%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AMaoCvgX0%2b7zcjhPF3J1QQ&sysid=1) I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14956%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iUCmlGGMz%2b%2bAEZGRR%2bsLNQ&sysid=1) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14957%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Utfe2QX1dE4ASYwsyp%2fEMA&sysid=1) [**DONATE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14958%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pkMzYSspUenqNt40KwtbfQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14842%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skzlNbARUjEWqumw8eEXLA&sysid=1) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14959%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p29BrTgYTw1l%2fc3H5QxvPg&sysid=1) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14950%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=twxaydfslzXIxyqZKlXXCQ&sysid=1) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9593%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=vygap0f%2b6VfXXvNfhjGDuA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9593%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=vygap0f%2b6VfXXvNfhjGDuA&sysid=1)

name: Great America Update
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6717%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=D5110xUtaKO1uChFhvJW%2bw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69177%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qwccLf4cLBRTxOpT8X%2b75Q&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69178%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EClqeyMTalNz9LtntNFMHA&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69179%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bKOdfEzCn90LEdb9Gomg9w&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69170%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UjOb8%2bEgGD3WFR3A3zyBHg&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69179%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bKOdfEzCn90LEdb9Gomg9w&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69171%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S9tGbG1YclNymvXDGtPOyA&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: The Shortest Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvftqorlb04aqs5eh3qfgg215oasf5607b3uvo58_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clj68oj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shic9hm0p76m5hrdcpl68oj9d5lecr68s5h62qmatjjelim2chk6dp32p9nmgrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5lmgo75cb66jgb6p77m2qmash5u)
We Have Our Work Cut Out for Us

| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo05vjt52apa4b2o8jjnp89quljeonkr595btt5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clj68oj2cjh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5h58vohfd10024b2eh7drkjk778vgpt48bnlv9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clj68oj2cjh2bs)
---

Folks,

I won’t lie.

**That countdown is making me as nervous as a turkey on Thanksgiving.**
With February being so short, I realized I have a lot less time to reach my goals. We still have a long way to go so my team gave me the green light to offer MATCHED donations now through midnight.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m in trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It's worse than I thought.

| [](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59687936:sZO40fHN8:m:1:1155937413:7F7D4A2D4262C5813AE5C26A13C0C4A9:r)
---

Friend,

It's not the easiest thing to admit, but I'm getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It's not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I'll be blunt: If I don't catch up to him and catch up quick, he's going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won't have it, and I hope you won't either, but I'm coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can't do this by myself.

I've got to have your help if I'm going to have a chance. I've got to have your help if we're going to save America. It's not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi's handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I'm humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they'll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I'M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN'T STOP THE LEFT. **

---

Friends,

Team Kennedy made a mistake.

We set goals each month to help the Senator and his re-election campaign and the numbers did not add up the way we thought they would. **So, unfortunately, we missed our last deadline.**

**_The reason? Because our opponent is raising money hand over fist and relentlessly attacking Sen. Kennedy, constantly._** We work so hard to make sure it won’t happen again and are so grateful for each and every one of the generous donations we receive. Nevertheless, we have to meet our goals.

We put together a list of Senator Kennedy’s most supportive donors and you were on it. We hate to ask for anything above all the generosity you have shown, **[but even $15 will help us so much.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrla74bdee2c3mn011eropv1kmra0cvim0qm9dfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clj61ob4sjh2bs)**

We do not have much time. If you are able to donate anything, clicking the button below will take you to a secure page to do so.
| [**Help Out Senator Kennedy**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpdq2ovlsvhvnud37o6m7on4snsa9uue3s36089o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clj61ob4sjh2bs)
---

We would not ask if it was not so important.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

Olivia, Team Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
---

Baton Rouge, LA 70808

Folks,

I won’t lie.

**That countdown is making me as nervous as a turkey on Thanksgiving.**
With February being so short, I realized I have a lot less time to reach my goals. We still have a long way to go so my team gave me the green light to offer MATCHED donations now through midnight.

Thankfully, I have some incredible donors out there that will double your impact on my re-election campaign. We only get 28 days in the month of love, so we have to make the most of them.

Are you with me?
[**YOUR $25 = $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5vinmrjn0nvfk6108bihoi41256fvs70473dsa8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clj61ob0s1h2bs)

subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D]
Hi team, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a $20 contribution to DASS, but first, let me explain what’s at stake. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D]
Last month, our GOP counterparts in the RSLC announced a record-breaking fundraising haul of over $33 MILLION. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D]
They’re going to use those funds to prop up radical anti-democratic extremists like Kristina Karamo, Mark Finchem, and now in Colorado, Tina Peters.
While the RSLC is raking in huge checks from dark money, big corporations, and extremist activist groups, DASS doesn’t have that kind of backing.
Instead, we have something better – the backing of thousands of grassroots Democrats across the country like you, friend. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D]
So while it might seem like a small contribution won’t do much against the vast sums the RSLC is raking in from hedge funds, when regular people committed to protecting our democracy chip in $10 or $20 at a time, we’re building a grassroots movement far more powerful than one propped up by blank checks.
We’ve got a critical February end-of-month goal coming up in under a week, and we’re only $13,000 from our $70,000 goal. We have to hit this goal – and every goal after it – if we want to stand up to the RSLC and protect our democracy this November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D]
So, now that you know the stakes and what we’re up against, I’m personally asking. Will you rush $20 ASAP to help us hit our end-of-month goal and elect Democratic Secretaries across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D]

RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D]

ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?refcode=EM_FR_022222_B1_AC_30D&amount=100]
Grateful for your support,
Jena Griswold

While the RSLC is raking in huge checks from dark money, big corporations, and extremist activist groups, DASS doesn’t have that kind of backing. Instead, we have something better – the backing of thousands of grassroots Democrats across the country like you, friend. [] So while it might seem like a small contribution won’t do much against the vast sums the RSLC is raking in from hedge funds, when regular people committed to protecting our democracy chip in $10 or $20 at a time, we’re building a grassroots movement far more powerful than one propped up by blank checks. We’ve got a critical February end-of-month goal coming up in under a week, and we’re only $13,000 from our $70,000 goal. We have to hit this goal – and every goal after it – if we want to stand up to the RSLC and protect our democracy this November. [] So, now that you know the stakes and what we’re up against, I’m personally asking. Will you rush $20 ASAP to help us hit our end-of-month goal and elect Democratic Secretaries across the country? [] RUSH $5 >>> [] RUSH $20 >>> [] RUSH $50 >>> [] RUSH $100 >>> [] ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [] Grateful for your support, Jena Griswold Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Team, did you see what far-right talking head Tucker Carlson said about Baltimore recently? | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42092132/331602595/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220222tucker_wm_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTUwNmViMS1mMDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_a8oWUAk8a0WJ4XzvKykBym5QeAHlZ36kR4k2OAM5IE=)
---
**The Fox News host, who is known for spreading hate speech and dangerous conspiracy theories on everything from COVID to the 2020 presidential election, had the audacity to call Baltimore “a hellscape.”**
Here are his full comments:
_“And whatever you do, don’t go to Baltimore... It’s one of the worst places in the Western Hemisphere. It’s a little bit of Haiti in the Mid-Atlantic.”_
Baltimore means the world to me. I came of age here, went to college here, built a business here, and my wife and I are raising our children here. I’m sure I don’t have to explain to you how Carlson’s comments are just another racist dog whistle.
It’s really nothing new. I remember when Donald Trump attacked one of my heroes and mentors, the late Elijah Cummings, over his representation of Baltimore. He said this was somewhere no human being would want to live.
Baltimore has its challenges. It’s frustrating to see people purporting to be leaders revel in those challenges and parrot Donald Trump without doing anything to try to fix them. And without acknowledging the long and painful history of discriminatory practices that went into creating the challenges that Baltimore is facing in the first place. This is the birthplace of redlining, racist lending practices, and uneven police policies.
This kind of systemic marginalization is a very real problem to solve. It’s not a punchline.
**[I’m running for Governor of Maryland to lift up cities like Baltimore and communities across our state. Show your support for our campaign for EVERY Marylander by pitching in $10 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42092133/331602596/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220222tucker_wm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTUwNmViMS1mMDkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_a8oWUAk8a0WJ4XzvKykBym5QeAHlZ36kR4k2OAM5IE=)**

name: Tyler Harper for Georgia
subject: ICYMI: Tyler Harper Says Biden Is Affecting the Agricultural Industry Across the Country
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 22, 2022
---
| ICYMI: TYLER HARPER SAYS BIDEN IS AFFECTING AGRICULTURE INDUSTRY ACROSS THE COUNTRY
---
| OCILLA - In case you missed it, Tyler Harper sat down for a national radio interview with [SiriusXM the Patriot](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iqs5DKzUnC6uOdxFwDv_KFVkMRvg697iJulYARQbnGee0fGGyL4Q7yxEB33e20eBJnuztZLvbeZ-eUfF06MYP8rofpAHdFn9CtSnqER6stote14sGXMUt57msNxdncvcxVdWBpLtgM0D67aoKQ3dwwuo_-fXxLImBURCdf8-9JiM47QMVZKxgz59dh7pztqtSrd5-9EeFfdkSFSwE7NqkZSAnNspBmkWr3orYmsMl14bB87GboKIOT1NvOu_cSJU_zEVo7mFgw7qBx3k8zBdWO3cHVhGublE4a4v81xfkrY2FqeepDOlzoLnKVvUuAUoTTwK6gP9V9MIPrKTeFUi1L1wtnuGHckA&c=NuHAHtK8XQ_WPRU04YYYJxeVIAXRXYjzyt-nI2swYXWGBJawf-gCog==&ch=1dJIQT0JmU0RCpFnPn37O6egoVuUZVqfgxN4uR-hSWxxPWc5EShuKg==) over the weekend in which he talked about his background as a 7th generation South Georgia farmer, the growing support for his campaign for Agriculture Commissioner, and how the disastrous policy decisions coming down from the Biden administration are affecting the Agriculture industry both in Georgia and across the country.
You can read Breitbart's write-up of the interview [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Iqs5DKzUnC6uOdxFwDv_KFVkMRvg697iJulYARQbnGee0fGGyL4Q7yxEB33e20eBJnuztZLvbeZ-eUfF06MYP8rofpAHdFn9CtSnqER6stote14sGXMUt57msNxdncvcxVdWBpLtgM0D67aoKQ3dwwuo_-fXxLImBURCdf8-9JiM47QMVZKxgz59dh7pztqtSrd5-9EeFfdkSFSwE7NqkZSAnNspBmkWr3orYmsMl14bB87GboKIOT1NvOu_cSJU_zEVo7mFgw7qBx3k8zBdWO3cHVhGublE4a4v81xfkrY2FqeepDOlzoLnKVvUuAUoTTwK6gP9V9MIPrKTeFUi1L1wtnuGHckA&c=NuHAHtK8XQ_WPRU04YYYJxeVIAXRXYjzyt-nI2swYXWGBJawf-gCog==&ch=1dJIQT0JmU0RCpFnPn37O6egoVuUZVqfgxN4uR-hSWxxPWc5EShuKg==) and below.
---
|
---
| Exclusive -- GA Ag Commissioner Candidate Tyler Harper: Biden Is Affecting the Agricultural Business Across the Country

Candidate for Georgia Agriculture Commissioner, state Sen. Tyler Harper, told Breitbart News Saturday that President Joe Biden is hurting the agriculture industry across the country, and that he is running to help Georgians who are in agriculture.
Harper, born and raised in South Georgia, said, "Every Georgian is affected every day by the Ag Commissioner for multiple different perspectives to ensure that your food is safe and secure." He added that "Georgia has been named the number one state for business for eight years in a row."
The Republican explained that as the state has been the "number one state for business" for its economy, "agriculture drives a lot of our state's economy." "You know, one in seven jobs is involved in, in agriculture," he further explained. "Almost all 11 million Georgians that are in our state have, in some way every day are, affected by the agricultural industry and affected by the agriculture Commissioner's Office. Whether you're a farmer producer, producing our state's food, fiber, and shelter on a day-to-day basis, from row crops to livestock to the timber industry and others, or if you're going in the grocery store, to buy, to buy food for your family to cook or you're sending your kids off to school, to consider ensuring that they have that nutritious meal when they get to school."
He explained that he knows how to help Georgia as he is a seventh-generation South Georgia farmer. He has farmed peanuts, cotton, timber, beef, and cattle. The Republican noted that the next Ag Commissioner in Georgia needs to be working with their counterparts around the country to ensure the right policies are in place to fight the Biden administration on any policies they put in place to harm farmers.
Harper also identified agriculture as a national security concern, noting that you have to make sure the Ag industry is protected.
"If we're not providing the food, the fiber, and shelter for ourselves within our own borders, we're having to rely on somebody else to do that," he said. "And I don't know about you, but I don't want to... allow countries like China to provide us with our food and fiber, and our shelter, I want us to be able to do that for ourselves. And so continuing to put those conservative, common-sense policies in place allows us to continue to be able to protect ourselves, be able to secure ourselves, and be able to continue to live in the greatest country in the world and continue to provide the best place to live work and, and raise a family here in Georgia and across America."
As inflation is at a 40-year-high, Harper, blaming the Biden administration for its poor policies, said Georgians have seen problems at the gas pump and grocery store. "We're seeing that in the input costs that we're seeing on the farm. But you're also seeing that when you walk into the grocery store, and you're seeing it with almost four dollars a gallon gas. And in this economy in the Biden administration and what they're doing on a day-to-day basis is impacting our number one industry."
However, as he is running to be the state's agricultural commissioner, he's currently a state senator. Being a state senator, he said, he can fight the Biden administration on a day-to-day basis.
"We're not afraid to take [the Biden] administration to court to fight against those policies that are either unconstitutional or, or are not implemented in the right way, if it was done through an executive order and should have been done through congressional action," Harper said. "And we're going to continue to fight those on a day to day basis, and continue to fight for our farmer, our producer, and our consumer in our state and work to keep those costs down."

Friend -- In 2019, I was proud to cast my vote to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, making Virginia the 38th and final state needed to enshrine the ERA in the U.S. Constitution. On Friday, Attorney General Jason Miyares announced he withdrew Virginia from an appeal seeking to affirm that the ERA had been properly certified. Let me be clear: Jason Miyares and his right-wing extremist friends don't stand with Virginia's women, and Friday's action proves it. And Virginians will hold Jason Miyares accountable. **[Join our fight to hold Jason Miyares and his abomination of an administration to account by contributing $25 or whatever you can to Meet Our Moment today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXQtBRUU-R8DuZwfX3KzbQ9J8_fJIIjhWwtcXNyEFKY=/gkMjU5dPHry3R5TXng7pgvLj1j-moy132vi_Ts78RzA=)** The ERA is personal for me. When my mother worked as a violent crimes prosecutor in Norfolk, she was paid less than her male colleagues despite having a better conviction record. And I know her experience is not unique. I will promise you this: I will never stop fighting to ensure the equality of rights under the law shall not be abridged or denied on the basis of sex. Thanks for standing with me. \- Jay [**P.S.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXQtBRUU-R8DuZwfX3KzbQ9J8_fJIIjhWwtcXNyEFKY=/wUhOD-55zLDEhSN2vHKzOtAokF_3lBkpJN1WMP1WfAE=?app=desktop&v=O1hnse-9vMY)**[Click here to watch my floor speech in support of the Equal Rights Amendment!](https://act.myngp.com/el/tXQtBRUU-R8DuZwfX3KzbQ9J8_fJIIjhWwtcXNyEFKY=/wUhOD-55zLDEhSN2vHKzOtAokF_3lBkpJN1WMP1WfAE=?app=desktop&v=O1hnse-9vMY)**

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Happening this week...
body:
| | | | |
---
| | Good morning patriots!

Early voting ends Friday, so if you haven't yet, go vote! And if you'd be so obliged to do so, I humbly ask you to vote for me, Jameson Ellis, for TX-2.

I also just wanted to let y'all know that we have a meet and greet tonight and Thursday night, as well as possibly Wednesday and Friday in the Huffman/Crosby area, and Sunday in The Woodlands area. I'll make sure to keep y'all in the loop!

In the meantime, here are the details for tonight and Thursday night.

* Tuesday, February 22, 2022
6:00pm - 8:00pm

Kokomos Mexican Cantina
26850 Interstate 45 N
Oak Ridge North, TX 77386

* Thursday, February 24, 2022
7:00pm - 8:30pm

Splendora Cafe
23085 Speed St
New Caney, TX 77357

Hope to see y'all there!

---

---

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: Freedom Convoy on its way....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
---
| | |
Peter,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59632026:68BBCxE9N:m:1:3298722022:9ADED5F9F94F77E8F56A82A615283589:r)_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power.**

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, [**_which is why we 're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59632026:68BBCxE9N:m:1:3298722022:9ADED5F9F94F77E8F56A82A615283589:r)

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! [**_$15 = 10 Miles_**

**_$30 = 20 Miles_**

**_$150 = 100 Miles_**

**_$375 = 250 Miles_**

**_$750 = 500 Miles_**

**_$1,500 = 1,000 Miles_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59632026:68BBCxE9N:m:1:3298722022:9ADED5F9F94F77E8F56A82A615283589:r)
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

[**_So, I hope you 'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59632026:68BBCxE9N:m:1:3298722022:9ADED5F9F94F77E8F56A82A615283589:r)

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

| Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

name: Team Gearing
subject: Help us keep the momentum going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter

We’ll be brief - there are only a couple of days left of early voting and only a week left until Election Day!

We need your help to turn out voters. Can you come block walking with us this week? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/exMiHT4940qHQ_ffbwbq9w2]

We’ve been out talking to voters across the 114th District on their doorsteps about Charlie’s vision to build a better Texas for all of our neighbors. Throughout our conversations, one thing is clear - Texans are ready to elect strong leaders who will go to Austin and focus on the issues that impact us most here at home - not ones who play political games to cater to their extremist base.

Our campaign is in full swing and peaking at the right time. Help us keep our momentum going - donate $10 or more today to help us win >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Together we can win this,

- Team Gearing

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]
Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

subject: A different kind of campaign

https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
America has changed over the last few years. From George Floyd’s murder, to the pandemic, to a sitting president supporting a violent attack on our Democracy – we’ve entered a new era and we must not pretend things are going to go back to the way things were.
Nancy and I are running a different kind of campaign. We acknowledge the fragility of our current situation, and how critical it is that we usher in a future of equity and inclusivity. Anything less is unacceptable.
Too long have the voices of the marginalized gone unheard. Today we have an opportunity and we must seize it – and in order to succeed we need help from grassroots supporters like you. We are funded BY the people FOR the people. Can you make a donation today and help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

clean_body: | = | | We’re not trying to alarm you, folks, but House Republicans announced they raised a record-breaking $140 million in 2021. That’s not even the worst of it, either. Republican extremists continue to capitalize and fundraise off of divisive and dangerous rhetoric to convince their supporters that the 2020 election was stolen. We need to keep these Republicans FAR away from Congress, folks. And to do that, we need to protect Elaine’s seat. = | | | = Elaine is running in one of five toss-up races in the entire country, which makes her seat absolutely essential to maintaining our Democratic House majority. Republicans know this, and that’s why Elaine is one of their top targets. They’ll spend millions backing her opponent to try and unseat her. I was a chief strategist for Bill Clinton when he first ran for president in 1992. This election was historic: our campaign amassed 370 electoral votes, won 32 states plus DC, and we elected the first Democratic president in over a decade. I’m going to tell you my take on the state of Susie Lee’s race in Nevada but first, [**can you chip in to help re-elect her and keep Democrats in power?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42098276/331615337/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220222_FR_Begala_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzU2NmM3ZC1mODkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTIMQZ3ZM39l_5iWQyy9enwe7BkMQWC7K8vrifof4ow=) | | | [Chip in >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42098278/331615340/-1905045093?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_220222_FR_Begala_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzU2NmM3ZC1mODkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTIMQZ3ZM39l_5iWQyy9enwe7BkMQWC7K8vrifof4ow=)

Even though President Clinton’s race was 30 years ago _(unbelievable!)_ , a lot of the same rules for political strategy still apply: analyzing the field, taking stock of our options, then acting accordingly.
**The field:** In 2022, Democrats are up against an energized Republican base that only needs to flip 5 seats in the House to regain their majority.
**Our option:** My friend, Congresswoman Susie Lee, is in one of the seats that Trump’s gang of Republicans believe they have the greatest chance of flipping. She’s a tough fighter but she can’t go it alone.
**And here’s the part where we need to act:** The only way we’re going to save our Democratic House Majority is by supporting incumbents like Susie Lee as often as we can. And you guessed it, now’s the perfect time to do just that.
[**Will you give $10 or more to support Democrat Susie Lee in one of the top-targeted GOP districts to flip? name: Greg Casar
subject: Go vote TODAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.18_email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.18_email]
Peter–have you voted yet? Early voting ends this Friday, February 25th, so it’s critical that you go vote TODAY if you haven’t already!
>> FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE << [https://www.texasdemocrats.org/my-texas-votes-2/]
This race is going to be close. With four candidates running, the race to get to 50% on Election Day will be tough. But if every one of our supporters votes early and tells their friends, families, neighbors, and coworkers—we’ll be that much closer to passing our bold, progressive agenda!
I’m so grateful for everything you’ve done for our campaign, Peter. So many of you have made phone calls, knocked doors, and donated to help us share our positive vision for working families.
When I’m elected I’ll fight every day to deliver good jobs with better wages, Medicare for All, protections for reproductive rights, and a better future for our state and country. But I can only do that if all of our supporters go vote today— find your polling place and make a plan to vote today [https://www.texasdemocrats.org/my-texas-votes-2/] !
Our campaign is working in overdrive to Get Out the Vote across TX-35 – can you pitch in to help support our GOTV efforts? Every contribution helps us reach more voters in this final week. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.22_email]
Thank you,
Greg
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]
Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
Greg Casar for Congress
P.O. Box 301923
Austin, TX 78703
United States

body:
