| | |
It's Dan Crenshaw. I'm reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59627112:JjGObxEND:m:1:3299561967:EFC0A02CC4A39E8303A506D66D9C1FD6:r "RENEW NOW")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1. Beating Nancy Pelosi's House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes - it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59627112:JjGObxEND:m:1:3299561967:EFC0A02CC4A39E8303A506D66D9C1FD6:r)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed.**But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 9th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59627112:JjGObxEND:m:1:3299561967:EFC0A02CC4A39E8303A506D66D9C1FD6:r "RENEW NOW")

Dan Crenshaw

body:

| | | Friend, Ron Johnson has just announced his campaign for re-election in Wisconsin.

Here are the top three things you need to know about Ron and his race:
1. He is running against 12 Democrats **who outraised him** the last 3 quarters (and are on pace to defeat Ron again in the fundraising race for Q1)
2. **Wisconsin will be vital to retaking the Senate.**
3. Ron Johnson is a Trump-endorsed Senator who is no stranger to a challenge but he is going to need **ALL HANDS ON DECK** if we are going to keep Wisconsin **RED**.

So, Friend, this is what we need from you. If Ron is going to have any chance of defeating the Democrats that are POURING MONEY into Wisconsin, we need you to step up.

in just $18 now? ")**_
Just $18 from every patriot that reads this will JUMPSTART Ron's campaign and help put us on track to BEAT A RADICAL DEM. Step up asap, Friend.
**Our plans to RETAKE THE SENATE cannot succeed without winning Wisconsin. **

name: Friends of Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress
subject: Important 2.22.2022 Event cancelations and updates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Good morning . After a successful fundraiser in Marquette last night, Peggy and I drove through the night to Leelanau County. We traversed all kinds of weather but made it safely. We have some updates to share today if you were planning on attending an upcoming event.| | | **Updates**
---
_**Dr. Bob's campaign and his****unprecedented****level of engagement and traveling can get expensive. Staff and volunteers are working hard, and the effort to reach every corner of the district requires a lot of resources. | | Dr. Bob Lorinser is a democratic candidate for Michigan's 1st District Congressional seat, a district spanning across the Northern lower peninsula and the Upper Peninsula. He would be honored to represent all the residents of the District, including the young and old, people of all genders, those that agree and disagree with him, moderates, and progressives. He is an experienced diplomat, statesman, and physician from Northern Michigan running for Michigan's First Congressional District. With your support, Dr. Bob hopes to serve and represent the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan. Why is he running for Congress? In one word: Service. He has a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation.

Together, with your support, he can fulfill the needs of our communities' everyday citizens and working families. He's confident he can be an effective member of Congress for the 1st District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American.

He will run on a bedrock of principles — wisdom, justice, courage, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law.

You deserve a change. You deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth, and tries to embody all that is best in this great district. You deserve a Congressman with vision, who has the ability to recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who has the ability to build a consensus to achieve that vision.

The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. It's time to unite. It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities.

He strives to be Northern Michigan's voice of reason in Washington, D.C..

He's eager to continue his service. He's incredibly humbled to run and it would be his life's honor to represent you. Please share his message with your friends and family. Victory will not happen without your support and generosity. Vision: Dr. Bob is interested in independent, reasonable solutions that best fit the First District, regardless of which side of the aisle those solutions originate. He is hyperfocused on the reunification of our communities and country.
Regardless of which party voters affiliate, he strives to be the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan's 'voice of reason' in Washington, dedicated to advancing policies that reflect our common goals. Lorinser is confident his developing initiatives will be much more representative of the district's values and priorities than the current incumbent. Dr. Bob stands on certain principles that will guide his policy decisions and seeks to be a true representative of the people of the 1st District. name: Team Jane
subject: Last week to Early Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
body:
Friend,

We are in the final days of early voting for Congressional District 30. You can vote early at any early voting center in your county – you can check times and locations in Dallas County and in Tarrant County.
We are expecting another round of winter weather this week so please make your plan to go vote!

Find Your Early Vote Location - Dallas County [https://www.dallascountyvotes.org/early-voting-information/]
Find Your Early Vote Location - Tarrant County [https://www.tarrantcounty.com/en/elections/Upcoming-Election-Information.html]

Each day we are gaining more support from people on the ground in North Texas. Together, we have been in this fight for better paying jobs, quality healthcare, equity and justice reform for OUR community.
Thank you for our North Texas family and community for your support!
We are taking our fight to congress.

| | Friend, We had weather in the 50's yesterday. Tomorrow is supposed to be in the 60's. In February. These temperatures in the middle of a Massachusetts winter aren’t normal, and they’re part of a trend — 2021 was the hottest year on record for our state. Climate change is already here, and we need to address it head on. [**> >> That’s why I’m fighting for a Green New Deal for Massachusetts. Can I count on you to join us in this fight by chipping in $20 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099935/331623634/-1275523729?refcode=02_22_22_GND_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjc2NmY2Ny1mZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=koT3UZzQQE2QIPCQQLHun7uq4BwcxdbbMR-3q64k60c=) Climate justice is personal. My eight-year-old daughter talks to me about climate change more than any other issue. As I meet people at backyard events across our state, it’s the high schoolers who raise their hands and ask me the tough questions about how fast and hard my administration will go on climate change. Young people are begging us not to hand them a planet on fire, and they have been for years. As a mother and a public servant, I refuse to accept that future for our kids. We can meet this moment and lead the nation by passing a Green New Deal for Massachusetts. We already know how — by building a green economy that not only sustains our planet, but all of our families as well. And it will take all of us to do it. [**I need you in this with me, friend. Click here to pitch in $20 and invest in our kids’ futures.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099936/331623635/-1275523729?refcode=02_22_22_GND_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjc2NmY2Ny1mZTkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=koT3UZzQQE2QIPCQQLHun7uq4BwcxdbbMR-3q64k60c=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: We’re already living the effects of climate change. | | | | | Friend, We had weather in the 50's yesterday. Tomorrow is supposed to be in the 60's. In February. These temperatures in the middle of a Massachusetts winter aren’t normal, and they’re part of a trend — 2021 was the hottest year on record for our state. Climate change is already here, and we need to address it head on. = Climate justice is personal. My eight-year-old daughter talks to me about climate change more than any other issue. As I meet people at backyard events across our state, it’s the high schoolers who raise their hands and ask me the tough questions about how fast and hard my administration will go on climate change. Young people are begging us not to hand them a planet on fire, and they have been for years. As a mother and a public servant, I refuse to accept that future for our kids. We can meet this moment and lead the nation by passing a Green New Deal for Massachusetts. We already know how — by building a green economy that not only sustains our planet, but all of our families as well. And it will take all of us to do it. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. Folks, we know that if enough voters hear about Jazz’s record of delivering for the people he represents and his vision for the future, we can win this critical open seat for progress. Our June 28 primary election is less than four months away, so we’re launching our door-to-door canvassing operation this weekend.
But we need to make sure we have enough supplies to keep our team going. Can you chip in right away to make sure our volunteers have everything they need? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=body_link1]

Let's do this!
Team Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | |
Friend,

I’m writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America’s truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we’ve endured over the past two years, _and we’re taking action._

**That’s right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
** _[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We’ve had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it’s just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN’T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don’t stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
** _[$15 = 10 Miles](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

** _[$30 = 20 Miles](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._Q9XqA "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

** _[$150 = 100 Miles](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "$150 = 100 Miles")_**

** _[$375 = 250 Miles](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "$375 = 250 Miles")_**

** _[$750 = 500 Miles](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "$750 = 500 Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we’re putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

---
Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDUzLWE3N2ZhYjYyZGEwNjRjM2I4ZDBmZDdmOGIwMzc3YzJkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/_Nt_wFfiEiCSnrehGu_3Sw) to unsubscribe.

name: Capt. Hung Cao
subject: Are you proud to be an American?
body:
I know what it’s like when Communism destroys your country. When I was four years old, my family narrowly escaped the Comm
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcc71ptdc324s7154bnk1kamqnvmjf1hct156ip8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcdlgm5i7ec3765r32ctlc5gb6s3m68pr7chie8r3apjhchim9cjn6sqr2tb0csrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmccdn6mqefclicopb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgmapb1cjh64p724no)
Fellow Patriot, I know what it’s like when Communism destroys your country. When I was four years old, my family narrowly escaped the Communist takeover of South Vietnam. Saigon fell just ten days later. I arrived in America as a refugee, a boy without a country. To me, America has always been the bright, shining beacon of freedom in the world. **I cannot express to you how proud and thankful I am to be an American.**

I dedicated my life to the defense of this country and the freedom we hold so dear.

I served the whole world over on missions as a Navy Special Operations Officer. I fought in combat operations in Iraq, Afghanistan and Somalia.

I saw the worst of humanity in our enemies; but I also saw the best our country had to offer in the character of my fellow Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen, Marines and Coast Guardsmen.

**Throughout my _entire time_ as an American and a Naval Officer, I _always_ thought we could rely on our Commander in Chief to lead us to victory - until I saw what happened in Afghanistan under Joe Biden. **

_**I****have five close friends who are being kicked out of the Navy for refusing the Covid-19 vaccine.** These are Special Projects saturation divers, SEAL Team 6 operators, and world class pilots who have given their entire lives in defense of this Republic._ _Now, because of a vaccine for a virus against which they already have natural immunity, they are discarded like yesterday's trash. Some will not receive their benefits after years of service to our country.**This is wrong and no way to thank our men and women for their service.**_

**I knew I had to take action, and that’s why I’m running for Congress in Virginia’s 10th district.**

I hope you’ll join me in our mission to uphold the **freedom of choice** in our great country.

**[Pitch in today to send a retired U.S. Naval Officer to Congress who will FIGHT for the American dream and make America FREE again.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmcmifl73damu10hc6v1242m63npu584bcu4vk68_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clgm9oj2cjh2bs) **
[**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4pfnj5t5m4e7erghcfh3avc8s6qe1hgt1b46ga0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clgm9oj2cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znlkdhk4d4e9k57m9selml2dv4ehd66anev2s1m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clgm9oj2cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7b72is5h76bmbbha2kv860thd327o76es0orh8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clgm9oj2cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0afrpap4uprloaqjf5q8rimlucgj3gsvmmoorh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clgm9oj2cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrthonv3ckvlgl4pqeja6060io867etu59270k38_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clgm9oj2cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmi115pgorr9om8kcfngfau1nr95fbd61af1bej0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clgm9oj2cjh2bs) Thank you, Capt. Hung Cao
Former Navy Special Forces
Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) [**JOIN THE TEAM**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zah27ojcpoarbuj4tvsib9c8njvd7k3s2mp0k43g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clgm9oj2cjh2bs) Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Friend,
**_"When we open our eyes today and look around America, we see America not through the eyes of someone who has enjoyed the fruits of Americanism. We see America through the eyes of someone who has been the victim of Americanism. We don't see any American dream. We've experienced only the American nightmare. We haven't benefited from America's democracy. We've only suffered from America's hypocrisy.....This is why I say it's the ballot or the bullet. It's liberty or it's death. It's freedom for everybody or freedom for nobody."

― Malcolm X, The Ballot or the Bullet, Detroit 1964 _ **
On the anniversary of his death, I reflect on these powerful words from civil rights leader Malcolm X. While he was assassinated over fifty-seven years ago, his words, ideas, and aspirations for liberation ring true today as ever.

I was blessed to be able to work on a GOTV project "The Ballot or The Bullet" during the 2020 Election Cycle - You can check it out here: [**https://fb.watch/beyX1ERiAV/**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42101909/331632315/-1132780100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JiMjdmNi0wMjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Fp3t2mQvNYWbxz8s5x1icS9JNMFjRPxCMbEapnrE8c=&emci=1112dd37-c490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=07bb27f6-0294-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825)

Folks, so many families are struggling. You don't need me to tell you that times are tough. Costs of healthcare and childcare have stretched family budgets beyond capacity. Costs of housing and stagnant wages are preventing folks from getting ahead. Racism, sexism, and inequities throughout our institutions have created walls and barriers for so many.

In the words of Malcolm X, "wrong is wrong," and you know what? It's wrong when a family should have to choose between paying rent or paying their medical debt. It's wrong when a single working mother should have to choose between taking care of a sick child or losing a day's salary. It's wrong when our children should have to bear the burden of a pandemic and risk their health by going to school.

**We have a lot of work to do in our community and our nation to right these wrongs** , but I've never shied away from a challenge, and I know you won't either. Because, while the problems may run deep, I know they are never too deep to sow seeds of change.

**[Fifty-seven years later, I honor the words of Malcolm X by re-asserting my commitment to righting these wrongs and fighting to make our community and our country better. Join me in this fight, and, together, we will work towards actualizing the potential of our nation.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42101910/331632317/1465103901?refcode=em22_220221_MalcomX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JiMjdmNi0wMjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Fp3t2mQvNYWbxz8s5x1icS9JNMFjRPxCMbEapnrE8c=)**

Thank you so much for honoring the legacy of Malcolm on this anniversary.

With gratitude,

Angela

[ [](https://www.twitter.com/AngelForCongressMD04) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42101912/331632319/615677664?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JiMjdmNi0wMjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Fp3t2mQvNYWbxz8s5x1icS9JNMFjRPxCMbEapnrE8c=&emci=1112dd37-c490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=07bb27f6-0294-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825) PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
District Heights, MD 20753
240-293-2552 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
You can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1112dd37-c490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/07bb27f6-0294-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JiMjdmNi0wMjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Fp3t2mQvNYWbxz8s5x1icS9JNMFjRPxCMbEapnrE8c=&id=110829508).

name: Mark Kelly
subject: my decision
body:
Derek.
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift.
I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and CommonGood.
Your support is so important to our success.
The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect . We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.
We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money .
You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.
But now we have a new mission: Re-election.
And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you.
So please:
Will you split a $25 contribution between my re-election campaign and CommonGood? We can’t win and protect our Senate majority without your support. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220222_CGVA_Kelly]

clean_body: Derek. I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift. I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and CommonGood. Your support is so important to our success. The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect . We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down. We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money . You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. But now we have a new mission: Re-election. And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you. So please: Will you split a $25 contribution between my re-election campaign and CommonGood? We can’t win and protect our Senate majority without your support. [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Donate ANY [] Thank you again. For everything. Mark Kelly (This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.) name: Derek Marshall
subject: $30,000 a year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
The people in my district are struggling. The median individual income for our district?**Less than $30,000 a year per person. Those are poverty wages.** And in a state as expensive as California, it’s even harder to live on that kind of money.
**[I’m running for Congress to change things on the ground for the people of California’s 23rd district. But I can’t get to Washington, DC without help from supporters like you. We rely on donations to keep going, so I’m asking you: will you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42103385/331638333/-431919476?refcode=2-22a&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ1NDIzZS0wOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkA2YS0E-XUOn2Wyz4P3O5udgMrUXn7X3GBCWtp7ll0=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42103388/331638334/-431919476?refcode=2-22button1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ1NDIzZS0wOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkA2YS0E-XUOn2Wyz4P3O5udgMrUXn7X3GBCWtp7ll0=)

**Too many people in my district are living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to keep themselves and their families afloat.** When you’re living on $24,000 a year, every expense becomes a burden, and any unexpected emergency can put you under water. I should know.
**For three years, I drove for Uber to pay my bills.** I started off my day with a cup of coffee and a banana for less than a dollar, and**I drove for hours and hours until I had enough money to cover my costs for the day.** Then I would wake up the next day and do it all over again.
**[The people of California’s 23rd deserve a representative in Congress who understands their experiences and will fight for their needs. But I can’t become that leader without your help. Will you pitch in and invest in my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42103389/331638337/-431919476?refcode=2-22a&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ1NDIzZS0wOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkA2YS0E-XUOn2Wyz4P3O5udgMrUXn7X3GBCWtp7ll0=)**
**Over half the current members of Congress are millionaires.** Yes, you heard that right: the majority of our legislators are millionaires, in a time when wealth inequality has never been more extreme in America. **We need representatives like me who share the experiences of their constituents. **
**My opponent Jay Obernolte is a multi-millionaire.** He can’t serve the people of California’s 23rd well when he votes for laws which benefit the very same companies that bankroll his campaign. It’s time for fresh, new, ethical leadership.**I’m running for Congress to be that leader. **
**[Our entire campaign runs on 100% grassroots donations. I don’t believe in taking money from corporations or special interests, only real people. As a supporter, will you contribute today and invest in a future where a true champion of the people is representing California’s 23rd in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42103395/331638338/-431919476?refcode=2-22a&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ1NDIzZS0wOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkA2YS0E-XUOn2Wyz4P3O5udgMrUXn7X3GBCWtp7ll0=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

I don’t have to tell you that it has been a rough few years for Iowa Democrats. When I was elected leader, we wasted no time digging into every process and turning over every rock to figure out how we can better serve the people of Iowa. We conducted a comprehensive debrief of the 2020 election to learn from our mistakes, and we gathered feedback from dozens of candidates, staff, voters, volunteers, and contributors.

Part of that feedback was how we can better engage you— our grassroots supporters across Iowa and the rest of the country. We cannot retake the majority in the State Senate without you; we must compete everywhere and for every vote, and we can only do that by placing a new emphasis on listening to the concerns of everyday Iowans.

In that spirit, we’re re-launching a brand-new Senate Majority Fund email program. If you’re anything like me, you’re probably getting lots of political emails. **Our approach is going to be different. We want you to be a part of this team. That starts today.**

[_**Can you take 2-3 minutes right now to take a quick survey about the issues that matter most to you?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42104187/331641451/-15432540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTE0MjY2Yy0wYTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fNL7pIC94g9CcEujLbA-wvy4qL1OBOJpwT_JzeBoBFI=&emci=4a313ec5-3c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=9914266c-0a94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=31742421)

We want to keep getting better and make sure that our emails are helpful to you. We’re going to be reaching out to you more over the next few weeks and months for your help— learning about what you care about, thoughts on how we can win in 2022, and asking for your support.

In a few days, we’ll circle back with the results of our survey. Until then, thank you again for all your support.

With gratitude,

_Sen. Zach Wahls_

We would like to formally invite you to our new Platinum Membership Club.

Your support is crucial to our fight to win back the House Majority for Republicans in 2022.

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are raising millions of dollars from their liberal elite donors. In order to overcome their fundraising, we are calling on grassroots supporters like you to step up one more time.

You have the power to retire Nancy Pelosi as House Speaker, end Joe Biden's political agenda, and restore conservative leadership in Washington.

_**[Accept your Platinum Membership upgrade now to ensure victory for House Republicans.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59627169:JEp_IxENB:m:1:3299561967:BDF909428E3B8128A2C225ED5BABDC5D:r "Accept your Platinum Membership upgrade now to ensure victory for House Republicans.")**_

Platinum Club, the NRCC

name: Team Warner
subject: How you can help build a stronger Virginia:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
With so much at stake in 2022, we need more bipartisan leaders who are looking out for Virginians in the House, not less.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42104622/331643204/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODFmOGQ3Ny0wYjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0HkIBT2SxlG5gFUUOWKwUXb2GmfT4hAw_GThDgrlTE=&emci=cb5fe1b6-fc93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=181f8d77-0b94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | We need your help, Derek. This November, Rep. Elaine Luria is up for re-election. For the families and communities across Hampton Roads, that’s a big deal. Here’s why: Elaine Luria’s seat is a must-win battleground district if Democrats are going to hold the House this November. Sen. Warner has worked closely with Rep. Luria and the entire Virginia delegation to deliver for communities across the Commonwealth. That’s meant better access to affordable health care, delivering economic relief to struggling Virginians, fighting the pandemic, creating good-paying jobs through the bipartisan infrastructure law, and more. **But there’s more work to get done for the people of Hampton Roads and Virginians everywhere.** With so much at stake in 2022, we need _more_ bipartisan leaders who are looking out for Virginians in the House, not _less._ [_**We need to re-elect Elaine Luria. Will you rush in $5, or whatever you can spare, to help build a stronger Virginia?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42104623/331643205/-596042571?refcode=mw_em_220222_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODFmOGQ3Ny0wYjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0HkIBT2SxlG5gFUUOWKwUXb2GmfT4hAw_GThDgrlTE=) Rep. Luria’s the kind of leader we need in Washington. She’s a Navy veteran who settled down in Hampton Roads and decided to re-invest in the community by starting her own small business, Mermaid Factory. She knows what it means to be a Virginian and to fight for the Commonwealth – and that’s never changing. She’s already spent the last years successfully fighting for small businesses, parents, and workers across the Commonwealth. If elected again, that’s sure to continue. Your support today means that her campaign will have the resources it needs to continue fighting for us. **So, Derek:** [_**Please, join us and contribute $5 today to support leaders like Rep. Luria and Sen. Warner. It’s going to go a long way towards protecting our Democratic majorities and ensuring we have the right leaders in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42104624/331643206/-596042571?refcode=mw_em_220222_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODFmOGQ3Ny0wYjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0HkIBT2SxlG5gFUUOWKwUXb2GmfT4hAw_GThDgrlTE=) Thank you, Team Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42104625/331643207/-596042571?refcode=mw_em_220222_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODFmOGQ3Ny0wYjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0HkIBT2SxlG5gFUUOWKwUXb2GmfT4hAw_GThDgrlTE=)**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Theology 101
body:
I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgp6dq23lcebov5k1ohf1eieu6na1ihpirou2tgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5climcpb5chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hffdb0cdomcobi6dj69pjn6hin1cb165r31pjn6uqj7chim1pmcdr0chij8db7curt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmccdkmmr30shlcoob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zau7qpak6c4miga7gqdi2up04o6n6ptj8gdrhf08_rp22sh2s8i66ob5climcpb5chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf4ihbsnbvk1ftojnl4ch1mnuj6jg06s1ebmisd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5climcpb5chh2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlor40vqfq1h6s0ia7j90696h7qud5212lr7f1lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5climcpb5chh2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9nalbpr0q1gqi4jp0i796kgnl6f8l7ldt15prr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5climcpb5chh2bs)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zf4an9to7n69e54op6dev06gcoi1r8e491061tc8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkm7dh2kkjgkb1vk0sol8tcngjiaagj7rl2l9tp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5climcpb5chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: URGENT: We're behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

My end-of-the-month fundraising deadline is fast approaching.

In fact, there are only **SIX days left.**

And I simply must ask for your help!

Never Trump Super PACs, my RINO opponent, Hollywood liberals, gun grabbers, union bosses, Fauci fanatics, and liberal billionaires like George Soros are flooding my district with dark money.

**Please help me fight back TODAY.** [_**FIGHT BACK WITH MTG
DONTATE HERE!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59689744:WItLAMH5N:m:1:2365227053:A3FB93FF7CA226F6271573E145749734:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59689744:WItLAMH5N:m:1:2365227053:A3FB93FF7CA226F6271573E145749734:r)

And they don't just want to beat me. **They are out to DESTROY me.**

Twitter banned me.

_Socialist Democrats have tried to expel me from Congress - FOUR TIMES_!

The Tyrant Nancy Pelosi kicked me off all my committees.

Big Tech and the fake news media have teamed up to silence or smear me.

**But it's not just the Democrats and their lapdogs that are after me.**

Georgia GOP insiders loaded up my district with 30,000 new Democrat voters.

And so-called Republican members of congress Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger wanted to illegally seized my text messages to leak to CNN!

All because I back President Trump, and yes because I want Joe Biden impeached!

**And when Republicans take control of the House and Senate this coming November, I will lead the charge to make it happen.**

But to lead this fight, first I've got to be reelected. And that isn't going to be easy!

**[And why I hope and pray you will chip in your most generous contribution BEFORE the end of February deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59689744:WItLAMH5N:m:1:2365227053:A3FB93FF7CA226F6271573E145749734:r).**

They call you and me "deplorables."

**But what's really deplorable is the actions of the Democrats.**

The CIA is gathering a massive database of American citizens!

Nancy Pelosi's Capitol Hill Police and Joe Biden's FBI agents are spying on members of congress!

_Hillary Clinton and the Democrats spied on President Donald Trump_!

And it's time we made these criminals pay for their illegal, unconstitutional actions.

**That's why in congress I am leading the fight to:**
---
• Impeach Joe Biden;• Make Hillary Clinton pay for her TREASON;• Fire Fauci; and• Restore our Constitution.
[_**FIGHT BACK WITH MTG
DONTATE HERE!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59689744:WItLAMH5N:m:1:2365227053:A3FB93FF7CA226F6271573E145749734:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59689744:WItLAMH5N:m:1:2365227053:A3FB93FF7CA226F6271573E145749734:r)

I simply can't do this alone.

**Now more than ever I need your help. Not only to fight back, but to take the fight to them.**

But I must have your support right away to keep speaking the truth and speaking up for our America First values.

Please stand with me in this all-important fight today!

**[Chip in your most generous contribution BEFORE the end of February deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59689744:WItLAMH5N:m:1:2365227053:A3FB93FF7CA226F6271573E145749734:r)!**

Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59689744:WItLAMH5N:m:1:2365227053:A3FB93FF7CA226F6271573E145749734:r)

* * *
**_Paid for by Greene for Congress.

_**

**Peter, New York’s housing crisis is only getting worse – and communities of color are being hit the hardest.**

In a 2021 survey, a plurality of low-income Black New Yorkers ranked “affordable housing” to be their top priority. And the Bronx, a predominantly Black and Hispanic borough, now has the **_highest concentration of eviction cases in the state of New York._**
This is unacceptable. Every single person should have a right to housing that is both safe and affordable – but decades of discriminatory housing practices, the manipulative actions of private investors, and a multi-year battle with COVID-19 have taken this right away from millions of New Yorkers.

That’s why, as the People’s Lawyer, I’m fighting to secure fair access to affordable housing for all. I will not rest until every New Yorker has a safe, clean place to put their head at night – but I cannot win this fight alone. **I need to collect at least 2,500 responses before this survey closes at midnight tonight, and I still don’t know where you stand, Peter. Please, let me know:**
| | **Should everyone have access to affordable housing?**
---

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: Let me explain, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
We're fighting an uphill battle
| | |
---
I won't lie to you, friend. We're fighting an uphill battle right now. Let me explain:
_**FIRST,**_ Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
_**THEN,**_ polling showed me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans poured millions into Florida to stack the cards against me.
_**NOW,**_ Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me – and I'm falling dangerously short of my $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal. I need to make up the difference before midnight, friend.
Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and I desperately need more resources right now to compete with Rubio.
The last Florida Senate race was determined by _just_ over 10,000 votes, and my race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win.
**[Please, friend, will you donate $5 to help me meet my midnight goal, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority? Every dollar counts at this critical moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42105172/331645562/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2474-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODFlZjMyMi0wZTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xFEb8eG4vLILIGnWWy9qRmUFpRkG4iJl3X2CS3ULAA=)**

Val Demings

name: Team Oakley
subject: The machine is up to their old tricks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

Ever since Imani out-raised Rep. Donald Payne Jr. 2 to 1 in her first quarter of fundraising, we knew that New Jersey’s corrupt political machine would paint a target on her back.

But, now that we’ve called them out for their blatantly sexist, classist, and racist attacks on Imani, they’re switching to subtler methods to try to undermine our campaign.

Just in the past month, they’ve sent machine operatives to crash our campaign events. They’ve tried to label Imani as nothing more than a Justice Democrat in their fundraising calls. And they’ve used their corporate sponsors to boost fundraising for our opponent.

And we can’t let them get away with it, Peter. Click here to chip in $27 — or whatever you can — to help us fight back against the machine’s dirty tricks. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-february2022?refcode=machinetricks]

This kind of petty gamesmanship just goes to show that New Jersey’s political machine and the Democratic establishment don’t care about serving our communities. All they care about is winning — upholding their own power and using that power to gain favor with corporate sponsors and high-powered lobbyists.

And they’re willing to do whatever it takes to undermine a proud progressive champion like Imani.

We deserve better, Peter. It’s past time for us to stand up to the corporate establishment, take back our communities, and elect an unapologetic progressive to make change for us in Congress. If you agree, click here to chip in $27 and help us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-february2022?refcode=machinetricks]

Thank you for standing with us.

— Team Oakley

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown=20for=20Governor?=
subject: ICYMI - Hillsdale Co. Sheriff Endorses Brown for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
“I am proud to endorse a great man and leader for the office of Governor.”– Sheriff Scott B. Hodshire, Hillsdale County | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
## Hillsdale Co. Sheriff Endorses Michael Brown for Governor

Peter – I'm honored to announce that I've received the endorsement of Hillsdale County Sheriff Scott Hodshire today.

Sheriff Hodshire has been an effective leader in the fight against the opioid crisis and is a strong advocate for school resource officers. As we rebuild public safety in the state, his experience will be valuable.
---
|
---
| _“Captain Mike is a breath of fresh air. Mike is pro law enforcement with a lot of experience in the field. I know Mike will not order mandates that are against your Constitutional rights. I feel like Mike is the only candidate that will fulfill his campaign promise once elected as our Governor. I am proud to endorse a great man and leader for the office of Governor.”_ **– Sheriff Scott B. Hodshire, Hillsdale County**

Sheriff Hodshire joins a growing list of endorsements including State Representative Beth Griffin, St. Joseph County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite, Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli, Berrien County Commissioner Mac Elliott, and rocker Ted Nugent.
---
|
---

I know Mike will not order mandates that are against your Constitutional rights. I feel like Mike is the only candidate that will fulfill his campaign promise once elected as our Governor. I am proud to endorse a great man and leader for the office of Governor.” – Sheriff Scott B. Hodshire, Hillsdale County Sheriff Hodshire joins a growing list of endorsements including State Representative Beth Griffin, St. Joseph County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite, Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli, Berrien County Commissioner Mac Elliott, and rocker Ted Nugent. | | "HAVE YOU ENDORSED MICHAEL? ENDORSE HIM HERE." | | | Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jenni=2C=20Team=20Perdue?=
subject: It’s time for TERM LIMITS
body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=59c9e507b2&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Good morning,

As an outsider, David Perdue has always been a champion for term limits. In fact, his very first bill as a U.S. Senator was a term limits bill.

Now, David is continuing to lead this effort by calling for term limits for all statewide elected officials in Georgia. Career politicians caused the dysfunction we see today, and they won’t be the ones to fix it. [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=28d9a232a8&e=89fb4d5220) _Join us in the fight to shake up the political establishment and elect David Perdue as Georgia’s next Governor._ – Team Perdue
* * *
David’s official announcement on term limits is below – please share this with your friends and family! **David Perdue Announces Vision For Statewide Term Limits** **ATLANTA, GA** – David Perdue, Trump-endorsed candidate for Governor, today announced his vision for term limits for all statewide elected officials in Georgia. Perdue is proposing a total of two four-year terms for all statewide elected officials, including the Governor.

“As an outsider, I firmly believe we need more citizen legislators, not career politicians. That’s why my first bill in the U.S. Senate was a term limits bill,” **said David Perdue.** “Career politicians caused the dysfunction we see today, and they won’t be the ones to fix it. For too long, 20-year career politicians like Brian Kemp have focused more on advancing their own self-interests than helping the people they were elected to serve. Georgians want tried and true leaders who will make waves to get things done. As Governor, I’ll work with the General Assembly to finally enact term limits for all statewide elected officials in Georgia.”

This is part of a bigger effort that Perdue has led since 2015 to enact term limits. On his first day as a U.S. Senator, Perdue introduced a term limits bill. Now, it's time for Georgia to lead by example. The Georgia State Senate has already passed a bill calling for a constitutional convention to propose term limits at the federal level. Perdue fully supports this effort, in addition to term limits for all statewide elected officials. ###

Now, David is continuing to lead this effort by calling for term limits for all statewide elected officials in Georgia. Career politicians caused the dysfunction we see today, and they won’t be the ones to fix it. Join us in the fight to shake up the political establishment and elect David Perdue as Georgia’s next Governor. – Team Perdue David’s official announcement on term limits is below – please share this with your friends and family! David Perdue Announces Vision For Statewide Term Limits ATLANTA, GA – David Perdue, Trump-endorsed candidate for Governor, today announced his vision for term limits for all statewide elected officials in Georgia. Perdue is proposing a total of two four-year terms for all statewide elected officials, including the Governor. “As an outsider, I firmly believe we need more citizen legislators, not career politicians. That’s why my first bill in the U.S. Senate was a term limits bill,” said David Perdue. “Career politicians caused the dysfunction we see today, and they won’t be the ones to fix it. For too long, 20-year career politicians like Brian Kemp have focused more on advancing their own self-interests than helping the people they were elected to serve. Georgians want tried and true leaders who will make waves to get things done. As Governor, I’ll work with the General Assembly to finally enact term limits for all statewide elected officials in Georgia.” This is part of a bigger effort that Perdue has led since 2015 to enact term limits. On his first day as a U.S. Senator, Perdue introduced a term limits bill. Now, it's time for Georgia to lead by example. The Georgia State Senate has already passed a bill calling for a constitutional convention to propose term limits at the federal level. Perdue fully supports this effort, in addition to term limits for all statewide elected officials. ### | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Perdue for Governor, Inc. P.O. Box 12077 Atlanta, GA 30355 USA

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
I’m writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America’s truckers are fed up wi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5chh8tm3tbehag7djcf9gos3pcmm4hh7h6tbu7g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn6c9jmgp7ec5jm5p3eohh65ibct1gcipb0pdheuqn4dr2marmcsrn6ep3edlgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6lj33d5lmdjr4cr661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5imapb3c5j6coh5u)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zro7kv4d23eemeq2h3j74kh4c9p7mg448ajl7dp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs)
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znaa45u6imscmji4tcmmfqd6dusibjhsqpkgf19g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z839cqnaan6c79e54nrsaerur46csfu5jh1c4b30_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaj79n41hr34m6nd18fmqlf06tm2b3joqil7qn3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsn9rrd8koojl8veah4bgsh2squh285q7ugklnso_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoknnq90skje21ubfrrn2mq9mlvd9l23apvl1dcg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**

**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2m9eu9n8ih8rbe84lrlqmr7harnqkplrlaqok7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6c3iksrsg1mha1sbca0u4staf9q7k98svfn0vuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqhot5k0nvr5iu6on05k67ev6nm0gh6dmh177a7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znqrvshqtu1ifr5d9ufrn3u5ta801bolo7gqcp20_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clim6ob6cph2bs "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

---

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: I’m supporting a stock trade ban for members of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
Today, I’m joining others in calling for conflicted trading to be banned in Congress.

| For far too long, members of Congress have used classified information to help them make _millions_ off stock market trading.

It’s disgraceful. No politician should get to abuse their power like this while working families are struggling to make ends meet.

Today, I’m joining others in calling for conflicted trading to be banned in Congress. [Sign on if you agree→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42106564/331652903/983204170?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220222_2_1&refcode2=&contactdata=RCjmFVL7Q4VRm6uTtfbD6HDtqrmami3H%2BrDThvWUuM%2FEVoHlOSjS%2BwhOnHoampX5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzU3MTE2Ny0xNDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xa0Qq69KQ-4PI24D4We4lSk8kKT-K7XjG7y_3nX8Uhg=&emci=68571167-1494-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6c571167-1494-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529) | | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42106565/331652904/983204170?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220222_2_1&refcode2=&contactdata=RCjmFVL7Q4VRm6uTtfbD6HDtqrmami3H%2BrDThvWUuM%2FEVoHlOSjS%2BwhOnHoampX5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzU3MTE2Ny0xNDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xa0Qq69KQ-4PI24D4We4lSk8kKT-K7XjG7y_3nX8Uhg=&emci=68571167-1494-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6c571167-1494-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)
---
I’m not seeking public office to make my net worth grow – I’m doing this because I care about making our community a better place for our kids.

It’s shameful to see how even in times of economic downturn, like when the pandemic first hit, our representatives were raking in millions instead of focusing on helping American families bounce back.

**That’s no way to lead our communities forward, and I’m tired of seeing members of Congress prioritize themselves over the people.**

[In order to make sure our elected officials are truly working in the people’s best interest, I hope you’ll join me today in supporting a ban on conflicted stock trading→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42106566/331652905/983204170?refcode=AA_EM_PT_3MO_220222_2_1&refcode2=&contactdata=RCjmFVL7Q4VRm6uTtfbD6HDtqrmami3H%2BrDThvWUuM%2FEVoHlOSjS%2BwhOnHoampX5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzU3MTE2Ny0xNDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xa0Qq69KQ-4PI24D4We4lSk8kKT-K7XjG7y_3nX8Uhg=&emci=68571167-1494-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6c571167-1494-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6125529)

Thank you for taking action,

Dr. Annie

body:
Team,
It’s 2:22 pm on 2/22/22 – do you have 2 minutes to talk?

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: Let me explain, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
But our work is far from over – and we know that.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Tammy Duckworth.
I’m up for re-election and _**asking for whatever support you can spare,**_ but I wanted to take the time to reach out and explain _why_ I’m running for re-election.
When I was a kid, the company my dad worked for was sold. He lost his job and my family was eventually forced onto public assistance. My brother and I relied on reduced-price meals at our public school and we used food stamps—until they ran out towards the end of the month—to put dinner on the table. It was tough, and we probably wouldn’t have made it through without government support.
So when Senator Durbin encouraged me to run for public office, I dove right in to advocate for Veterans and working families. It’s been the honor of my life to serve alongside Senator Durbin and work for Illinoisans every day.
Now, as too many families in Illinois and across the country are struggling with higher costs and wages that aren’t keeping up, Senator Durbin and I are working for cheaper prescription drugs, more affordable health care and more support.
In the past year, we’ve made great progress with critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan, the bipartisan infrastructure law, and more. **But our work is far from over – and we know that**.
**[Can I count on you to split a contribution of $5 between my campaign and Senator Durbin’s right now to help us keep fiercely advocating for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42106885/331653953/-1143369271?refcode=dd_em_220222_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDk3MTc4MS0xNTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_iwhIpAKfcgTictXvOD52iTYyH9w72uVYPl9ywx4Uo=)**
Especially now, your support means a world of difference.
Thank you,
Tammy Duckworth

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42106886/331653954/-1143369271?refcode=dd_em_220222_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDk3MTc4MS0xNTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_iwhIpAKfcgTictXvOD52iTYyH9w72uVYPl9ywx4Uo=)****

| Friend,
While a major drug crisis continues rage across our country due to our open southern border, Biden wants to hand out CRACK PIPES. Yes, that's right. Biden wants to use your tax dollars to fuel the drug use and addiction that puts money in the pockets of cartels.
Even worse, more and more footage is being found showing thousands of single, adult men being released into our country by plane, train, and automobile. Biden is shipping in more and more migrants into our nation with YOUR tax dollars, and they're certainly not the "children and families" he claims they are.
You can always count on me to fight for stronger border security in Congress. [With your support, I can continue to do my part in helping take back the House and finally end Biden's border crisis.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CnU8RaIZ3SSP-7lMvEp53GYvgtoPvKkCxY9mAnGFyDIaMH4WctwE2KVshkKIexd6wcdcwtNMDngutRVX9BQ5KcOk8YWv_yvZjzbrlFeufkDrbSxFiHW2dDP1v_rC7cc3b6aoHv5bpIqE2sB9dWsY5XynnF9s9YjLHmodlbnMTk2FoTM6fnrsGfSrQbkwRHJeKney5qkFFH8CXlyBNRMbIQ==&c=aPp3NLL6NfX6xvgM3wM9mUO9mjQIOXHKRkN_oT3HGAzKQzb0KTf6mA==&ch=CLt9qJbjMAlBCcC7xZiQDPjwfXJfCTjsVSIEvf10evgvNB9u1Bq__A==)

Peter – thanks for not scrolling away. I know this isn't my first time in your inbox, but I wanted to make sure you understand exactly how important our campaign here in Iowa is.
**You see, Sen. Grassley has been my senator for my entire life. I've watched as, under his "leadership," families like mine were left behind and the good-paying jobs that were once in abundance trickled away.** That's what happens when the people in Washington don't fight for the people they were elected to serve.
**Iowa needs to show Sen. Grassley the door, and Democrats need to expand our Senate majority if we want any chance of moving our country forward for working class families. **
Luckily, this election year, we have a real shot to do both. Right now, Sen. Grassley is showing weakness in his poll numbers, per a top Iowa pollster. He's facing record-low approval ratings, and only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect him.
This is our chance to flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority, but I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without you. clean_body: FOR: PETER WILLIS | Authorized by Republican Headquarters There’s an issue, Peter. We have been reviewing our Official Trump Supporter Records, and it appears that your record is OUTDATED. But that can’t be right... can it, Peter? You told us that you would never abandon President Trump! | | Do you agree that President Donald J. Trump remains the Leader of the Republican Party? | | | | Don’t wait, Peter. There’s no time! Donald J. Trump Alerts

| Friends, ICYMI, read the latest Op-Ed by Senate President Chuck Morse and Senate Majority Leader Jeb Bradley about the NH Senate Republicans' priorities for the 2022 session![
](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODkxMzU2MTE3MjE3MzE4OTA1JmM9ZjhlMSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTg0MjM4ODQmZD1uM2MzcTBi.XIUGB_0bvqYvxE3ibtO0K85v7D4hkjJmjeJlm2Qi2OY) [>> Chip in $5 to NH Senate Republicans (secure online link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODkxMzU2MTE3MjE3MzE4OTA1JmM9ZjhlMSZlPTE5MjgmYj05MTg0MjM4ODcmZD15NWU4bjJh.toEfE5SHlrLol0TKjCgCe-mzS7tOQ4ydCsfpahDuFVw) Thank you, NH Senate Republicans
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Chuck Morse and Jeb Bradley: Senate will focus on the needs of working families** “AS WE START the new legislative session, the people of New Hampshire can count on Republicans to focus on the issues that matter most to our working families and Main Street businesses. We’re living in serious times and serious times deserve real action. That’s why Republicans plan to deliver conservative, common-sense legislation that will continue to move New Hampshire forward, building on the strong gains we made in 2021. We know that the New Hampshire Advantage works. We’ve long been ranked one of the safest states in the nation, often #1 overall according to FBI data. U.S. News & World Report ranked us the top state for economic opportunity. We often top the annual rankings of most livable states. We have the lowest poverty rate, and recently reached our pre-pandemic unemployment rate of 2.6%, one of the lowest in the country. Recently, the Cato Institute again named New Hampshire the freest state in the nation. We are proud of the work we did last year to pass a balanced budget that meets the needs of New Hampshire’s most vulnerable populations. In responding to the unprecedented needs of the COVID-19 pandemic, we protected public health while preventing the economic and budget collapses experienced by other states. Thanks in part to our pro-jobs budget, New Hampshire has now returned to the low unemployment rate of 2.6% that we had prior to the pandemic. We expanded school choice for working families, protected unborn children from late-term abortions, and increased capacity for those struggling with opioid addiction and mental health challenges. This year, Republicans intend to concentrate on issues that will have the greatest and the most positive impacts on the lives of New Hampshire citizens. This means keeping people safe as the COVID-19 pandemic remains with us, continuing to strengthen our economy, protecting taxpayer dollars, improving educational opportunities, continuing to invest in mental health, and ensuring honest elections. Because of our fiscally responsible budget, New Hampshire’s economy is growing and that has led to a projected budget surplus. The current budget delivers a record amount of per-pupil state education aid and a record amount of revenue sharing with cities and towns under the Rooms and Meals Tax. We are hoping this year to direct some of the projected surplus to local school districts. In the fall of 2020, New Hampshire voters sent a clear message that they did not want higher property taxes and a new state income tax proposed by the Democrats. Senate Republicans kept their promise to stop any new broad-based tax and provided over $300 million in property tax relief to New Hampshire families. In 2022, we plan to continue down the road of lower taxes so that working families can keep more of their hard-earned money. We will oppose spending proposals that would necessitate an income tax, sales tax, capital gains tax or any new taxes, as well as any schemes to bring back donor towns. Our new school choice program, Education Freedom Accounts, has been a huge success with 1,800 New Hampshire families taking advantage of the need-based scholarships to provide educational options for their children. We will fight efforts to repeal this program or to drown it in bureaucratic red tape. School choice is important to New Hampshire parents, and we’re listening to them. Likewise, we will protect the right of parents to speak up at local school board meetings. Protecting public safety is one of our most important responsibilities. This year, we will fix our state’s bail system to prevent violent criminals from further harming the public and ensure that they are not released on bail before even going before a judge. New Hampshire’s elections are the gold standard for the nation, and we will continue to protect their integrity. This means ensuring that our elections are reserved for New Hampshire residents, updating and improving absentee ballots applications, updating and clarifying our campaign finance limits, and creating an election portal to enhance voters’ access to election information. As New Hampshire families struggle to keep up with inflation, we will work to make health insurance more affordable, lower the cost of electricity and home heating, and protect families from new taxes and fees. Senate Republicans will continue to deliver on the promises we made to New Hampshire, and reward the trust they placed in us. Senate President Chuck Morse (R-Salem) represents District 22. Senate Majority Leader Jeb Bradley (R- Wolfeboro) represents District 3.”

---
| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013RPDCRpUSIPzyU5KOw0RREx_X7zcCyG_4dnlXH0ohuC_-xBDN-aHvvaG9fMMZwcc3JfOJlJS5X6eC9WN71Vu8hqBCskTBrKSZbq7QiSBV-M1pOtImFII2p6ZcCelo7WDblSVH-zeDEMG_3H_foS88dFq8bGWwOJK_GLFiCtgz6olTYGxwb9s5NV8nALO3wik&c=yUobeG5-ogmPwc4ZzZkavyNHtbAZlHft0tmrXMOHurm5sTdhn8lmlQ==&ch=6JmBX3c3LUrU9T7SqsknCOoJQKCRrpK8sp7tW-7MEwaIqQA9FvDY8A==)

##

## We need a leader who is not part of the "good old boy" club. We need to disrupt the status quo.
##

Socialist policies like "wealth redistribution" and "central planning" have gained a solid foothold in Idaho. Too many Republicans who campaigned as "conservatives" have run a political game of "socialism-lite". Idahoans need a governor that will stand firm in the face of federal tyranny and uphold the values that made America great.
Ed shares the alarm of those who see individual freedoms being erased in the name of collective good. Nowhere has this been clearer than in the state Covid-19 lockdowns where the state liquor stores were essential, but churches were shut down; where big box stores stayed open, but the small "Mom and Pop" stores were shuttered.
---

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

clean_body: Debate or get out. | | | | | | | February 21, 2022 | | | | There is only one option in the Republican Primary if you want real change. | == | If you are sick of career politicians, please donate RIGHT NOW to this campaign! | | == | We need a leader who is not part of the "good old boy" club. We need to disrupt the status quo. Socialist policies like "wealth redistribution" and "central planning" have gained a solid foothold in Idaho. Too many Republicans who campaigned as "conservatives" have run a political game of "socialism-lite". Idahoans need a governor that will stand firm in the face of federal tyranny and uphold the values that made America great. Ed shares the alarm of those who see individual freedoms being erased in the name of collective good. Nowhere has this been clearer than in the state Covid-19 lockdowns where the state liquor stores were essential, but churches were shut down; where big box stores stayed open, but the small "Mom and Pop" stores were shuttered. | | == | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | February 15 - Emmett, ID Idaho is the last foxhole for the American Dream. We can be a state that celebrates == and rewards hard work. Thank you == for hosting us! | | | | February 16 - Idaho Falls, ID Do not play politics! name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Do you know what is coming across the border?
body:
America’s growing border crisis threatens our country. While “leadership” in Washington is fenced off and guarded, our southern border is unmanned and free to cross.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001izCxKwMhjuYY9q-P85bv0agGScyA648JQ5WIWtXOVPqsG96nI_xlDo69j7LFzSWgd17sB-InVpn-sXntMnjsND5VDiRcIkqMWj1c1pPUpm9bQJXNr5ASF0dMhNNVKIoNGr0JgqjUgLgdz8f6vAwaxkAF7zZ2K4INE16EvsbmKQlnJ_XMtB7phw==&c=-Iv7Dx2OqeoKeUTGmp0TOOxGHFgyc4VPcawhOlqQ9zYp1lsQ7aHlwA==&ch=flqWBGO35Mjn9arLOyinZMre1npeCjGWAPKhjAIv7-KkFlzZeQEpmQ==)
---
| Peter,
America's growing border crisis threatens our country. While "leadership" in Washington is fenced off and guarded, our southern border is unmanned and free to cross.
Joe Biden is directly responsible for the crisis at our southern border.
Instead of enforcing our borders, he stopped building the wall started under President Trump. The wall would have kept you safe. Instead, illegal immigration is out-of-control.
[Biden's border crisis puts America in danger, drains taxpayer-funded government programs, and threatens American sovereignty. Will you help me fight back? Click here to end Biden's border crisis >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001izCxKwMhjuYY9q-P85bv0agGScyA648JQ5WIWtXOVPqsG96nI_xlDo69j7LFzSWgd17sB-InVpn-sXntMnjsND5VDiRcIkqMWj1c1pPUpm9bQJXNr5ASF0dMhNNVKIoNGr0JgqjUgLgdz8f6vAwaxkAF7zZ2K4INE16EvsbmKQlnJ_XMtB7phw==&c=-Iv7Dx2OqeoKeUTGmp0TOOxGHFgyc4VPcawhOlqQ9zYp1lsQ7aHlwA==&ch=flqWBGO35Mjn9arLOyinZMre1npeCjGWAPKhjAIv7-KkFlzZeQEpmQ==)
Biden's border crisis creates problems all over the country.
Biden's border crisis undermines all attempts to control the opioid epidemic\-- as there is an influx of illicit drugs at our border. The use and abuse of opioids affect millions of Ohioans. It destroys lives, families, and communities in every corner of our state.
Biden's border crisis has also led to increased human trafficking. This is modern-day slavery and an injustice that must stop. Humans should not be sold and traded because Washington liberals don't want to address the truth of a crisis they created.
Peter, I am a real conservative who will no longer allow Biden to ignore the border crisis.
Will you help me take back the Senate and stop the Biden border crisis? Please click below to support our campaign?

clean_body: This is crunch time, people. | | | = TLDR: We only have 7 DAYS until the primary election. Jessica Mason is the only candidate in this race who is not afraid to boldly champion real policy solutions for our underserved undocumented community. = If you've saved payment with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through instantly: = = IT IS OFFICIALLY OUR LAST WEEK OF THIS RACE. This is urgent. Our campaign is on our last leg. All of our money is going into this final GOTV push which consists of us aggressively reaching out to voters, leaving no stone unturned, and ensuring that everyone in this distrct has a voice and uses it at the polls one week from today. If our GOTV efforts are successful in this FINAL week, we will turnout enough blue voters to win this primary and elect Jessica Mason as the Democratic nominee. If we fall short and have to scale back due to lack of resources, our chances at winning drastically drop, and our hopes at electing the only true progressive for TX-30 will be gone. That means our shot at passing a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, $15 minimum wage -- and more bold policies \-- will remain in the hands of status quo corporate-backed politicians. Everything comes down to these REMAINING 7 DAYS , and we need to work harder than we ever have before if we're going to break this cycle of out-of-touch leaders and put someone in office who will ALWAYS serve her community above all else. That means we need all hands (including yours) on deck immediately. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **********=******** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** Let's make these last 7 days count! From growing up poor and housing insecure, to enlisting in the Navy to complete her college degree, to working in public housing administration -- Jessica has witnessed firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that ineffective leadership has caused for the people and the communities she loves. Jessica Mason is a bold, progressive champion with a true working-class background, and she's the fearless voice we need representing TX-30 in Congress because she's brave enough to demand better for the everyday people who are struggling in this country. = ____= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |
