name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Bill McSwain Pledges To Oppose Any and All Tax Increases As Governor
body:
Bill McSwain has signed the ATR pledge to oppose tax increases as Governor. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-pledges-to-oppose-any-and-all-tax-increases-as-governor?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**February 22, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain Pledges To Oppose Any and All Tax Increases As Governor
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, today announced that he has signed the Taxypayer Protection Pledge, through which McSwain promises to oppose any and all tax increases as Governor. McSwain is the only PA gubernatorial candidate to have signed the pledge.

McSwain had this to say about his decision to sign the pledge:
---
|
> **_"For too long, hardworking Pennsylvanians have been burdened with the reckless spending and unnecessary overreach of a bloated state government. There is no such thing as Government money - there is only the people's money. As Governor, I will work to be a careful steward of taxpayer dollars by cutting wasteful spending and lowering taxes so families and businesses can prosper again. I am proud to take the Taxpayer Protection Pledge - Pennsylvanians deserve nothing less." _**
---
|
---
|
---
| Since its inception in 1986, the Taxpayer Protection Pledge pledge, distributed by Americans for Tax Reform, has been offered to every candidate for state and federal office and to all incumbents. Nearly 1,400 elected officials, from state representative to governor to US Senator, have signed the Pledge. More information about the pledge is [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=01860e6045&e=b1ec95759b).
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=d5d82c2fbd&e=b1ec95759b)
###

body:
Election integrity means making your vote count

| | | | | | |

| Dear Friend,
The Radical Left continues to have their way and Colorado residents are sick and tired of being told how to live their day-to-day lives. To make matters worse, election integrity is in danger.
But I have the courage to protect our rights, both in our day-to-day lives and at the polls. I have the courage to demand that every voter is legally vetted to ensure that YOUR VOTE COUNTS.
It's important to keep Big Tech in their place. Upon being elected, I plan on immediately repealing Section 230 of the United States Communications Decency Act.
People have the right to express their thoughts and opinions on social media, not have their voice taken away by a "good samaritan." I'm counting on you to shield Colorado from policies that take away your liberties instead of preserving them.
Any generous donation will do. Let's keep Colorado great together! disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Dahm for Senate** ](https://em
body:
Peter, state guards and militias have a rich history in our nation, dating back to the Minutemen of times past. They were necessary in 1776...
| [ ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VW0Wd497lYsTW2Z9qsK98rWHgW8wLjj94FS-XZN1-yX_m3lLBmV1-WJV7CgQbBW4vWQpd3yDNMBW6Ny39b9h3knPW8W2F2S5w64gjW8cBfNk2GxBmMW70sq6w3JNFR5W2xyHRz5WRdzSW1sC-l44GMX90N3KLcp6xYPygW9lJNKs84Fw_sW2qdkLg9kD79kV-C0x95GHMylN4sp8_hbBVSPW7Q-WFM1BSrg7V19Jz58PBmwKW725ZpM73J80WW3CmXyJ5bnXZjW6vKfnl7SVQyCW9gC4s42lFxYwW6jqx2C6Tld6PW90Qtq88Q_Fg4W31-TYw3HP7S5N8vVwgB-Vpjf38dC1)

# Peter,

The radical socialists and establishment RINOs in the Oklahoma Senate rejected my proposal to reinstate the Oklahoma State Guard... State guards and militias have a rich history in our nation, dating back to the Minutemen of times past. They were necessary in 1776... and they are equally as necessary today. The Oklahoma State Guard is completely under state control. Unlike the National Guard, it cannot be federalized. [I won't stop fighting to protect Oklahomans from natural disasters, domestic threats, and the overreaching federal government, Peter, but I need all the support I can get. Click here to make an URGENT donation to my campaign today >>> ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VW0Wd497lYsTW2Z9qsK98rWHgW8wLjj94FS-XZN1-yX_m3lLBmV1-WJV7CgDfBW4tKdTk3zLH3bN6zDrn9qYDYsW94ySNy5DsNmfW1h998c2NfVjwW4TNhwh6v92dKW1ywLnH136dr4W94y6lB1GVxZKW1JFP3n4p5v-CW4qrl996MZBc3W6hPvF99lD9wsW4BJzzP3vc6DHW2fF1h32Fy_N8W10ZmGG85dWV1W4LtNK85pDpF5W4dbB1T4lJTd9W4NW4xf8rBTwKW4GQltN6BWTtdN2Zc3f0K3TQSW7zrydH1fZwS7W51zsXk77LxW3W140Q4f4Hfm4mVlylQm5W0pB232Xs1)
---
We can no longer afford to rely on the federal government for protection... It falls to us as citizens of Oklahoma to secure the blessing of liberty to our state. I have always fought, and will continue to fight, for the citizens of Oklahoma... even when others are unwilling. [Click here to chip in $50 or more to my campaign to show your support for reinstating the Oklahoma State Guard >>>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VW0Wd497lYsTW2Z9qsK98rWHgW8wLjj94FS-XZN1-yX_m3lLBmV1-WJV7CgQ0NW1xnrZm44PQPCVSsXYM8NlL3_W3_72pF4JBH1BW5VGRXQ5W1xD0W1sCb1q7-Ltc6W2-Tldm42vDQ7W7WWQLd4bvfdwW3PDZ9s8QsWc_W6khx4v87_Md-W22Ylbw677ZVhW4FtxtX7L2jytW18MyHt2k5lgrW7wll5j4txzB5W5_rhH25-MdJGW90bR2-1FMSZ0W60X51y7QYnlvW11YnZH1P9-TgW7m5kg998hTdLVtYfRD8zqyjZW7vlK_m7LPlkwW3y5W_T2CJK3_W1s-G-Z4SxXFM38Xz1) As elected leaders, it is our responsibility to protect the people we represent. The Marxist Democrats would prefer to watch our cities burn while the do-nothing RINOs take orders from the Washington machine. I will ALWAYS fight for you.
---

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
March 2nd we’re hitting the road.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpisrbm23ibrgh47kqj6ick7mt73vs2gt77h319o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfddpjmdh34t34eop3ao35ekoe9ddhe3im3d76mpqbfd9imhgn0splegpb8srle1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmccdgmmo6fdj1copb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu07j5i0rc73o9mdjh16avsnpkhb6hsif5g8u12g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs)
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqmqjpb4rvggknh6ekg5vjav0ngft9bgbqj7iav0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsppmhupa9uv5ppvoqhkj42ngan3ugcrvcpr08mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z045d7p3a7sh4k8hs6udajqm8autr57rpjo7e3sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zetct641tvlvr8gu1bk68but61bbcnqjhe1347q8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjma103u210mnvedgdk6sejq9ng39sppnrfrgkr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**

**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo2l4d5qs8ogvujjuqf55lb8domjvgvu4lsuaj1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znt8qd2rgt6vaj42ba8c69cq98j1cb9sbqo2s5o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zug4j31d0180c03mkj2cpova8kn82b2j1n1iod90_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv2e2deoarimdbi8bb17coredskkkpprk290emoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm0o34cjh2bs "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108286/331663461/-2096412469?refcode=20220222_em_fr_b1_denzel_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE2NzkzYS0xYzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nb9dCaY2OECQrJ8UXK8Jexf0jJrHdx6r7g20fRa-gNs=) Denzel is always ready to join me on the campaign trail and talk (or in his case, bark) to crucial voters in PA-18 about my campaign for Congress. But right now, we’re still $12,581 short of what we need to launch our field program across the district at the end of this month. [**_So I’m asking for your help to get us there. Will you chip in $27 to get our field program up and running? Denzel would really appreciate it! >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108287/331663462/-2096412469?refcode=20220222_em_fr_b1_denzel_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE2NzkzYS0xYzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nb9dCaY2OECQrJ8UXK8Jexf0jJrHdx6r7g20fRa-gNs=) | [Donate $27 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108288/331663463/-2096412469?refcode=20220222_em_fr_b1_denzel_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE2NzkzYS0xYzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nb9dCaY2OECQrJ8UXK8Jexf0jJrHdx6r7g20fRa-gNs=)
---
Running for Congress isn’t a walk in the park (in Denzel’s case, it actually is), but his companionship has kept me on my feet.
And when I talk to voters about the real and painful issues that face our community, Denzel helps me find joy in that pain.
That joy reminds me that we have a chance to build a better future and bring real leadership to the people of PA-18, and I promise that I’ll be that leader.
But to win this race, we need the funds to build up our field program and get it off the ground so I can:
* Connect with and talk to every voter across the district.
* Hire a top-tier team of field organizers to help grow our grassroots outreach.
* Print campaign materials to hand out to voters.
* And make sure our volunteers have all the supplies they need while knocking on doors!

Denzel is really counting on us to hit this goal so he can get out on the campaign trail and help his dad become the Representative our community deserves.
[**_Please, will you do your part and chip in $27 to help us launch our field program? I’ll let Denzel know you did! >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108289/331663464/-2096412469?refcode=20220222_em_fr_b1_denzel_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE2NzkzYS0xYzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nb9dCaY2OECQrJ8UXK8Jexf0jJrHdx6r7g20fRa-gNs=)

But members of Congress shouldn't be investing in individual corporate stocks. Why not? 1) Members of Congress often have access to confidential, even top secret, information. 2) Members of Congress have the power to influence how federal dollars are spent on specific causes, projects, and even contractors. The public needs to know that their representatives are working for them – not using their power to make themselves rich _or_ make their rich friends richer. Peter, DeSantis and his GOP allies aren’t pulling any punches. Just yesterday, the Senate appropriations committee reviewed the GOP’s 15-week abortion ban, and just as we expected, Republicans ignored HOURS of testimony from Floridians and went all in on taking away women’s rights. But the crazy doesn’t stop there. Today, the Florida House will review the so-called “Stop WOKE Act” and the “Don’t Say Gay” bill. And we wish we could tell you that the GOP might see sense and stand against these bigoted and hateful bills, but we all know that’s not the case. **For months now, Floridians have made it clear that they don’t want DeSantis’ radical, authoritarian agenda hurting our students, attacking our freedom, and taking away our rights. And for months, DeSantis has made it clear that he doesn’t give a damn about what we think. ** [**But it doesn’t have to be this way. With your help, we can elect a Governor who improves our children’s education, instead of filling it with hate — a Governor who uplifts women’s rights, instead of dragging us back 50 years. name: Nina Turner
subject: Student loan debt should not exist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
I was a first-generation college student myself
#

Hello Somebody!
As a Cuyahoga Community College graduate and professor, I’ve seen first-hand the transformative power of a college education to open doors and change lives — both as a student and as an educator.
And it’s because of that experience that I say this: we must cancel student loan debt and make college tuition-free. I’ll explain more in a minute, but if you’re already on board, **please use this link to say you support canceling student debt:**
**[https://go.ninaturner.com/a/cancel-student-debt](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108483/331664464/819857746?refcode2=2b34ac72-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220222-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjM0YWM3Mi0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ann9kBNY-3AAuJROewwd3TCmFeKDduXGi2KTBpNvzbQ=&emci=24fe9083-1a94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2b34ac72-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12102799)**
Here’s the deal — I was a first-generation college student myself. I understand just how much of a burden the cost of tuition can be, particularly when you have other expenses or a family to support.
And it is a tragedy to me that so many young people are being forced to give up on their dream of a college education because it’s too expensive and they don’t want to be saddled with a lifetime of debt.
For decades, Americans — particularly Black and brown Americans — have been told that a college education is the way to a better life. But for too many people, going down that path requires taking out thousands of dollars in student loans.
20 years after graduation, the average white student owes $1,000. The average Black student owes $18,500.
_It doesn’t have to be like this. Right now, President Biden has the authority to cancel student debt with a stroke of his pen._
**Canceling student debt will jump-start our economy, help close the racial wealth gap in this country, and ensure that all of our young people are able to get the education they need without going into life-altering debt.**
**[So I’m calling on President Biden to do it, and I’m asking you to join me. Will you add your name to my petition and urge President Biden to cancel ALL student debt?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108490/331664468/819857746?refcode2=2b34ac72-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220222-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjM0YWM3Mi0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ann9kBNY-3AAuJROewwd3TCmFeKDduXGi2KTBpNvzbQ=&emci=24fe9083-1a94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2b34ac72-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12102799)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108496/331664477/819857746?refcode2=2b34ac72-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220222-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjM0YWM3Mi0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ann9kBNY-3AAuJROewwd3TCmFeKDduXGi2KTBpNvzbQ=&emci=24fe9083-1a94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2b34ac72-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12102799)**
Thank you for reading my story, and for joining me in this fight. Even if you yourself do not have student debt, I hope you’ll sign on behalf of your friends and neighbors who do.
With these hands, we WILL cancel student debt.
\- Nina Turner

* * *
Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
---
Nina Turner for Us
PO Box 91956
Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/24fe9083-1a94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/2b34ac72-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjM0YWM3Mi0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ann9kBNY-3AAuJROewwd3TCmFeKDduXGi2KTBpNvzbQ=&id=113311558) to unsubscribe.

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District. If you no longer wish to receive emails, you can[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/19cff066-1b94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/0e792145-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MjE0NS0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yS79iimyDKBMW_CKmeUa6IZWsqL1RSqaG9ND_P2Ikd0=&id=109963173). _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108465/331664228/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MjE0NS0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yS79iimyDKBMW_CKmeUa6IZWsqL1RSqaG9ND_P2Ikd0=&emci=19cff066-1b94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0e792145-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=7878003)
Four years ago, a gunman used an AR-15 to murder 17 people and injure 17 more at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High in Parkland, Florida. It was one of the deadliest school shootings in history. Since 2018, there have been 102 school shootings in which at least one person was injured or killed since 2018. **_One hundred and two._** This is the dangerous reality our children are forced to live in. That’s why we’re taking a stand and joining others to collect signatures demanding Congress take action and ban assault weapons like the AR-15 used in Parkland. [**Will you join us in honoring the victims and survivors of Marjory Stoneman Douglas High, and all the school shootings since, by adding your name to our petition?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108466/331664229/135237620?source=direct_link&refcode=E14004-20220214-ParklandJA-ESCA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MjE0NS0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yS79iimyDKBMW_CKmeUa6IZWsqL1RSqaG9ND_P2Ikd0=&emci=19cff066-1b94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0e792145-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=7878003) | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108467/331664230/135237620?source=direct_link&refcode=E14004-20220214-ParklandJA-ESCA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MjE0NS0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yS79iimyDKBMW_CKmeUa6IZWsqL1RSqaG9ND_P2Ikd0=&emci=19cff066-1b94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0e792145-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=7878003)

Eric has made it his mission to put a stop to gun violence in America once and for all. In 2019, he introduced the _Freedom from Assault Weapons Act_ which would ban certain assault weapons and high-capacity magazines. Since then he has signed on to 18 other pieces of gun violence prevention legislation.
**But while Eric and his fellow Democrats in Congress are working to end the violence that has become a part of our daily lives, key legislation languishes and dies on the Senate floor due to the gun lobby's hold on the GOP. **
**_Enough is enough. _**
Our collective voice _can _be stronger than the GOP and their gun lobby donors. It’s time for all of us to stand and honor the victims of Marjory Stoneman Douglas High by demanding meaningful legislation from Congress.
[**So today we’re taking a stand to do just that. Please take a moment to join us by adding your name to ours so we can ensure this work continues >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108468/331664231/135237620?source=direct_link&refcode=E14004-20220214-ParklandJA-ESCA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MjE0NS0xZDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yS79iimyDKBMW_CKmeUa6IZWsqL1RSqaG9ND_P2Ikd0=&emci=19cff066-1b94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0e792145-1d94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=7878003)

clean_body: Peter, I saw firsthand the d evastation that Russia was capable of when I served as an intelligence officer in Ukraine. People lived every day in fear that their homes would be destroyed and their country would be invaded. But Joe Biden is taking a nap while Russia gets stronger every day. We can’t trust our President to act, so we need strong Republicans in Congress who will keep America safe. Joe Biden’s weakness is TERRIFYING, Peter. Our Commander in Chief should be an example of America-first strength - not a doormat for our adversaries. I was never afraid of our enemies in the army, and I’m not afraid of them now. Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Team Kilmer
subject: Sign on to support democracy reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Bumping this important message from Derek, Peter.

The future of American democracy is on the ballot this year, and we need to take immediate action to protect it. We need legislation that will safeguard our democracy by restoring checks and balances, protecting voting rights, and rooting out corruption in Washington D.C.

[**Add your name to tell Congress we need to reform our democracy now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VCVVang9yqNtENt0TpGp-o_qsDLpHFaRPpjXp-UGyAY=/xD2mQeSYGVQp1ojQQ0JdexyfON4VkkrxPuIwdr5FUeI=)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Derek Kilmer
Date: Fri, Feb 18, 2022
Subject: Will you sign on to support democracy reform?
Team,

Our democracy is sacred, and it's our responsibility to protect it. But the past years have shown us that our democracy is not guaranteed. That's why I'm fighting to preserve it every day in Congress.

Former President Trump tried to undermine our democracy at every turn, and far too many of his colleagues looked the other way even when Trump's actions threatened our democracy. Now, voting rights are under attack like never before, and our elections are still flooded with cash from dark money groups.

[**Our democracy will always be worth fighting for, and we need to take steps to ensure its preservation for generations to come. Will you add your name to tell Congress we need democracy reform now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/VCVVang9yqNtENt0TpGp-o_qsDLpHFaRPpjXp-UGyAY=/xD2mQeSYGVQp1ojQQ0JdexyfON4VkkrxPuIwdr5FUeI=)

It's simple: there's been too much money, too many special interests, and too little accountability in Washington, D.C. That's why I voted to pass the For the People Act, to end the influence of big money in our elections.

We need to restore the checks and balances to our government and put some teeth behind the rules intended to prevent corruption. That's why I was proud to vote to pass the Protecting Our Democracy Act in the House.

And we need to make sure that the voices - and the votes - of the American people are not stifled in our democracy. That's why I voted for the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act.

No matter who the president is, we need to restore the guardrails of our democracy, preserve voting rights, and get big money out of politics to protect our democracy.

[**Sign on to our petition now to send a message to Congress that it 's time to support democracy reform >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/VCVVang9yqNtENt0TpGp-o_qsDLpHFaRPpjXp-UGyAY=/xD2mQeSYGVQp1ojQQ0JdexyfON4VkkrxPuIwdr5FUeI=)

Thank you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/VCVVang9yqNtENt0TpGp-o_qsDLpHFaRPpjXp-UGyAY=/QdG6mqMnrIHer8OFiTWp2wOvcGsunB7n33vUyfDhGBw=?refcode=em22_220221_pod2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220221_pod2_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VCVVang9yqNtENt0TpGp-o_qsDLpHFaRPpjXp-UGyAY=/PPJ-YxaGUz35qvnCgjCl5w-niBMuM73Msy53ybzXY6U=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VCVVang9yqNtENt0TpGp-o_qsDLpHFaRPpjXp-UGyAY=/cIVXufZhz-OW3gMgxt2xsq5JJLX2Y4PdlC8LL1aZtm4=)
---|---

Tacoma WA 98402 United States

subject: Protecting Texas' Children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 22, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 22, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Thanks to Ken Paxton, sex-change operations and puberty blockers prescribed to kids is “child abuse” under Texas law. These procedures are monstrous and tragic. Ken Paxton will do everything in his power to hold anyone who harms or takes advantage of young Texans accountable.

**Link: [https://www.kvue.com/article/news/politics/ken-paxton-child-modification-abuse-opinion/269-7115bb89-be34-4a9d-a79e-fb09ec87e52b](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=ad3071d490364eeca57eaca6b149b750&_e=sxu_ICPYjUlPDOJ8ZP7I_8Qj0tkWCcPVV5E7U8wHc0Ccra61Ip2H-sRTQxkjpsYyilIDoy5F3JEy3T9IhcEOfupIVrmkrtRFANHVMq_d1M9MS-PkJyjQr-AamhhNpCfvbxS3hcDN9dbGpio54Li-BI7qFwboeZ5Xn69WQcnxxWf8-kTRVRLplb-r2FWOh-1A6edgoOs5YRRgEiA5fsyQbqcxA1Hry6tHIctk-32Eer5dXZPJKnQGusaGCQpdscJFKDVBjT9gMdsutEpmViCfYJRS5pNi9fk0y7NIRQDXUE6ktVy8Ql6C7bE_vMaThayutJbzw5a_d8_ECBCBWJR-4JGzisodbj-KuvPU763VtrOiMCcnF2nVQ0VgsU_w-zh7kFI1-5AwFm7liqr-O3QYvg%3D%3D)**

**Theme of the Day: Protecting Texas' Children**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Yesterday, Ken Paxton issued an opinion that certain child gender modification procedures such as puberty blockers and other medical procedures to change a child’s gender should be treated as abuse. Banning these dangerous procedures is crucial for protecting Texas children. Ken Paxton will continue to do everything in his power to protect our children from abuse.

~ Ken Paxton joined 13 other Attorneys General in calling for Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to resign due to the ongoing crisis at the southern border. Ken Paxton will continue to hold Joe Biden and his reckless administration accountable for their refusal to follow our immigration laws.

~ Thanks to Texas' "Heartbeat Bill" to protect the unborn, abortion procedures in Texas are declining rapidly. Ken Paxton will continue to defend this bill and any other pro-life legislation that protects the sanctity of life in the Lone Star State.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=ad3071d490364eeca57eaca6b149b750&_e=sxu_ICPYjUlPDOJ8ZP7I_yUuCM9tNKJG4xD19GJSSxREp-lUM_-sSrDBDguO8u20VT-K256g6j_rXOQPihIRV5uaV95ulD2iP2Kpz2HiO5OE_FCpUKnFTR3bF24X5_inKtOPyaEFWiy9ZYRtXERQytLeZfswG24Scpdsz1UYZe_sXEr3W9wFarNcgYItPdckRLdHYImzu-becZGXcD_WgWxBzxE1JS4R_e8xCh7uIn_t-Ow7IjX6BXZoGhDnrPkwik51q_6535-w0Qpn8kN8ng%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=ad3071d490364eeca57eaca6b149b750&_e=sxu_ICPYjUlPDOJ8ZP7I_yUuCM9tNKJG4xD19GJSSxREp-lUM_-sSrDBDguO8u20yDP3o7IUNkaG_lqugivMVM8Sezbw5Ejq67s89Apgh4KEqmUjIrw-kVYmLLElv8g6iLFdLk9TMJzCjdMn7FTraOBOvA2tt-0veFf7WVfvkgbppyYKR6TpijUULetBbNWKWz6fOpYNz0JLohJVwsLwgn4CK6DkOKrEsqfkMzIt_-1ScGFxK0RiVNsVYwFZi7Y-wRU-extyXPOlpWr_f9JxDw%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=ad3071d490364eeca57eaca6b149b750&_e=sxu_ICPYjUlPDOJ8ZP7I_yUuCM9tNKJG4xD19GJSSxREp-lUM_-sSrDBDguO8u20W1E1YLVim77iM-NkMWCirwkaoP91UiZU7QljvsIPwF8DYOUxURlL2NFMf5jDH0HVEk10IjkwWgkXAlXSZKbq5RTJLKpY5u-xhmgW8_9kTPF99vyR8m_2Ss6VqaJuRBVSIn9P9vcBwFmJs4Uwn-zpYSbCVvKaq1XITroxXWE0FRVI7NplTr1wNshw-5d7sKp1Vk4Los6XCnkXwi7uME5nMQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 22, 2022 | Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 22, 2022 Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: Post: Thanks to Ken Paxton, sex-change operations and puberty blockers prescribed to kids is “child abuse” under Texas law. These procedures are monstrous and tragic. Ken Paxton will do everything in his power to hold anyone who harms or takes advantage of young Texans accountable. Link: Theme of the Day: Protecting Texas' Children As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Yesterday, Ken Paxton issued an opinion that certain child gender modification procedures such as puberty blockers and other medical procedures to change a child’s gender should be treated as abuse. Banning these dangerous procedures is crucial for protecting Texas children. Ken Paxton will continue to do everything in his power to protect our children from abuse. ~ Ken Paxton joined 13 other Attorneys General in calling for Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas to resign due to the ongoing crisis at the southern border. Ken Paxton will continue to hold Joe Biden and his reckless administration accountable for their refusal to follow our immigration laws. ~ Thanks to Texas' "Heartbeat Bill" to protect the unborn, abortion procedures in Texas are declining rapidly. Ken Paxton will continue to defend this bill and any other pro-life legislation that protects the sanctity of life in the Lone Star State. We encourage you to with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates | | Pol. Adv. Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign Copyright © 2021 Ken Paxton Campaign.

name: John James
subject: Why Washington is so broken

body:
Let’s get this country back to sanity! Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_t=I8-YziEo6H9kB51aYWtaGOdtOM860Zkk-5W61Z75aw46UK4Ax6s6GSrrnXtWAuYOwwMyiFxdaTuXLkJzUhSqOwh8G9WE94n8Rp9kD7iODbCVg-h1URZp6T8pamox8Qben0o9g6w49qwB0DeLvjcw32F6xMSTOkToOsQT-uy55A4%3D) **🇺🇸 JOIN JOHN JAMES FOR MICHIGAN 🇺🇸** _Become a Co-Pilot Today >> _ [**LET’S FLY!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6cRu2pk7jPgMa71vDMkB7ZTlX-XJafuY4XNCsFsXzPuztjYDbFSzS_2ztwBbZpb5O_Qg3OUAK81tz8LAq1XGjHoVG7IkOh6aSilIlIvgMnbIoJe3itKUNszTxMHWXaqrtQ_sDshVIWOsqiyJ-femiZSbMz2HBewIVV51eBWlyoricYje-53SqRSorMMyfdPJUaqpdL6U7GxzN-T9jQvRNj-ugdN9g6PMossHFAXjvaR6) [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6dz6tZPJ77JVlSg2OPbZmjc6KnANInRJWhcNxB5OlOafsdbCSUFTEE4PdJCTvTYTnHadEm0zEakyUjWYM2hcIjHDGt6gunuwGl_yaQmZHrjcyolKVodN0RX1G46KS9cEeZ6lVZdxVOKSu-CQFReWyc2G8QxQaHubtPDqFqCFed7E3VPOs1P5bJgFljsNMaCJs373Vq8MMZdkwHfoWylaGlGNNG8d7QQCP-1myWZuLgF-) | |
---
Peter,

Did you see hypocrisy thrown into the face of parents and children on national television?

Smiling maskless celebrities and Democrat politicians at the Super Bowl, hanging out in their $50,000 private boxes.

Meanwhile, children are sitting in classrooms with masks covering their faces for HOURS every day at school.

We know now that kids are the least vulnerable to this illness but the most negatively impacted by these mask mandates.

Make it make sense.

It's time to end this mask mandate madness for ALL Americans, especially our children.

That’s going to take courageous leadership in Washington.
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6bx-o8_qdtKkslo2GmlgRDNDTfY7SKwJE9KIccG2gdHmSiiTnKvH9P4inh1P49BU_j9AmIRXgem4vfAu_pf6edkWg0L7r-hdWsW9csLN5U7e3DryPBMz2ezlHzjNz6KwoO1apaxEFqUwNDpVE_CYU7VxdbtIR21ofVpgM3nVwym6L9RQeiOWRgH1CRu0ZUzjN-WnZVi7qz3gxHP0KMkKH61twTkqJzQwvYuYpOpj621d)
I've always been guided by these core principles: _faith in God and country_ , _a strong united family_ , and _service before self_.

And that’s what American leadership is lacking these days--we have a lot of people in government who either talk a good game about helping the American people or are the career politicians who are getting things done.

But real leaders can do both.

Leadership is more than just listening to people’s concerns, it’s sacrificing your own needs behind someone else's and not accepting failure as an option.

We need a leader who can restore faith in the American system, be a champion for American families, and serve and fulfill the interests of the American public.

**[I know I can be that leader for Michigan and beyondーI’m asking for your trust and support to help me get there >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6QLVGpe0Qa4PMwFJq_t-weATBttz59ZeiHiKCkjyfsvmlSJAgee-YxEFwMnB_xvIaFxnMYPVmO7xjjy_Gbjt89p57HKCDsIWc4GicPik-WCJiswrTiTfLTaYJfvEOacFoiT3kWjq6tDfU5ZunmCrQP5jbx4SH3Chj0HFv25nUZYho25l6bN2Sgj11nKmq11w6WRifLmHcQbh7QzFNxNCJ2IhPMBiZCbGw8Lis1tQadzK)**
[**FUEL OUR FIGHT >>>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6de7z3iyKC3kqgmhvWtnkVjWBCOYpOybam_sQzaKze5xC8-EfjA1ksfEOAXk6cibtPeTy-HlYhzyToiRULbscv95NI6aF3FSnX4Bu6Y2A7p3iEGEOxm16OBtMvI6VUCgRSxOru4U2KzVMIqY2dNKIvoFZGvB-jkyqgCnyscRv-JEPox97BsJdd_zqklitE3-GpASBsgu-2P-TkgJk0LbMmyC1KypZA3xkqzhNYyrgFkC)
Peter, a lot of people know of me, but they don't know how I got here or why they should put their faith in me to lead.

My family story is inextricably linked to the American Dream, and I wouldn’t be where I am today without the opportunity and promise offered by our great country.

My father was born in Starkville, Mississippi, and he grew up right across the street from a university he wasn’t allowed to attend because of the color of his skin.

But he didn’t let racism and bigotry deny him the ability to embrace the promise of America — he paid his way through college, served honorably in Vietnam, and worked hard to provide a better future for his family.
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6Q8HNyrbWNTJpn145lt8cZRuwpQWVQcAukxarZ8Y88UYOyZUL5TPqOyktobCtl1weuiCZ1i3ZVuK7kGwUlnz7AWKj8KCiF57QLmJz8QgyHnDLu6y8Sy5yTsELnFaI_icoJUeGazG6hIoZ_4r5SKMW2NrA8AAUIOogqkv1_tAlvppQVojJJxKL4mPYl_p0GfFKE-dYkG6e9t_F73OD90s0wvXmRJm57uCeAwg1OVOqDSO)
He moved to Detroit and started a trucking company with only one truck and one trailer. He worked for more than a decade hauling beer between Detroit and Milwaukee and turned that one truck and one trailer into a 35 million dollar company.
In four generations, my family has gone from slave to sharecropper to potential Congressman because of their relentless hard work and the opportunity and promise offered by the American system.

My family story inspired me to believe in the promise offered by the American Dream, and my father’s service inspired me to use my skills and blessings to defend it to the best of my ability.
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6fpqgl5TMRNrYqBfQZx9Ok8DVpIlvVardN6zCHZiF-Y5HUiNmdIiwULs7TYlSXrB8lCkGskXzsgk3XOFYfl9XWbWe4_elM4WiRyAUDWlj52qJ-nLgJKggq5rAQ4vHyxbH0-fXhHoJJ6aY4EtamPW5wy0nWEXiTBwbNXAI2KPkLOL5DKkiAZmRwPJjYrzt_1h5LaaUSFGJqqJE35i05vanrbnwuyFZdQmj5H9UI2mBbo_)
Now I want to ensure it's safeguarded and passed down to my sons and the next generation.

I hope you choose to become an OFFICIAL supporter of my campaign by making an immediate donation now: **[https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-michigan/action-3753378/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6XAbsyfZbbGdcO7C3Ew1ZeYCn9j7pvPQvAM_YKgy_4n9AXgOmYLNSHNheitMywe1ZmRodZsWz0r7YOmTxFBPak8askkhml-jeG17dfU2f-VkZy7yIsVwlk8opuUgdWbFDy4D1ObARDOc88dm2Ez7yWUnGJu6OUWQwN1dsA8Gc3WBv7MmcHMaF6B4D_ARKXFxF5QHSR3gTLq7BOF-lYMWmHL8lKDc70owo60oCf8nLjOf)**
[**FUEL THE FIGHT**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ec6b47ced0e249c29c1a2fc9d1c95294&_e=9E_7c72CQ6stbodeCcO-Z3OtXN7cvWnRkzHUz3KNZGrWFX1o9qLaLmIzj-M3sqIT77-bGWhUHwz4fSQRh0zkI-SMiG3DLbUPgTT9bYygoYddFGyFlczeQbdnYruwIW3O6_Tyj0q6yLfGyAc-0Rl5XyHrLXapcZdjlSQ6tFKkSA6naVWcHI1FgJd1SXmlivgP65omV_TUFCZD5I6sogpbvro9D4vjW80rRZ2vK0vb6lEBSUgVLke4SlVctyhOTgdn5H4TMccoVIA-02EMVbN-6TnJBlr6I-D0yIckV4hRoDKfK2pFdim-7rpzensDWo865KXvrglCl6XouAnUw56HlUx2s0vkmU1SRIkiG9ciJ9hAyh9IsFCy7o6t-wZ_SP0RoaTSaoyO6De_MD9LGKUYQ3eTP88kwQIvq1LF6efV4icVkEhb6Axj7OXyYARB21a6owS8q9cgbZJOcmVHvZFNmgY9qIjfcFnnvrrpZ4RSFOdCH1fxYvbkGhVKEgnVoGn0)
Thank you for your time, Peter.

John James

He moved to Detroit and started a trucking company with only one truck and one trailer. In four generations, my family has gone from slave to sharecropper to potential Congressman because of their relentless hard work and the opportunity and promise offered by the American system. My family story inspired me to believe in the promise offered by the American Dream, and my father’s service inspired me to use my skills and blessings to defend it to the best of my ability. Now I want to ensure it's safeguarded and passed down to my sons and the next generation. I hope you choose to become an OFFICIAL supporter of my campaign by making an immediate donation now: Thank you for your time, Peter. John James | | | Paid for by John James for Michigan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of John James for Congress, Inc. and Mission First People Always | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

subject: Will you sign?
body:
Will you sign our petition calling for four debates between Tobias Read and Tina Kotek?
---
| | Dear Peter, We’re calling for four debates in the Democratic primary for Governor... **and our opponent Tina Kotek refuses to commit to any.** The voters deserve to hear the two Democratic candidates for Governor discuss their records and vision for our state. **And they deserve to have their questions answered directly and clearly on the debate stage.** **[Will you sign our petition calling for four debates between Tobias Read and Tina Kotek?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108835/331665960/-192638718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1OThlYy0xZTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IlY5JyEBDwXX_CjfUR1BOL1u7Y2z1TAKgw4dRJGtNz4=&emci=36053fd0-1e94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5b8598ec-1e94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** We’ve spent hundreds of millions to address homelessness with the problem only getting worse. Homicides and gun violence have hit an all-time high with no end in sight. There’s no plan to keep our schools open and our kids keep falling further behind. And Intel, Oregon’s largest employer, announced it’s spending $20 billion to create thousands of high tech jobs in Ohio instead of here at home. Tobias is ready to lay out a new approach for accountable, effective leadership. It’s disappointing that Tina Kotek isn’t interested in speaking with Oregonians about her plans, especially given all of the challenges we’re facing. **People are frustrated with how things are going in Oregon today, and they deserve answers.** **[Sign our petition today to call for four debates in the Democratic primary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42108837/331665965/-192638718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjg1OThlYy0xZTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IlY5JyEBDwXX_CjfUR1BOL1u7Y2z1TAKgw4dRJGtNz4=&emci=36053fd0-1e94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5b8598ec-1e94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** Thanks,

Friend,
We know you’re busy so we’ll keep this email short.
$3 — that's the amount we're asking you to pitch in to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign for Senate today. Here's why:
1. Pennsylvania is the #1 most important race in the country. We basically can’t win the Senate without it.

2. Malcolm Kenyatta is the ONLY candidate in this race who can fire up enough voters to flip Pennsylvania this fall. Tons of people are excited to help us make history by electing Malcolm!

3. But our fundraising has slowed a bit this month, and if we don’t pick up the pace now, we’ll have to cut back on our March budget.

body:
Lankford Tries To Diminish Lahmeyer Last night, the Daily Beast ran a story about Republican members of Congress that normally would be safe but curr

## Lankford Tries To Diminish Lahmeyer
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3660.1.91dc2a473b63e0c0fd99add7753f2a7d)
---
Last night, the [Daily Beast](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3661.1.78b8460bccaf84410b26d19b6ac456ed) ran a story about Republican members of Congress that normally would be safe but currently are not this election cycle.
One of the Senators they identified as “**not safe** ” is Incumbent [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3662.1.02efb3af70cc698fc81c00618f584b7d).
The matchup between [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3663.1.846a5187cae98cbf515033fe4aefb84c) and [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3664.1.e0da5c56e6258deb5cb316bcef9ed365) continues to be in the national spotlight.
[Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3665.1.ee7c5c78cb688727e6aff7b4df0be111) trying to dismiss OUR movement labeled me as just being built on “noise” and not “policies.”
If that’s the case then Incumbent [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3666.1.359a37427b6c9776b56f354f0a75142d) should debate me on Friday, March 25 in Tulsa to show the nation I’m just “ _noise_.”
Here is a short list of differences that I have with [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3667.1.2855994f006dc501cd483c4e782522fd):
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3668.1.1a334fd835de2dbee79630e99f31cb95)

| | [ Click Here To Learn More About Jackson Lahmeyer ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3669.1.b91cff518b70647bca3b96c345d7744b)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3670.1.ef8dfea6a4f5ec1b04d3f3cba0d4351f)
---
**80% SOLD OUT**
Tickets:
Scholarship - $10
General - $20
Sponsored - $40
VIP - $100
Meet & Greet Pass - $500
America's General, **Michael Flynn** , and the legendary, **Roger Stone** , are joining me in **Oklahoma** for _2 Nights in 2 Cities_ (**OKC and Tulsa**)
I would like to invite you to hear what I call, "_Inside Baseball_ " from two men that are in the know.
Reserve your spot ASAP:
**[Oklahoma City](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3671.1.73413cebaeeb50f6c6817163aa8a0653)** : Friday, March 4th at 7pm
Sundance Airport
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3672.1.69c950a8f5da38e6b8154336a35a0c13)
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/641935](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3673.1.81ce5d87ef4eecc870457d584780cd47)
**[Tulsa](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3674.1.9b474ed1aaf7207b2c4de616e62f0309)** : Saturday, March 5th at 6pm
Sheridan.Church
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3675.1.5cf8f43daeaa897af99feacf5f2b89eb)
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/641941](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3676.1.b762fd88fa5c45589dcc4520d49c7d71)
For more questions visit [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/flynn](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4229517.3677.1.cd4440adc717ac39473528dd9c77287b)
Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com

name: United Rural Dems HQ
subject: MTG's Souprising Attack on Pelosi, Dems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
We didn't think we would have to say this, Peter

| |
---
Hi Peter – We didn't think we would have to say this, but Marjorie Taylor Greene recently attacked Nancy Pelosi for having a "gazpacho police spying on Members of Congress." As you know, gazpacho is the name of a cold Spanish soup, and we're assuming Greene meant to say "Gestapo" – the terrorizing Nazi secret police. Despite Greene's gaffe resulting in some pretty entertaining reactions and _souper_ puns (we had to add at least one in), her meaning was anything but funny. Comparing House Speaker Nancy Pelosi to a Nazi police group is dangerous, un-American, and cause for serious concern. And this isn't the first time Greene has used Nazi references to criticize her opponents. The constant partisan bashing and dangerous statements from Republicans are hurting American democracy. **When politicians cater to the entertainment of their base, rather than focus on the needs of the American people, we all lose.** We need to make sure that we organize as many voters as we can to show up to the polls in 2022 and end this Republican reign of ugly partisanship. **[Can you commit to helping us defeat Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022? A monthly gift of $22 or more will go a long way in helping our organization fight for Democrats in hard areas.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42109175/331667585/311099802?refcode2=35ee3894-2194-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&recurring=true&amount=22&refcode=220222_URD_gazpacho_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1ZWUzODk0LTIxOTQtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CkLvcC61--i2mRmUg9ryE1kcC-B5iMCFd2FmOCtL3pQ=)** **[INVEST MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42109177/331667587/1646350971?refcode2=35ee3894-2194-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&recurring=true&refcode=220222_URD_gazpacho_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1ZWUzODk0LTIxOTQtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CkLvcC61--i2mRmUg9ryE1kcC-B5iMCFd2FmOCtL3pQ=)** We appreciate your support, United Rural Democrats
| **United Rural Democrats (URD)** is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? **[Chip In Now →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42109179/331667589/1646350971?refcode2=35ee3894-2194-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=emailfooter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1ZWUzODk0LTIxOTQtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CkLvcC61--i2mRmUg9ryE1kcC-B5iMCFd2FmOCtL3pQ=)** **[Donate Monthly →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42109181/331667591/1646350971?refcode2=35ee3894-2194-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=emailfooter&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM1ZWUzODk0LTIxOTQtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CkLvcC61--i2mRmUg9ryE1kcC-B5iMCFd2FmOCtL3pQ=)**

Hi Friend,

There are so many problems with the current leadership in Salem. Lawlessness and crime are running unabated in our streets. Extreme taxation and a poor business climate are leading to disastrous outcomes. In addition, our constitutionally protected rights are under threat as never before. What is your greatest concern?

clean_body: | | | | Hi Friend, There are so many problems with the current leadership in Salem. Lawlessness and crime are running unabated in our streets. Extreme taxation and a poor business climate are leading to disastrous outcomes. In addition, our constitutionally protected rights are under threat as never before. What is your greatest concern? The challenges Oregonians face are manifold. To better represent you, I want to know what issue is most important for you. Please take a minute to share your the link to our survey below. | I entered the race for Governor to bring tangible and sustainable policies that are not derived from lobbying efforts made behind closed doors in Salem. It’s my promise to every Oregonian that I will stand firm in the pursuit of sound policy, not special interests. Our success is only possible when each and every voice is heard along the way. Our time to make real lasting change is now! | Your continuous support makes all the difference and, together, we can accomplish our mission. Best wishes, Marc Thielman | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for America
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zegm398g6a9fvp90ouipm2qiervfl3cljlonkuu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5je1ie6ohme3i39plhelp62ptkslo66orlmeojep9jc6o7cpj265ib1odicjjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5lmgrr4sr664ob6oj7m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z05houruk53qq92rf99mcbetpcc9ik16jqkei1u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties – _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z61hug5po9erpnrrvielnicd7tg8r8rm3i1ojp10_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0lkmaomg25lsonglk261303lb3gb211j5op6boo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgk7mq9cma2s0j2nmajc9lf445n7rb9rgv0h8amo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlq6o46amo77j0jbllc24mp128tf748p2ugk816o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.” _Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate – and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9mqgm0c2g6m02qaqftg3s72u08usfam6r6n3teo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb2l735725ble1n6inaqal1abu92hjn297jslsj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6uf1aqps5lm5v2jo71fgnb49g1eaba80j4p1i4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left. We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes—out of school—during the pandemic. We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7jqgd0vhrqoum9cqacn8dr2re4a3of9hqrgq630_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation – and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zms5qva7t75jeotvmkmh06dpk7ak4nqapiab3gpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0q0t27qpnfs46qklumplprbo5703fkvmu6qohk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcg393an03nbh0vajmb5b9ldcnvc7gikj70ip64g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkbc5lg8nm3cfcrb3gatp3r40ipabctd6ce7sgg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd2t0oslnk8a7ubqao4q7nlg0cbr7p5bhpsu1vi8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeu9ks3t0b80khgkd2mnbl8qdrl903nht6ulhkd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhmcor2c5h2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

clean_body: It’s win here or go home, Peter. | Peter, The Left is scared. They know that we’re gaining on them in Battleground States across the nation, and especially in the must-win state of North Carolina -- and they’re terrified of losing power in Washington, DC. If Republicans pick up just one seat in the US Senate and five seats in the US House, we’ll reclaim control of Congress and put Joe Biden in a box. The Democrats know they’re losing, which is why they’re preparing to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to win in North Carolina. We need to be ready for whatever the Left will throw at us, Peter. Are you with us? | | | | | | Our Republican nominee for US Senate in North Carolina is going to face an onslaught of attack ads unlike anything we’ve ever seen. The Democrats are preparing to spend as much as $1 billion in North Carolina, and we are at risk of being crushed under all that California money. But while the Left has big donors, they don’t have passionate Republican Patriots like you, Peter. Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: BREAKING: Trump appointee running for Senate in Vermont
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
If we want to keep the Senate blue, we have to win here in Vermont.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=112%2E61531%2Eh8_Y3j)
Hello,
A GOP Trump appointee, hand-picked by national Republicans, just announced her campaign for U.S. Senate in Vermont. We need all hands on deck if we’re going to win here in Vermont and keep the Senate blue. [**Can you chip in right away?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1423?t=3&akid=112%2E61531%2Eh8_Y3j)
Everything — from the constitutional right to an abortion and protecting the environment to ensuring access to affordable healthcare and repairing our infrastructure — is on the line in November. And you can bet that Mitch McConnell and his national Republican allies will do everything they can to parachute into Vermont and buy this seat.
[**That’s why it’s so important we fight back — and we fight back right now. Can you chip in $5 — or whatever you can — to our urgent Rapid Response goal right away?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1423?t=4&akid=112%2E61531%2Eh8_Y3j)
Peter’s been fighting on behalf of Vermonters in the House — he’s a champion for the Green New Deal and lowering prescription drug costs. He’ll be ready on Day One in the Senate to make real change. But first, he has to win. And we need your help to get there.
We’re not taking any contributions from corporate PACs, so we rely on folks like you to help us build a movement and keep this seat — and the Senate as a whole — out of Mitch McConnell’s extremist hands.
[**Pitch in $5 right away to help us hit our $15,000 Rapid Response goal in the next 24 hours. It’s crucial to keeping Vermont and the Senate blue.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1423?t=5&akid=112%2E61531%2Eh8_Y3j)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

Thanks for all you do,
Welch for Vermont

name: Peter Franchot
subject: New Endorsement Announcement
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m very excited to announce that I’ve been endorsed by Charles County Commissioner Amanda Stewart!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Individual_AmandaStewart_1200x1200.png]
In addition to serving as one of Charles County’s most dynamic public servants, Amanda is also a science teacher, a nonprofit founder, and a small business owner. I’m truly honored to have received the endorsement of a leader who serves and empowers our communities in so many ways.
Amanda, I can’t thank you enough for your trust, your friendship, and your service to our state. As Governor, I’ll proudly partner with you to make sure our schools, small businesses, and working families have the resources they need to thrive and succeed. Together, we’re going to deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift all communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Our people-powered movement continues to grow stronger by the day. I’ve already received the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials – the most of any candidate for Governor in both categories– and I have no doubt that our coalition of support will continue to grow in the weeks and months to come.
Will you spread the word about this latest endorsement alert by sharing with your friends on social media?
Click here to view and reshare on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=519478126210920&set=a.422901372535263]
Click here to view and retweet on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot/status/1496188969897373699/photo/1]
Click here to view and reshare on Instagram. [https://www.instagram.com/p/CaShngeM18l/]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

subject: We’re excited to see the progressive coalition coalesce behind Jessica!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
Early Voting has begun in TX-28! | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRbai70ZQHl4TLqDTgUqvy0yq70sFxyaOeE1gtQWosVF9IVBo8sbWnHJ0jr6R0uMab4w2riIRHaTtKXcx0-DDqoATKx5xOXJuZqdwBvIXERJECi4GOWy1y8MQrUtZ3rFax5MS7rGkc-dlLeIvn_3Oxb27NYUKR7um6mjGWRsbyq7x900Lie0OlDhhNMXxRyA1OV4T8_KmXduIPg0avdldmyTfhTj9L1R_oyxhOl-t0-ejN_sdeQ_PG6riZFEmFstXHGZQLmABNhbRXcF9OVER7S9JBatkZLSvettdKw9L042Z/3js/1GYLIUkaQ8CO24N64es8uQ/h0/_yQfGp_tNRQ8Y6Z5qG3dNykFrYGKwqysKsDaPk0AVLo) Hi Peter, we have an exciting update for you!

**Senator Elizabeth Warren and NARAL Pro-Choice President Mini Timmaraju are hosting an Early Voting Kick-off Rally with Jessica to get folks fired up to cast their ballots early.**

There are only 3 days left of early voting. So we’re reaching out to you to help fund our GOTV program during these last days of early voting and before election day on March 1st.

[_**We’re so close to election day and we still have a lot of voter outreach to do. There are only 3 days left of early voting. So we’re reaching out to you to help fund our GOTV program during these last days of early voting and before election day on March 1st. During times like these, it’s important that TX-28 elects a real Democrat who will fight for them and their families — not their corporate donors and special interest groups. body:
Submitting is first step in serving the people of Colorado
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fJpdoCDSYFj6VNVh_YGFNMw9qcov0nx6EHf4nB5Z6wh_Pav4w3cCOy-ba-eDO_avbavvjH7Zn4VujKUqK90TqeCyQRJoyblaaWnxhVQ0G9-osVxcZSYBS7OV2NIWAfc1I2QPkgyBM6jyfyJuBpvAtYTCj5nmEYiY&c=ObVQ2mo97GqkB2XE8if0hLvyjYK-2GLnnDcRofD1vL0WyVWbmsgZaQ==&ch=wQMLdUlmF_3tuMoqkokxVEnixWBcOs_7BQjpah05dvU4MpygQc5AFg==)

|
---
|
# Aadland first to submit petitions for Colorado's 7th CD
---
| | |
---|---
|
FROM THE AADLAND FOR CONGRESS NEWSROOM:

Aadland for Colorado is proud to announce it has submitted nearly 2,000 signatures to Colorado's Secretary of State to place Republican Congressional candidate Erik Aadland on the primary ballot in the race for Colorado's District 7 seat.

A decorated combat veteran who has international business experience working in the energy industry, Erik is the first candidate in the CO-07 race to submit petitions. It takes 1,500 qualified signatures to place a congressional candidate on the primary ballot. The signatures were delivered to the Secretary of State's office on Tuesday afternoon, Feb. 22, by the campaign staff. The submission is three weeks before the petition deadline of March 15.

"This is the first step in putting the people of Colorado first in policy making," Erik said. "By achieving our initial goal of qualifying my candidacy, Congressional District 7 has a path forward to less spending in Washington, a reduction in inflation, greater national security, and a better way of life."

Part of the effort to collect these signatures was through events held at micro-breweries throughout CO-07, in support of small businesses greatly impacted economically by the global pandemic. Volunteers also spent many hours reaching out to registered Republicans in the district for their signatures. Erik thanked his staff and the many volunteers for the effort they put into helping with the petition.

"I'm grateful to have the support of a dedicated team of supporters. Without their effort, this campaign could not move forward," Erik said. "And I'm grateful to the voters in District 7 who put their name on the line in supporting me in my run for Congress. This process has given me the ability to connect with voters who typically do not participate in the caucus and assembly process, and to learn what is on their minds."

The Colorado Secretary of State's Office will now go through the process of verifying each signature to qualify Erik for the ballot.

| With Carla Sands bowing out of the debate as well, all three carpetbaggers failed to get in front of Pennsylvania voters in this important showcase.
The question is...why won't they debate? Are they scared they'll be outed as out of touch with the voters they want to represent?
Kathy isn't afraid to talk to the people of Pennsylvania. In fact, she has been traveling over 1,000 PER WEEK to meet with voters across the commonwealth. name: Clay Aiken
subject: I’m ready to roll up my sleeves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
Last week I told y’all about how I fell in love with teaching while working with children with special needs at my local YMCA — the same YMCA I attended as a child.
In college, I studied special education with a concentration in teaching children with severe and profound disabilities. When serving as a teacher’s assistant in a classroom for children with autism, I learned how to individually care for each student’s unique needs and celebrate each of their unique strengths.
My time as a teacher’s assistant and special educator has given me a unique perspective on our education system... and I’m chomping at the bit to get in there and make improvements when elected to Congress!
I’m chock-full of ideas on how to improve North Carolina’s schools, but... today... I want to hear from you. Take this survey and let me know your thoughts on what our community needs. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aYXi2GpuD0GT7onkWoPX6w2]
What changes would you like to see in your community? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aYXi2GpuD0GT7onkWoPX6w2]
survey [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aYXi2GpuD0GT7onkWoPX6w2]
I’m eager to get up to Washington and make things better for North Carolina’s kids. Let’s put our heads together so we can fight for the change we all want to see!
Clay
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
Clay Aiken for North Carolina
PO Box 13274
Durham, NC 27709
United States
