name: Protect Mail-In Voting | PADems.com
subject: ✎ we need you to sign this Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
new petition enclosed: ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099668/331622511/-490999417?source=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&utm_campaign=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=&emci=06cb3eb1-f693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6eec49aa-fc93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296) This petition is going viral in Cresco, and we thought you may be interested in signing on:
* * *
Peter,

Pennsylvania's Commonwealth Court dealt mail-in voting a devastating blow: _they ruled this bipartisan law UNCONSTITUTIONAL._

But Pennsylvania's Supreme Court is going to hear our appeal case! **It's our only shot to defend mail-in voting in Pennsylvania!**

So we want to send a petition to the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, asking them to DEFEND mail-in voting.

We want to collect _at least_ 10,000 signatures so we can show the Pennsylvania Supreme Court that mail-in voting has _overwhelming_ support! [**Can you please add your name to our petition to defend mail-in voting?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099669/331622512/-490999417?source=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&utm_campaign=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=&emci=06cb3eb1-f693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6eec49aa-fc93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296) **PETITION TO DEFEND MAIL-IN VOTING**

[NAME: Not Recorded | ZIP: 18326](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099670/331622513/-490999417?source=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&utm_campaign=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=&emci=06cb3eb1-f693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6eec49aa-fc93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099671/331622514/-490999417?source=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&utm_campaign=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=&emci=06cb3eb1-f693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6eec49aa-fc93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296)
---
We have to be blunt: If the Pennsylvania Supreme Court lets the lower court ruling stand, that means mail-in voting is GONE.

_And that will make it harder for Pennsylvanians to vote in 2022 and beyond._

We have to do everything in our power to defend mail-in voting.

[**So can you please sign this petition to help defend mail-in voting?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099672/331622515/-490999417?source=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&utm_campaign=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=&emci=06cb3eb1-f693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6eec49aa-fc93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296)

[**https://go.padems.com/a/Protect-MailIn-Voting**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099673/331622516/-490999417?source=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&utm_campaign=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=&emci=06cb3eb1-f693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6eec49aa-fc93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296)

Thanks,

PA Democrats

[P.S.: If you want to take your support to the next level, can you make a $5 recurring donation to Pennsylvania Democrats to help our fight to defend mail-in voting? _Click here to donate →_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099674/331622517/560304284?refcode=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac_don&utm_campaign=email_20220222_pet-mailinvoting_em1_210inac_don&amount=5&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=)

Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. [**Please click here to donate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099675/331622518/-1921829696?refcode=email_2022_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=)

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. If you need to update your contact information, please [**fill out this form**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42099676/331622519/-1693192786?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVjNDlhYS1mYzkzLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M2LfM8hhqg2e72LU3YN7fsrqm6cZyOL_9LbJcjmXqIo=&emci=06cb3eb1-f693-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6eec49aa-fc93-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296). clean_body: new petition enclosed: ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- This petition is going viral in Cresco, and we thought you may be interested in signing on: Peter, Pennsylvania's Commonwealth Court dealt mail-in voting a devastating blow: they ruled this bipartisan law UNCONSTITUTIONAL. But Pennsylvania's Supreme Court is going to hear our appeal case! It's our only shot to defend mail-in voting in Pennsylvania! So we want to send a petition to the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, asking them to DEFEND mail-in voting. We want to collect at least 10,000 signatures so we can show the Pennsylvania Supreme Court that mail-in voting has overwhelming support! PETITION TO DEFEND MAIL-IN VOTING | We have to be blunt: If the Pennsylvania Supreme Court lets the lower court ruling stand, that means mail-in voting is GONE. And that will make it harder for Pennsylvanians to vote in 2022 and beyond. We have to do everything in our power to defend mail-in voting. Thanks, PA Democrats = Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. = Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. We have them worried, Peter.

Democrat Peter DeFazio bowed out of this race just a couple months ago, but he is still concerned we are going to flip the Congressional seat he has held onto for more than 35 years... **_and he’s not the only one scared of our campaign._ **

If you can recall, we lost Oregon 4 by only 5.2 points in 2020 - _the tightest race in Peter DeFazio’s entire career!_ **Now, the favorite to win the Democratic nomination, Van Hoyle, is worried we have what it takes to flip this blue seat in November.**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=8424593bd4c24a9f9718b8861044c877&_e=ceogWjfiXAfJds8u1ngH0To3Uq0rA1FCYH_P5Vr55sGWqkaXpn9yb2_HN2gwZToulj4er-3VuDEBbgN4vMY13Mp2LkFlmNyikv7AojR8KmeLgfSDM97HfIo_k9DHXxUUBNqDZhdIB8ij3lgzlJ5ryr8eIpuHtbFi1FheC_RFnm_LIfHUKyoufuvvkhJaWP3REp8ac4xRtNPa30iRJ9bM4CH2nbKHSjEShZ7ILcgmz__nLOkYK7ARP-qloThyvRqnfxUXcd9_pfp1391NL_un6odhmwJutoa8EkAS-fuBNE0IzlCJoryaiCeJuUfjkjgBcq84aR5Q6kckMpoIsv-4uNOO2c9_GL9KEkw0T9MWwzh0iWccRZ_sAus3jYE1cwp4OwrvW1SKHwPZ-dxFIP9R0zqHa8xPBEZQCQcon-dp9u_fxQWc6Nm65TiPEz3HKUaf)
If I was a Democrat, I’d be terrified of our campaign too, Peter! [**We have an army of grassroots conservatives that gave a pillar of Democrat politics a run for his money last cycle.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=8424593bd4c24a9f9718b8861044c877&_e=ceogWjfiXAfJds8u1ngH0To3Uq0rA1FCYH_P5Vr55sGWqkaXpn9yb2_HN2gwZToulj4er-3VuDEBbgN4vMY13Mp2LkFlmNyikv7AojR8KmeLgfSDM97HfIo_k9DHXxUUBNqDZhdIB8ij3lgzlJ5ryr8eIpuHtbFi1FheC_RFnm_LIfHUKyoufuvvkhJaWP3REp8ac4xRtNPa30iRJ9bM4CH2nbKHSjEShZ7ILcgmz_-1XCMNxPXuYNC5eJoiJ2pERUokRGcAYO9Lcceo6SCOjmo2xfHWEDG11wkg8xCgp6ZP8FaL6lMJykaT12oO-A2wQAR2ruAKQuNYlIGsEXf_YVvw9FcRJHV5Q_kdPHMtYeCLzTVz41CRlJ-RK0tA1v49OpykuFsNP-KUcLOtCLlC3HcqJl-99bnvx6QyJJHFS3JZR407_QIeRFLfQea6XhTd)

**But close only counts in horseshoes and hand grenades - a loss is still a loss.** [**This time around, we are more determined than ever to win.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=8424593bd4c24a9f9718b8861044c877&_e=ceogWjfiXAfJds8u1ngH0To3Uq0rA1FCYH_P5Vr55sGWqkaXpn9yb2_HN2gwZToulj4er-3VuDEBbgN4vMY13Mp2LkFlmNyikv7AojR8KmeLgfSDM97HfIo_k9DHXxUUBNqDZhdIB8ij3lgzlJ5ryr8eIpuHtbFi1FheC_RFnm_LIfHUKyoufuvvkhJaWP3REp8ac4xRtNPa30iRJ9bM4CH2nbKHSjEShZ7ILcgmz_9P-ofttnVOP-poq7k4arMs5sGoR-x79v1YA9IY1w05AtCEYF6Fpp6G6Pw9h9rmrnZTMEU5grHmGtZKDocel3ZxUcPF1ddMRNlbSdVxVbGZZJNRp3KMehczcmmzFw5L7oYV77hh_YwdmvaWlRLIfAHCi222ITfuwsT0XV6zVYIQWa45avx0dGuPFUGSKk-YJCyDCzvs2ULtDYBZTou74SRa)

**DeFazio is no longer our opponent, but I assure you, we’re going up against a more committed and vigorous Democrat Machine than ever before.** When Democrats are scared, they don’t run away - they ramp up their efforts and fight even harder.

**We cannot let up or relax in this fight for a single moment.[In fact, we need to step it up immediately.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=8424593bd4c24a9f9718b8861044c877&_e=ceogWjfiXAfJds8u1ngH0To3Uq0rA1FCYH_P5Vr55sGWqkaXpn9yb2_HN2gwZToulj4er-3VuDEBbgN4vMY13Mp2LkFlmNyikv7AojR8KmeLgfSDM97HfIo_k9DHXxUUBNqDZhdIB8ij3lgzlJ5ryr8eIpuHtbFi1FheC_RFnm_LIfHUKyoufuvvkhJaWP3REp8ac4xRtNPa30iRJ9bM4CH2nbKHSjEShZ7ILcgmz_-wKvt2n7Jk---S1IEWI47ekGggpZ0pT20lblNd4MOek6OS3yqwJjuBZTSgNIluiOgPLceAACVEnPZ_V14c67S6GgkaVWQdU0rL5XM-ozdpeFjT92P4aY5k94FCGOmemBqzeou_-ZHvJU-eAe40Mv6xgKJ-SQsxjEJc8Qto3y7UVuVGuPn7ic_XpCcPtuOpSM5jxqkLl2wSu6vCD8rxQRvE)**

[**Which is why I am asking each supporter to recommit to this fight with a donation of $10, $25 or even $50 right now.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=8424593bd4c24a9f9718b8861044c877&_e=ceogWjfiXAfJds8u1ngH0To3Uq0rA1FCYH_P5Vr55sGWqkaXpn9yb2_HN2gwZToulj4er-3VuDEBbgN4vMY13Mp2LkFlmNyikv7AojR8KmeLgfSDM97HfIo_k9DHXxUUBNqDZhdIB8ij3lgzlJ5ryr8eIpuHtbFi1FheC_RFnm_LIfHUKyoufuvvkhJaWP3REp8ac4xRtNPa30iRJ9bM4CH2nbKHSjEShZ7ILcgmz_8Sco_FyHFhTTtBIi8AWWTmSuCT7tR9y7T2_Kyo9uCggCDwx7aoQt02WChdetaM5CkT_keXzxP2MnQhN5s78WQr19oQyxCyJgMy8ZxE-Mhw8XQ9GBUa0R52wLltLYVq_DSURmSsF5eqdPLDbNihw2GMDSs793hxhZfnuoO1mMCcmTmyMBpnCAUrkAVuY-re5T84MLDNFzjxkeDefrasxBbQ)

clean_body: If I was a Democrat, I’d be terrified of our campaign too... But close only counts in horseshoes and hand grenades...a loss is still a loss. | We have them worried, Peter. Democrat Peter DeFazio bowed out of this race just a couple months ago, but he is still concerned we are going to flip the Congressional seat he has held onto for more than 35 years... and he’s not the only one scared of our campaign. If you can recall, we lost Oregon 4 by only 5.2 points in 2020 - the tightest race in Peter DeFazio’s entire career! Now, the favorite to win the Democratic nomination, Van Hoyle, is worried we have what it takes to flip this blue seat in November. If I was a Democrat, I’d be terrified of our campaign too, Peter! But close only counts in horseshoes and hand grenades - a loss is still a loss. DeFazio is no longer our opponent, but I assure you, we’re going up against a more committed and vigorous Democrat Machine than ever before. When Democrats are scared, they don’t run away - they ramp up their efforts and fight even harder. We cannot let up or relax in this fight for a single moment. Flipping this battleground district will be difficult and expensive. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Dear Friend,

**Today is a special day for our campaign.**

I'm excited to announce my running mate in this race to make Maryland safe, steady, and prosperous is Dr. Jeff Woolford.

An Air Force fighter pilot, physician, and small business owner, he has served both this country and Maryland honorably his entire adult life.

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Re: ActBlue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I have some good news and some bad news for you.

**First, the good news:** _The Washington Post_ recently reported that I “could be the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson.” And the most recent head-to-head survey from a top-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollster shows I’m the only Democrat who can defeat him in a general election.

Our momentum is growing — we see it in the polls, the press, and the energy on the ground. Everywhere I go, folks tell me how fed up they are with this guy, and I gotta tell you: I’m right there with them.

I’m frustrated with Ron Johnson’s refusal to fight for good-paying jobs, affordable childcare, and lower costs for working families. And I’m tired of our Senate majority getting blocked at every turn. That's why I got in this fight, and it’s clear our campaign is in the strongest position to defeat him and grow our majority.

**Now, here's the bad news:** The latest ActBlue report shows us tracking behind our Q1 fundraising goals by about 14%. Look, these goals are not arbitrary — we need to meet every single one of them in order to stay on track for our first FEC deadline of the year.

I’m hoping at least every one in three people who open this email will make a contribution. February is a short month, and there’s not a lot of time left for us to catch up. Can I count on you to be one of those people today?

**Here’s your personal donation link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-february22&refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110558/331673746/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220222_eom1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220222_eom1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjVlYThkNS0yNzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unt6q1Lc8mpt7ibrMcwN_DTjzqRuU8l0-1Z70b_wvD8=)**

Our campaign isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. In fact, the vast majority of our donations come from messages like this one. This grassroots team has always risen to the occasion, and I believe we can do it again and continue to put ourselves in a strong position to defeat Ron Johnson.

Thank you, as always, for taking action.

— Sarah

name: Team Crist
subject: Four reasons Charlie Crist can defeat DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
You’ve heard us say, “Gov. DeSantis is beatable,” but we’d like to take a moment today and explain precisely why that’s the case. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110571/331673871/65474386?refcode=20220221_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjA0MDFmYi0yNzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S0TjaoSJxYTKRqyums8dV0mFgxNgHodXRS_Q4EDQIUY=)

Friend,

You’ve heard us say, “Gov. DeSantis is beatable,” but we’d like to take a moment today and explain precisely why that’s the case.

But if you’re already fired up and ready to defeat DeSantis, [**_please pitch in to Charlie’s campaign for governor. You can do that here._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110572/331673872/65474386?refcode=20220221_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjA0MDFmYi0yNzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S0TjaoSJxYTKRqyums8dV0mFgxNgHodXRS_Q4EDQIUY=)
**FOUR REASONS CHARLIE CRIST CAN DEFEAT DESANTIS:**
1. In 2018, Gov. DeSantis only won **49.6%** to **49.2%** (that’s 30,000 votes)!

2. Multiple polls show Charlie either within the margin of error or outright _winning_.

3. Political experts like Inside Elections have called this race a “battleground.”

4. A new Democratic primary poll showed Charlie leading in EVERY REGION OF FLORIDA, meaning he has what it takes to build the grassroots movement we’ll need to win in November.

Team, there’s not much else to say: **Charlie Crist can defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis. In fact, he’s the only candidate who can!**

**So, please, if you’re able, donate ASAP to our team. Let’s get to work.**

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Mark’s story (Photos)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Growing up, this little boy learned that through hard work, he could do anything he set his mind to.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2166_6688874_O0yIJv&akid=2166%2E6688874%2EO0yIJv)
At the age of 23, he became a United States naval aviator. He deployed twice on the U.S.S. Midway and flew 39 combat missions in Operation Desert Storm.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2166_6688874_O0yIJv&akid=2166%2E6688874%2EO0yIJv)
Then, at the age of 32, he was selected as an astronaut (with his twin brother, Scott!). He flew his first of four missions into space in 2001 aboard Space Shuttle Endeavour. He spent more than 50 days in space and has lived on the International Space Station.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2166_6688874_O0yIJv&akid=2166%2E6688874%2EO0yIJv)
In 2011, Mark's wife, Former Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, was shot in Tucson during an event where she was meeting with her constituents. Mark retired from the Navy and NASA, and his mission turned from service to his country to caring for his wife. But Gabby's service in Congress, using policy to improve people's lives, stuck with him.
So, in 2020, Mark took on his next mission — running for U.S. Senate in Arizona — and won. Since he was sworn in, Mark has been focused every day on making Washington work for all Arizonans.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-7&t=4&refcode2=2166_6688874_O0yIJv&akid=2166%2E6688874%2EO0yIJv)
Now, Mark is up for re-election in 2022 and needs your help to keep fighting for us in the Senate. This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our end-of-month fundraising deadline this Monday to help re-elect Mark Kelly to the Senate? Mark can’t do this alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-7&t=5&refcode2=2166_6688874_O0yIJv&akid=2166%2E6688874%2EO0yIJv)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-7&t=6&refcode2=2166_6688874_O0yIJv&akid=2166%2E6688874%2EO0yIJv)**
Thank you for being on our team,
Team Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-7&t=7&refcode2=2166_6688874_O0yIJv&akid=2166%2E6688874%2EO0yIJv)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=2166%2E6688874%2EO0yIJv).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

He deployed twice on the U.S.S. Midway and flew 39 combat missions in Operation Desert Storm. Then, at the age of 32, he was selected as an astronaut (with his twin brother, Scott!). He flew his first of four missions into space in 2001 aboard Space Shuttle Endeavour. He spent more than 50 days in space and has lived on the International Space Station. In 2011, Mark's wife, Former Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, was shot in Tucson during an event where she was meeting with her constituents. Mark retired from the Navy and NASA, and his mission turned from service to his country to caring for his wife. But Gabby's service in Congress, using policy to improve people's lives, stuck with him. So, in 2020, Mark took on his next mission — running for U.S. Senate in Arizona — and won. Since he was sworn in, Mark has been focused every day on making Washington work for all Arizonans. Now, Mark is up for re-election in 2022 and needs your help to keep fighting for us in the Senate. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110781/331674779/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=)

Hey team,

This month has been incredibly busy for us here at Team Hahn.

We're continuing to introduce Kara to voters across the 1st (see some pictures below). And we've been busy working to bring on new staff and secure key endorsements.

**[There's so much to get done to win this race and flip the district blue – and your support makes all of it possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110782/331674780/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220222_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=)**

I wanted to share a quick update on what Kara's been up to, and what we need to do to keep building a winning campaign.

* * *
# **Kara on the Trail**
This month Kara took some time to deliver supplies to veterans and frontline workers. Here she is dropping off masks and at-home rapid Covid testing kits to Three Village Meals on Wheels in Stony Brook.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110783/331674781/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220222_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=)
---

Kara spent some time celebrating Lunar New Year with the Asian American Association of Greater Stony Brook.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110784/331674782/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220222_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=)
---

Earlier this month Kara spoke with local Democratic Committees in Southold, Riverhead, and Easthampton. (Virtually and In-person) We've also got meetings scheduled in Huntington, Islip, Southampton, and Brookhaven this upcoming week.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110788/331674784/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220222_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=)
---

* * *
# **Finance Update**
The pace is only going to pick up from here. In my meetings with Zach, our finance director, it's clear that we need to scale up our efforts.

With new district lines, we have tons of new voters to reach. And with the race now designated as a toss-up race, we know Republicans will be looking to pour in their dark money to try to maintain their grip on this seat.

**[Look, we're counting on grassroots supporters like you to give our campaign the boost we need. That way, we can continue building a winning campaign and finally flip New York's 1st District blue. Can you chip in $5 or anything you can to keep us on track to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110795/331674791/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220222_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110798/331674795/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220222_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=)
That's all I have for now. Thank you for staying updated

Kelley,
Campaign Manager
Kara Hahn for Congress

Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110805/331674801/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220222_campaignupdate&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42110808/331674807/-2026774271?refcode=em22_220222_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5NGY1Mi0yOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EJ3-ROqU243nFooFcAq8Lb7XL9LiRXfrdpDnwxO6ZI=)

clean_body: | = Hey team, This month has been incredibly busy for us here at Team Hahn. We're continuing to introduce Kara to voters across the 1st (see some pictures below). And we've been busy working to bring on new staff and secure key endorsements. = I wanted to share a quick update on what Kara's been up to, and what we need to do to keep building a winning campaign. Kara on the Trail This month Kara took some time to deliver supplies to veterans and frontline workers. Here she is dropping off masks and at-home rapid Covid testing kits to Three Village Meals on Wheels in Stony Brook. | = Kara spent some time celebrating Lunar New Year with the Asian American Association of Greater Stony Brook. = Earlier this month Kara spoke with local Democratic Committees in Southold, Riverhead, and Easthampton. (Virtually and In-person) We've also got meetings scheduled in Huntington, Islip, Southampton, and Brookhaven this upcoming week. = Finance Update The pace is only going to pick up from here. In my meetings with Zach, our finance director, it's clear that we need to scale up our efforts. With new district lines, we have tons of new voters to reach. And with the race now designated as a toss-up race, we know Republicans will be looking to pour in their dark money to try to maintain their grip on this seat. = = That's all I have for now. Thank you for staying updated Kelley, Campaign Manager Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *

I know Vladimir Putin very well, and he would have never done during the Trump Administration what he is doing now, no way! Russia has become very very rich during the Biden Administration, with oil prices doubling and soon to be tripling and quadrupling. The weak sanctions are insignificant relative to taking over a country and a massive piece of strategically located land. name: Congresswoman Demings
subject: things aren't looking great
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm still falling short
| | |
---
I'll be honest, friend – things aren't looking great. My Election Year membership campaign expires at midnight, but I'm still 513 members short of my goal.
Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it costs.
**Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now:**

[Please, activate your Election Year membership by donating $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me win in Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42111623/331678678/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2475-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjhiODU3YS0yYjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rM9kpDwh4mg7hAWiY1yD97839N1NQlkRTGw9LywKBzY=)

Hi Team,

Big news! Last week, former 32-year member and two-time president of the Baltimore City Council, Mary Pat Clarke, urged Marylanders to support Tom and Shannon in the Democratic primary for Governor, and here’s why:
→ Like us, she **sees** Tom and Shannon’s dedicated record of public service and commitment to delivering positive results for Marylanders

→ And like us, she **believes** in Tom and Shannon’s ability to put equity first and restore the partnership of city and state Baltimore needs and expects.
Tom and Shannon are on track to bring jobs, justice, and equal opportunity to Maryland, but campaigns move at a break-neck pace, **and they need resources to sustain their momentum.** **[Will you step up for the first time and rush a $5 donation, or whatever you can, to support Tom and Shannon’s campaign today? name: Self Reliance Central
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrot925d1jikfhkmuem5iovudnb40s1bvosi3vgg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj1o3jmeoj1ohl6hon6s9immq7fdr5m6q32chgm3jr1dhi65qr5cpimdiect37mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libbd1nm9omct32mdj3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5imaor4s1j6coh5u)
| | This sponsored message from The Hollywood Conservative is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq77inog5gdjfi7500elccf0qp3an418u5r7p0hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm9o36cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z3rtn14fjug8fgc49opeu7p0bnqg6ktesccdkd9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm9o36cph2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc9gcjkd8pl43vea2hqs84ic7f0pcv2eln5kjf9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm9o36cph2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zunlq5r3sdrbckvgi2qqrphtl35d8jbmuma875do_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm9o36cph2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2z5hpdqooh6n2vho9rcftlbu8e0rcg7hln4rn85q8).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztgav7hssde6tjvc5a8s0u0hhkc0uohlk2j1o9hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5clhm9o36cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Val Demings
subject: I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42112439/331682108/-74008005?refcode=20220222_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU5ZTkzNC0zMDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxaaoVdrHFZdtfMAGjQHrT7dty6KSKC1nAU-aY6i3y4=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42112440/331682109/-74008005?refcode=20220222_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU5ZTkzNC0zMDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxaaoVdrHFZdtfMAGjQHrT7dty6KSKC1nAU-aY6i3y4=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42112441/331682110/-74008005?refcode=20220222_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU5ZTkzNC0zMDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxaaoVdrHFZdtfMAGjQHrT7dty6KSKC1nAU-aY6i3y4=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42112442/331682111/-74008005?refcode=20220222_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTU5ZTkzNC0zMDk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxaaoVdrHFZdtfMAGjQHrT7dty6KSKC1nAU-aY6i3y4=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings name: Ted Nugent
subject: Rebecca Kleefisch is the conservative fighter we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
Now this is someone who will never back down to the woke liberal mob.
| Friend,
---
I love REAL America and I love REAL Americans. But I hate FAKE politicians who will say or do anything to get elected. I’ve met so many who claim to be “real” conservatives with promises to stand up to the Marxist Democrats...
---
...But when the going gets tough, very few stand tall and FIGHT BACK.
---
Luckily, Wisconsin has a Republican candidate for governor who is a REAL conservative fighter. **_Rebecca Kleefisch is a good, honest, hardworking patriot who will NEVER back down._** I grew up in the Midwest and care deeply about midwestern people and our midwestern values. I’m endorsing Rebecca to be governor of Wisconsin because she’s one of us. She’s a down to earth Midwesterner who believes in God, family, and freedom.
---
There is a treacherous culture war going on right now and current Governor Tony Evers is siding with woke liberal mobs and rioters rather than real Wisconsinites. Wisconsin needs real leadership, not compromising wannabe politicians. **Wisconsin needs Rebecca Kleefisch as Governor.**
---
_That’s why I promised Rebecca that I’d reach out to every last patriot to make sure she could go toe-to-toe with Tony Evers’ $10.5 million in cash on hand in this TOSS-UP governor’s race._
---

clean_body: Now this is someone who will never back down to the woke liberal mob. | Friend, I love REAL America and I love REAL Americans. But I hate FAKE politicians who will say or do anything to get elected. I’ve met so many who claim to be “real” conservatives with promises to stand up to the Marxist Democrats... ...But when the going gets tough, very few stand tall and FIGHT BACK. Luckily, Wisconsin has a Republican candidate for governor who is a REAL conservative fighter. Rebecca Kleefisch is a good, honest, hardworking patriot who will NEVER back down. I grew up in the Midwest and care deeply about midwestern people and our midwestern values. I’m endorsing Rebecca to be governor of Wisconsin because she’s one of us. She’s a down to earth Midwesterner who believes in God, family, and freedom. There is a treacherous culture war going on right now and current Governor Tony Evers is siding with woke liberal mobs and rioters rather than real Wisconsinites. Wisconsin needs real leadership, not compromising wannabe politicians. Wisconsin needs Rebecca Kleefisch as Governor. That’s why I promised Rebecca that I’d reach out to every last patriot to make sure she could go toe-to-toe with Tony Evers’ $10.5 million in cash on hand in this TOSS-UP governor’s race. We all remember 2020, Friend. Had we carried swing states like Wisconsin, Joe Biden wouldn’t be in the White House destroying our country and shredding our Constitution today. That’s why in 2022, we MUST take back this critical battleground state. And there’s only one person I trust to get the job done – Rebecca Kleefisch. For Freedom, Ted Nugent Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Official Trump Alerts
subject: February 22nd Update
body:
Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
| |
---|---|---
|
# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump February 22nd, 2022 If properly handled, there was absolutely no reason that the situation currently happening in Ukraine should have happened at all. I know Vladimir Putin very well, and he would have never done during the Trump Administration what he is doing now, no way! Russia has become very very rich during the Biden Administration, with oil prices doubling and soon to be tripling and quadrupling. The weak sanctions are insignificant relative to taking over a country and a massive piece of strategically located land. Now it has begun, oil prices are going higher and higher, and Putin is not only getting what he always wanted, but getting, because of the oil and gas surge, richer and richer. The U.S. was energy independent under the Trump Administration, an independence that we had never obtained before, and oil prices would have remained low. I know Vladimir Putin very well, and he would have never done during the Trump Administration what he is doing now, no way! Russia has become very very rich during the Biden Administration, with oil prices doubling and soon to be tripling and quadrupling. The weak sanctions are insignificant relative to taking over a country and a massive piece of strategically located land. Now it has begun, oil prices are going higher and higher, and Putin is not only getting what he always wanted, but getting, because of the oil and gas surge, richer and richer. The U.S. was energy independent under the Trump Administration, an independence that we had never obtained before, and oil prices would have remained low. Now, what a mess our Country is in! |

body:
We must stand with Cheney >>
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1313%2E878179%2EK-rBkV)
---
**BREAKING: Republican National Committee votes to CENSURE Rep. Liz Cheney for her involvement with the January 6th investigation**

**We’re disgusted by the RNC** \- so we’re gathering 25,000 good Democrats to sign our open letter thanking Cheney for her work on the committee!

_Unless we hit our 25,000 signature goal, Cheney could be SILENCED by the GOP..._

[We can’t let Republicans bully her! She needs to know that Americans do appreciate her bravery. SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6177?t=7&akid=1313%2E878179%2EK-rBkV) | [Donate $2 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6177?t=8&akid=1313%2E878179%2EK-rBkV)
---
TO: LIZ CHENEY
FROM: A Proud Democrat
Subject: THANK YOU!

_Dear Congresswoman Liz Cheney,_

**While we don’t always agree with you, we truly appreciate your patriotic commitment to putting the country ahead of your party.**

It has been so refreshing to see a Republican who _REFUSES_ to bow down to Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA caucus.

**We’ve seen Republicans attack you daily, strip you of your leadership position, and even threaten to throw you in jail! But you’ve been steadfast in your mission to follow the facts and protect our democracy – _we’re SO grateful!_**

**But I know that despite your noble actions, Republicans will continue to bully you into sabotaging the investigation and saving Donald Trump...**

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of Americans across the country that stand with you! That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $2 to Voter Protection Project to help elect more politicians who will stand with you in Congress and fight to protect our democracy.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6177?t=9&akid=1313%2E878179%2EK-rBkV) **_x. A GRATEFUL AMERICAN_** | [Donate $2 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6177?t=10&akid=1313%2E878179%2EK-rBkV)

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1313%2E878179%2EK-rBkV). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1313%2E878179%2EK-rBkV).**

Dear Friend,
Lizzie spoke with ABC13 about redistricting in Texas, the new makeup of our 7th District, and Texans’ concerns about voting rights. Watch the interview here. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=isw9ZJuz_-s]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=isw9ZJuz_-s [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=isw9ZJuz_-s]
We are one week out from the March 1 Primary Election and there are only three days left of early voting! Early voting ends on February 25.
We are talking to new voters in TX-07 about getting to the polls, and we could use your help. Help us get the word out to our #TX07 neighbors by joining us this Saturday, February 26 from 9 to 11 AM [https://www.mobilize.us/fletcherforcongress/event/437315/?emci=7b656f8d-2d89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=fc1a1d1a-4089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=29495980] as we deliver campaign literature.

And if you can’t volunteer right now, that’s OK. You can still help out by making a contribution to power our voter outreach efforts in these final days before the primary election.

name: Team Bennet
subject: “Red-wave”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42113285/331685486/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjk5Yjg0MC0zMzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rKxLQn1AGXaQ92swEOGphusx3aULF7v4idtCHC_IXug=)
Hey friend, The National Republican Senatorial Committee, the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans, just put out a new press release with the headline, “ICYMI: Colorado Catapults into Top Competitive Senate Races” The National GOP is gearing up for a “red-wave,” and our race is a top target for their efforts to take back the Senate this year. They’re encouraged by the recent poll that shows Michael losing by one point to a Republican opponent, and the _National Journal_ analysis that ranked his seat in the top 10 races most likely to flip this year. We don’t have room to fall short in our work to re-elect Michael. The Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC and Senate Republicans raised a combined $200 million last year to flip seats like Michael’s and they’re going to use a lot of that money to come after us,_hard_. We don’t have to outraise them in order to win, but it is important that we keep up with our fundraising goals. The money we raise will go toward rapid response efforts to fend off Republican attacks, voter outreach to amplify Michael’s wins, and expanding our campaign infrastructure as this race gets off the ground. **Michael won his last midterm re-election by a hair, so we’ll need all the help we can get to fight back against incoming Republican attacks. Can you chip in any amount now to help us collect the resources we need to win?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42113286/331685487/292594599?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjk5Yjg0MC0zMzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rKxLQn1AGXaQ92swEOGphusx3aULF7v4idtCHC_IXug=)****

clean_body: | = Hey friend, The National Republican Senatorial Committee, the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans, just put out a new press release with the headline, “ICYMI: Colorado Catapults into Top Competitive Senate Races” The National GOP is gearing up for a “red-wave,” and our race is a top target for their efforts to take back the Senate this year. They’re encouraged by the recent poll that shows Michael losing by one point to a Republican opponent, and the National Journal analysis that ranked his seat in the top 10 races most likely to flip this year. We don’t have room to fall short in our work to re-elect Michael. The Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC and Senate Republicans raised a combined $200 million last year to flip seats like Michael’s and they’re going to use a lot of that money to come after us,hard. We don’t have to outraise them in order to win, but it is important that we keep up with our fundraising goals. The money we raise will go toward rapid response efforts to fend off Republican attacks, voter outreach to amplify Michael’s wins, and expanding our campaign infrastructure as this race gets off the ground. Michael won his last midterm re-election by a hair, so we’ll need all the help we can get to fight back against incoming Republican attacks. Can you chip in any amount now to help us collect the resources we need to win? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks so much for all your help and for being on this team, — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Kim Rogers
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Hi Team,
Kim Rogers here. I’m DASS’s executive director, and part of my job is monitoring the fundraising of our far-right opponents. That’s why I was so concerned to see this headline from the Brennan Center: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
Here’s the bad news: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D] GOP mega-donors and dark money groups are FLOODING Secretary of State races nationwide with cash, propping up ‘big lie’ supporters like Mark Finchem and Kristina Karamo and tearing down Democrats.
But there’s some good news too: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D] we can stop them, defeat Trump’s cronies running for office, and protect our democracy.
How? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D] By supercharging our grassroots fight to elect and protect our Democratic Secretaries of State nationwide. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
It doesn’t need to be much – even a $5 or $10 contribution goes a long way towards saving our democracy from the ‘big lie’. When thousands of grassroots supporters like you chip in and join the fight, we can beat the far-right this November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
Will you rush $20, or whatever you can, right now to help us hit our critical $70,000 February goal and fight back against the far-right’s dark money onslaught? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
RUSH $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=100&refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D]
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?refcode=EM_FR_022222_B3_AC_30D&amount=100]
Thank you,
Kim Rogers
Executive Director
Democratic Association of Secretaries of State

Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill

600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180
Washington, DC 20003
United States

Hey friend,

Last week, I reached out for your help to finally end the filibuster – the antiquated procedure that has been weaponized by Republicans to block not just voting rights, but also health care reform, child care expansions, union protections, necessary climate legislation, and more.

The right to vote is sacred, the filibuster is not. And restricting our political voice removes the fundamental principle that this country has prided itself on.

**[As November approaches, it is more necessary than ever before to expand and protect voting rights. If you have not yet, please sign this petition to show the Senate how crucial our voting rights are.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42113463/331686199/2125327140?ms=em22_220218_filibusterpt&refcode=em22_220218_filibusterpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjgwNTFiOS0zMzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFX5-oaZwzbFi3xFr7CdbK9B4BKaMrJS5CTzHYyMf3E=&emci=7a5d3173-f490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=968051b9-3394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=18516396)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42113464/331686201/2125327140?ms=em22_220218_filibusterpt&refcode=em22_220218_filibusterpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjgwNTFiOS0zMzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFX5-oaZwzbFi3xFr7CdbK9B4BKaMrJS5CTzHYyMf3E=&emci=7a5d3173-f490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=968051b9-3394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=18516396) Thank you so much,

Conor Lamb [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42113469/331686202/1085202693?refcode=em22_220218_filibusterpt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjgwNTFiOS0zMzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFX5-oaZwzbFi3xFr7CdbK9B4BKaMrJS5CTzHYyMf3E=) \----------Forwarded message----------
From: **Conor Lamb**
Date: February 09, 2022 at 1:06 p.m.
Subject: Friend, will you take action with me to protect voting rights?

Friend,

Just a few weeks ago, the Senate again allowed the antiquated 60-vote procedure known as the filibuster to block voting rights legislation.

**Let's be clear: Republicans are abusing the filibuster to block voting rights and endanger our democracy.** And it's not just voting rights – again and again, we have seen the GOP use the filibuster to block health care reform, child care expansions, union protections, necessary climate legislation, and more.

**[Friend, will you join me in calling on the Senate to pass voting rights reform and protect our sacred right to vote? Here's the link to sign our petition.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42113470/331686207/2125327140?ms=em22_220218_filibusterpt&refcode=em22_220218_filibusterpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjgwNTFiOS0zMzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFX5-oaZwzbFi3xFr7CdbK9B4BKaMrJS5CTzHYyMf3E=&emci=7a5d3173-f490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=968051b9-3394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=18516396)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42113471/331686208/2125327140?ms=em22_220218_filibusterpt&refcode=em22_220218_filibusterpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjgwNTFiOS0zMzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tFX5-oaZwzbFi3xFr7CdbK9B4BKaMrJS5CTzHYyMf3E=&emci=7a5d3173-f490-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=968051b9-3394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=18516396) Time and time again, we have let this obscure and unnecessary procedure get in the way of the right of all Americans to have the voice they were guaranteed in the Constitution.

Across the country, Republicans are racing to enact more laws that make it harder for people to vote – restricting mail-in voting, removing ballot boxes, and putting more anti-democratic obstacles in the way of voters. This is unacceptable, and it goes against the values of freedom and democracy that our nation stands for.

The right to vote is sacred, the filibuster is not. **I will vote to end the filibuster in the Senate, team, to ensure that we can pass the urgent legislation that our children, families, and communities are counting on.**

Thanks for being part of this with me.

I’m tired of corporations and special interest groups blocking what working families in our communities desperately need.

name: Campaign Updates via Team McGrath
subject: Your February Newsletter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We can’t wait for what the next months will bring!

| Peter,

Because you are one of the campaign’s strongest supporters, we want to keep you informed. Staying connected with the people who make up the backbone of our team is a priority for all of us.

This February, we celebrate Black History Month and honor the contributions Black Americans have made to Wisconsin and this country. We must never stop working to create fairer, more inclusive communities where all of us can thrive.
* * *
The last few weeks have seen an exciting surge of momentum for our campaign. Deb is proud to have earned the endorsement of a fellow veteran, U.S. Rep. Seth Moulton! U.S. Marine Corps Lt. Col. **Amy McGrath** , who ran for the Senate against Mitch McConnell, her organization **Honor Bound** , which is dedicated to electing women with a service background, and **VoteVets** , an organization that supports veterans running for office. Deb was also endorsed by local elected officials, including Eau Claire City Councilmembers **Emily Anderson** and **Emily Berge**.

Wisconsin knows cheese better than _any_ other state, and there are many to sample! Deb loves trying new cheeses from all over the state — her favorite so far? Cheese curds from Taste and See Creamery in Boyceville. clean_body: We can’t wait for what the next months will bring! | Peter, Because you are one of the campaign’s strongest supporters, we want to keep you informed. Staying connected with the people who make up the backbone of our team is a priority for all of us. This February, we celebrate Black History Month and honor the contributions Black Americans have made to Wisconsin and this country. We must never stop working to create fairer, more inclusive communities where all of us can thrive. The last few weeks have seen an exciting surge of momentum for our campaign. Deb is proud to have earned the endorsement of a fellow veteran, U.S. Rep. Seth Moulton! = We’re also thrilled to have the support of local businesses like the Minocqua Brewing Company — = These endorsements are just the most recent of many: Deb’s other endorsers include U.S. Rep. Abigail Spanberger , a former CIA officer like Deb, Ret. U.S. Marine Corps Lt. Col. Amy McGrath , who ran for the Senate against Mitch McConnell, her organization Honor Bound , which is dedicated to electing women with a service background, and VoteVets , an organization that supports veterans running for office. Deb was also endorsed by local elected officials, including Eau Claire City Councilmembers Emily Anderson and Emily Berge. Wisconsin knows cheese better than any other state, and there are many to sample! Deb loves trying new cheeses from all over the state — her favorite so far? Cheese curds from Taste and See Creamery in Boyceville. Deb was excited to visit the Creamery, meet with owner Casey, and check out their “staff” at work! | = | = ---|--- Do you have a favorite Wisconsin cheese? Every Wisconsin voter deserves to be heard in our government and have a fair say in choosing our elected leaders. Deb joined a fair maps rally in Eau Claire to advocate against GOP voter suppression legislation and for legislative maps that will give all of us an equal voice. = Deb has also visited many ice fishing contests across the district, and especially loves encouraging kids to participate in the fun. = The coming months will bring even more exciting updates as our campaign grows! Stay up to date on it all by following Deb on , , and . We’re grateful to have so many of you with us as we work together to elect Deb to Congress, but the truth is we’ll need all your support to win this competitive race and help hold the House majority. = Thanks for being on our team! Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Haugaard?=
subject: Prolife solutions over Politics
body:
| | | |
---
| | | It’s pretty simple – when it comes to passing Prolife laws, often Republicans are our own worst enemy.

I am sponsoring an amendment, called **House Joint Resolution 5003** , which passed South Dakota’s House State Affairs Committee on February 16th by a vote of 8 to 4. It’s a popular amendment and I’m proud to be affiliated with STRONG legislation that does everything it can to protect the unborn.

[Now we’re seeing resistance from... **Kristi Noem**](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=80a3933d60&e=c654cab7e1).

Kristi Noem has turned what ought to be a united effort for easy protections for unborn babies into an opportunity to sling mud.

She’s welcome to say what she wants about me (this is politics, after all, not ping-pong) but not at the cost of more aborted babies in our state. That price is too high for squabbling.

This will be the second attempt by her to squash Prolife legislation –**Voters should wonder “Why?”** From how it looks now, it seems like Noem is putting politics over solutions.

If elected governor of South Dakota, I swear to stand up for our unborn children. I swear to be their advocate in the state capital. **And I swear to always put solutions over politics. **

Will you help me get there?

---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE $50 TO A PROLIFE GOVERNOR](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=3be31928d0&e=c654cab7e1 "CLICK HERE TO DONATE $50 TO A PROLIFE GOVERNOR")
---
|
---
| Best regards,

\- Steve Haugaard

_Republican Candidate for Governor _

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: THIS is a threat.
body:
Take it from someone who’s been working in law enforcement for over 30 years - when the elected officials who serve us ignore crime in our community instead of committing to stop it, the safety of our communities becomes threatened.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FSByY5dQeUE15HQhe73vN1s6OnHjhebaLmPitmK8dWd-x6FvC-DpNePF-0BLQt2XdjUUldOyfjF3xdGdoSc1YEnSXJyK9VxnGr7xYDXmTzWa3lN6cJg8b_7hkds2fu6GwGjBr4SLmKGzriPkmdl0HeRv1lcjUVqJ0krBFJp1ZQtpx8URi8FbgOzoN_CnMMwYnLiHAz3J_r0=&c=WtMzNBYDEWk1zuF5mkH4OnFFiOd1D9pAQpkytA6iGm00GLa9f_rsOg==&ch=yZWWlDZeVyuYaIEgsTOIFiGAvG6QF3z1apfrSHjSE1ifuuP52llt1g==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
Take it from someone who's been working in law enforcement for over 30 years - when the elected officials who serve us ignore crime in our community instead of committing to stop it, the safety of our communities becomes threatened.
That's not just a theory... I've seen the reality of it on the ground.
All of these changes can be traced back to one place - our state leadership in Carson City.
They've made decisions that have had seriously negative consequences for public safety here in Nevada... and I'm not going to remain silent while it continues.
Instead, I'm following a call that's been with me throughout my entire career - to protect our communities and our Nevada way of life!
I'm doing so by running for Governor so that I can bring the Law Enforcement Leadership that I KNOW our state needs directly to Carson City. [If you want to make an investment in Nevada's safety, can I count on you to support my campaign?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FSByY5dQeUE15HQhe73vN1s6OnHjhebaLmPitmK8dWd-x6FvC-DpNePF-0BLQt2XdjUUldOyfjF3xdGdoSc1YEnSXJyK9VxnGr7xYDXmTzWa3lN6cJg8b_7hkds2fu6GwGjBr4SLmKGzriPkmdl0HeRv1lcjUVqJ0krBFJp1ZQtpx8URi8FbgOzoN_CnMMwYnLiHAz3J_r0=&c=WtMzNBYDEWk1zuF5mkH4OnFFiOd1D9pAQpkytA6iGm00GLa9f_rsOg==&ch=yZWWlDZeVyuYaIEgsTOIFiGAvG6QF3z1apfrSHjSE1ifuuP52llt1g==)
---
| | | [BACK THE MISSION TODAY! CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FSByY5dQeUE15HQhe73vN1s6OnHjhebaLmPitmK8dWd-x6FvC-DpNePF-0BLQt2XdjUUldOyfjF3xdGdoSc1YEnSXJyK9VxnGr7xYDXmTzWa3lN6cJg8b_7hkds2fu6GwGjBr4SLmKGzriPkmdl0HeRv1lcjUVqJ0krBFJp1ZQtpx8URi8FbgOzoN_CnMMwYnLiHAz3J_r0=&c=WtMzNBYDEWk1zuF5mkH4OnFFiOd1D9pAQpkytA6iGm00GLa9f_rsOg==&ch=yZWWlDZeVyuYaIEgsTOIFiGAvG6QF3z1apfrSHjSE1ifuuP52llt1g==)
---
| This is a critical moment for the Silver State - our choices on Election Day 2022 will decide whether we reverse the lawless trends, or whether we drift closer and closer towards high-crime jurisdictions like Seattle, Portland, or Chicago.
I have the expertise needed to get us on the path to safety... [All I need is your support to help me get there.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FSByY5dQeUE15HQhe73vN1s6OnHjhebaLmPitmK8dWd-x6FvC-DpNePF-0BLQt2XdjUUldOyfjF3xdGdoSc1YEnSXJyK9VxnGr7xYDXmTzWa3lN6cJg8b_7hkds2fu6GwGjBr4SLmKGzriPkmdl0HeRv1lcjUVqJ0krBFJp1ZQtpx8URi8FbgOzoN_CnMMwYnLiHAz3J_r0=&c=WtMzNBYDEWk1zuF5mkH4OnFFiOd1D9pAQpkytA6iGm00GLa9f_rsOg==&ch=yZWWlDZeVyuYaIEgsTOIFiGAvG6QF3z1apfrSHjSE1ifuuP52llt1g==)
Thank you for being a part of this important fight, Sheriff Joe Lombardo
---
|
---

name: Josh Riley
subject: protecting our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Did you see my Syracuse Post-Standard op-ed? Over a year after Jan. 6, 2021, our democracy remains imperiled.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114556/331690451/-566240111?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220222-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkxNWU3NS0zOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tx8dBtbH2Dcg4L4W1LmVwhAFUQTYyXtkngnK0VvbNng=)

---
Peter – Did you see my Syracuse Post-Standard op-ed?

**Over a year after Jan. 6, 2021, our democracy remains imperiled.**

Our country is being torn apart at the seams by extremists who are more interested in peddling far-right conspiracy theories and sowing division for partisan gain than bringing people together to solve problems for the common good.

**If we want to do the hard work of solving common challenges with a shared purpose, we first must strengthen our democracy and restore faith in it – and in each other.**[ _**Will you pitch in $5, $10, or more to join this campaign to defend our democracy and protect our fragile House majority?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114558/331690453/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220222-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkxNWU3NS0zOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tx8dBtbH2Dcg4L4W1LmVwhAFUQTYyXtkngnK0VvbNng=)

It will be a long road to achieving a government that is truly _by and for the people_. But here are a few steps I outlined in my op-ed to get us started:
* **First,** we must update the Electoral Count Act to make it crystal clear that voters decide elections, not politicians.
* **Second,** we must make it easier to vote, not harder.
* **Third,** we need to get dark money out of politics.
* **Finally,** we must end partisan gerrymandering.

_**[Our political system is broken, but we can fix it, and that’s one of the reasons why I’m not accepting a dime from corporate PACs, instead relying on grassroots support from people like you. So, Peter, will you make a contribution to our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114559/331690454/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220222-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkxNWU3NS0zOTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tx8dBtbH2Dcg4L4W1LmVwhAFUQTYyXtkngnK0VvbNng=)**_

clean_body: Did you see my Syracuse Post-Standard op-ed? Over a year after Jan. 6, 2021, our democracy remains imperiled. | = | = Peter – Did you see my Syracuse Post-Standard op-ed? Over a year after Jan. 6, 2021, our democracy remains imperiled. Our country is being torn apart at the seams by extremists who are more interested in peddling far-right conspiracy theories and sowing division for partisan gain than bringing people together to solve problems for the common good. If we want to do the hard work of solving common challenges with a shared purpose, we first must strengthen our democracy and restore faith in it – and in each other.= It will be a long road to achieving a government that is truly by and for the people. But here are a few steps I outlined in my op-ed to get us started: First, we must update the Electoral Count Act to make it crystal clear that voters decide elections, not politicians. Second, we must make it easier to vote, not harder. Third, we need to get dark money out of politics. Finally, we must end partisan gerrymandering. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Together, we can do the hard work to lift each other up and make sure everyone’s voice is heard. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2447%2E3611125%2ELYO1d8 ][IMG]

Folks,

You’ve heard my team and me talk A LOT about how this race will decide
Senate control, and that’s true. It’s why pundits have called me
“Democrats’ most important 2022 candidate.”

But the truth is, this race is about MUCH more than Democrats vs.
Republicans, or which party will control the Senate—because my five
millionaire GOP opponents are ANYTHING BUT your run-of-the-mill
Republicans. They’re all downright dangerous.

I’m up against the most extreme of the extreme, the folks running to the
right of the far-right, and the ones who think Trump was just the
beginning of the MAGA movement. They’re fighting tooth and nail for his
endorsement, and sinking lower every step of the way.

My GOP extremist opponents don’t represent hardworking
Ohioans—and
that’s why I need YOUR help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8084?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2447%2E3611125%2ELYO1d8 ]Will you chip in a $25 grassroots donation to help me defeat my
out-of-touch, millionaire opponents so I can go to the Senate to fight for
Ohio’s working families?

The polls aren’t neck-and-neck because my GOP opponents represent the
views of Ohioans.

This race is close because they have the support of billionaire
mega-donors and dark-money groups that can spend millions of dollars on
misleading ads to buy their way into power.

But Ohio’s Senate seat shouldn’t go to the highest bidder.

I’m running for Senate to answer to hardworking Ohioans, not

Tim Ryan

Dear Peter,

Look, I'm going to get right to the point here because I know you're busy and I know it can get annoying getting so many of these emails.

But here's the deal: We absolutely must hold our majority in the House this year.

**[The path to holding our majority in the House goes right through CA-27 and we cannot let the opportunity to flip this district from red to blue go to waste.
