They called the violent insurrection at the Capitol "legitimate political discourse," they're passing laws left and right to make voting as difficult as possible, and all but a brave few have completely aligned themselves with the former president who tried to overturn a democratically-held election, including our own Mike Garcia.

**Peter, while 2020 was the election of our lifetime – the truth is, so is 2022.**

[**Republicans only need to gain 5 seats to maintain control of the House. This district is one of most flippable seats in the country, we cannot afford to miss this opportunity. Donate $5 or more _today._ >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114643/331690923/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220222_EOM1-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U0YjUyNC0zYTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UOB3d4X7PiPOSJdGfxuirq1tqPj859bzZw7p17QxpJM=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114644/331690924/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220222_EOM1-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U0YjUyNC0zYTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UOB3d4X7PiPOSJdGfxuirq1tqPj859bzZw7p17QxpJM=) I'm not going to sugarcoat it. With an out-of-touch, conservative Supreme Court majority making the biggest decisions of our lifetime and our Democratic majorities hanging by a thread, I'm nervous about what the future holds for our nation.

But, I was nervous in 2020 as well, and you know what? Through perseverance, determination, and a whole lot of old-fashioned, grassroots organizing we prevailed.

**[We're going to do it again, but I'll need your help to get there. Chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you to make sure we flip CA-27 red to blue, get Mike Garcia out, and hold our majority in Congress.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114645/331690925/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220222_EOM1-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U0YjUyNC0zYTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UOB3d4X7PiPOSJdGfxuirq1tqPj859bzZw7p17QxpJM=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114646/331690926/-1278704484?refcode=em22_220222_EOM1-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U0YjUyNC0zYTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UOB3d4X7PiPOSJdGfxuirq1tqPj859bzZw7p17QxpJM=) I wouldn't be running if I didn't think it was possible to bring on another Blue Wave this year. clean_body: | Dear Peter, Look, I'm going to get right to the point here because I know you're busy and I know it can get annoying getting so many of these emails. But here's the deal: We absolutely must hold our majority in the House this year. = = We are up against an entire political party – now the Republican establishment – that has abandoned democracy. They called the violent insurrection at the Capitol "legitimate political discourse," they're passing laws left and right to make voting as difficult as possible, and all but a brave few have completely aligned themselves with the former president who tried to overturn a democratically-held election, including our own Mike Garcia. Peter, while 2020 was the election of our lifetime – the truth is, so is 2022. = = I'm not going to sugarcoat it. With an out-of-touch, conservative Supreme Court majority making the biggest decisions of our lifetime and our Democratic majorities hanging by a thread, I'm nervous about what the future holds for our nation. But, I was nervous in 2020 as well, and you know what? Through perseverance, determination, and a whole lot of old-fashioned, grassroots organizing we prevailed. = = I wouldn't be running if I didn't think it was possible to bring on another Blue Wave this year. I know we can do it but it's going to take even more energy and momentum than we had even in 2020. You came through before, and I know you'll do it again. Bring on the 2022 Blue Wave. –Christy = = *

subject: I'm filing to be on the ballot today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
I have to pay the GOP a $15,000 ransom | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066185?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=cde20a54a8&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Dear Patriot:

Today, I’m driving down to our State Capitol in Little Rock in order to file to get on the ballot.

The Republican Party of Arkansas doesn’t want me on the ballot—since the very first day of my campaign, the corrupt RINOs who control the GOP have done everything they can to silence me.

The Arkansas GOP is an incumbent protection racket, designed to prevent grassroots America First candidates like myself from challenging crooked corporate stooges like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack.

This fall,**the Carroll County GOP threw me offstage** at its Lincoln Day Dinner when I called out my opponent—to his face—for certifying the stolen 2020 election and voting with Nancy Pelosi for her Sham January 6th Witch Hunt.

Then, **the Republican Party of Arkansas disavowed me** as a “racist, sexist, bigot,” blacklisting me as a “non-recommended candidate.”

**Look at how easily they turn into cancel culture leftists -- calling me named like "bigoted" and "sexist," just like the Communist Democrats! **

_They’re treating me the _same _way that they treated President Trump._

**Of course, the reason they talk like Democrats is because they _are _Democrats.**

The very next day, **the GOP got me banned from my online payment processor** , Anedot.

In December, **the America Last Republican National Committee banned me from WinRed, their own fundraising platform**.

_Tomorrow, I have to pay the Arkansas GOP—the same thugs who are trying to drag my name through the mud—a**$15,000** “filing fee” just to get on the ballot._

Keep in mind that this is one of the _highest_ —if not _the _highest—filing fees in the entire country, while Arkansas remains one of the _poorest_ States in the country.

**The _only _purpose for such a high barrier of entry is to protect their Establishment cronies from candidates like myself—candidates who actually represent the American people.**

I have my paperwork in order, and I have my $15,000 check in hand, ready to go, even though it kills me to have to give these devils such a large sum.

Legally, they can’t keep me off of the ballot.

__But I know they’re going to try to__.

I’m personally invested in this struggle, in our fight for America’s future. **I put $30,000 of my own money into this campaign.**

**[_Help my campaign offset the cost of the GOP's $15,000 ransom fee by pitching in today._

_Defy the RINO Establishment by chipping in today. Each contribution sends them the message that they can't protect their cronies from Patriot primary challengers for a second longer--that we are coming __for_ _ them_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=4739b1594d&e=eda539b26b)**

Remember: They’re not just trying to silence and smear me; they’re trying to silence and smear YOU.

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=b1a2714be3&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=7aacbbffc5&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---

NeilforArkansas.comPO Box 652Bentonville, AR 72712-0652

clean_body: Just last week, Maggie's race was moved to Toss-Up status, making it a top target for the GOP. | | | = = We'll be honest, team — we're worried. Our Election Year Membership campaign expires at midnight tonight, and we're still 389 members short of our goal. What we do right now will determine the outcome of Senator Maggie Hassan's race in November. Just last week, Maggie's race was moved to Toss-Up status, making it a top target for the GOP. Already this cycle, Mitch McConnell and his allies have spent more than $7.5 MILLION in attack ads against Senator Hassan, and we know that more attacks are on the way. name: Pat Fallon
subject: Could you spare a few hours to help?
body:
[image: 1-2.jpeg]
Hi Friends,

We are just one week out from Election Day! As we close out Early Voting
this week, we could sure use some help poll sitting. You are getting this
email because you've indicated an interest in helping with the campaign -
and we can't thank you enough! Below is a link where you can pick and
choose locations/days and times. *You do not need to stay the whole time in
the slot you sign up for and can indicate hours of availability when you
sign up.*

https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0e4cada923abf8c52-poll

After you sign up, we'll reach out to get you materials to pass out at the
polls.

Again, thank you so very much for your help! We are almost across the
finish line and you will help us get there!

Take care and stay warm tonight!

Thanks again,
Andy
Deputy Campaign Manager
Fallon for Congress

Peter, many Americans were able to enjoy a leisurely 3-day weekend due to President’s Day – and will now work a reduced 4-day workweek.

_But what if every week was a 4-day workweek?_

I introduced a bill in Congress that would do exactly that. And the incredible news is that momentum for my legislation to establish a 4-day workweek is SKYROCKETING.

**Lawmakers have lined up to support my bill, including Alexandria Ocasio Cortez and Pramila Jayapal and the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and many companies are voluntarily instituting 4-day workweeks.**

It's time that we join the rest of other successful countries who have instituted a 4-day workweek. They've seen productivity increase and the overall happiness of workers as well.

[**But Peter, if I lose this seat, this momentum will be completely lost and we can say goodbye to ever imagining a 4-day workweek. clean_body: What if every week was like this... | = Peter, many Americans were able to enjoy a leisurely 3-day weekend due to President’s Day – and will now work a reduced 4-day workweek. But what if every week was a 4-day workweek? I introduced a bill in Congress that would do exactly that. And the incredible news is that momentum for my legislation to establish a 4-day workweek is SKYROCKETING. Lawmakers have lined up to support my bill, including Alexandria Ocasio Cortez and Pramila Jayapal and the Congressional Progressive Caucus, and many companies are voluntarily instituting 4-day workweeks. It's time that we join the rest of other successful countries who have instituted a 4-day workweek. They've seen productivity increase and the overall happiness of workers as well. = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much for your support. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. Peter,

This is Deb and Jerry writing to you (Abby's parents!), and that's our little girl you're looking at. **[Can we have just one minute of your time to ask you to make a donation to our daughter's campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley here in Iowa?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42115684/331704849/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk648-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWJjYWJiNy0zZjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xA9Ol5WuYLhxr3yTL22AbO1hjWT6bzVUrYRWkpxMnSw=)**
There are a _million_ reasons why this campaign and our daughter are worth fighting for, but here are just a few:
Our daughter is worth fighting for because close to two-thirds of likely voters don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley (who was our senator even way back when that photo you see was taken!), and he's facing record-low approval ratings here in Iowa.
Our daughter is worth fighting for because, after 47 years in Washington, Sen. Grassley has left Iowa working-class families like ours behind. Abby will be a true voice for working-class families in Washington.
Our daughter is worth fighting for because we know that nobody – _nobody_ – will work harder than Abby to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Democratic Senate majority in the process.
**Our daughter is worth fighting for because she has _always_ stood up for what's right and fought for what she believes in – and she's exactly the leader that Iowa needs right now.**
We've seen how this goes. Last time around, Iowa's Senate race was one of the most expensive in the country. To be able to compete with the GOP spending that will flood Iowa, Abby is counting on grassroots support. **So please, if you share our belief that our daughter is worth fighting for, will you make a grassroots donation to help her defeat Sen. Grassley?**
**[Donate $5 or more right now to help our daughter defeat Sen. Grassley and fight for working-class families here in Iowa. Every donation gets her that much closer to flipping this seat blue, so please chip in whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42115685/331704850/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk648-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWJjYWJiNy0zZjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xA9Ol5WuYLhxr3yTL22AbO1hjWT6bzVUrYRWkpxMnSw=)**

name: Max Steiner
subject: re: Trump's stolen documents
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42107126/331655050/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ0OTRhNi0xNjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I3B1vWuctQq4xO9uExsDDOpfK4m-flUCNpOnuyAwgP8=)
Friend,

I wanted to make sure we don't lose sight of the news from last week that Trump mishandled classified information. National security should concern every American, and this is especially true when war could be on the horizon. Let's not let Russian aggression distract us from Trump's crimes.

**News outlets recently reported that Donald Trump smuggled presidential records out of the White House when he left office. The National Archives retrieved the documents from Mar-a-Lago that were taken there illegally -- even though some were marked as "top secret."**

As someone with top secret clearance for over 15 years, it's hard to understate just how serious this crime is. If I took documents like these home, I would do so knowing it meant serious jail time, and frankly, that's what should happen to Trump and the staff who helped him do this. It's a clear violation of the law.

It's infuriating that Republicans like my opponent Doug LaMalfa were so quick to cheer "Lock Her Up" over Hilary Clinton's emails, but when Trump violates the law so blatantly, they sit silent and cower. It's truly pathetic.

**Guys like LaMalfa are so caught up in partisanship they are incapable of defending our Democracy and confronting extremists. Next November, they'll have to face the voters, and LaMalfa should expect a reckoning:**

[**If you're ready to defend democracy and the rule of law, chip in $3 today. It would go a long way in helping me get the word out about my campaign to more voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42107127/331655051/360059203?refcode=em-2.22.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ0OTRhNi0xNjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I3B1vWuctQq4xO9uExsDDOpfK4m-flUCNpOnuyAwgP8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42107128/331655052/360059203?refcode=em-2.21.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ0OTRhNi0xNjk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I3B1vWuctQq4xO9uExsDDOpfK4m-flUCNpOnuyAwgP8=)

name: Erica Smith
subject: A special opportunity for you →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey —

I think it’s time we got to know each other better. Maybe you’ve been
getting emails from me for a while now, or maybe it’s only been a few
weeks. However long you’ve been a supporter, thank you for being a part of
this movement.

It’s not an exaggeration to say that our country’s future depends on
competitive House races like ours in
NC-02. You’re a critical part of our movement.

And that’s why I want to open up this space to your questions. Anything
you want to ask me — about my personal life, my platform, my team, or
whether I prefer Bojangles or Cookout 👀 now’s the time to ask!

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/ask-me-anything?refcode=em20220222-1&t=1001&akid=906%2E3698%2EiZDHC7 ]So please, click here to ask me anything!

Ask your question →

You are truly helping shape this campaign — thank you. I’ll be sending out
the answers to the questions I get later next month.

Together,

Erica ❤️

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220222-906-footer&t=1002&refcode2=906_3698_iZDHC7&akid=906%2E3698%2EiZDHC7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=906%2E3698%2EiZDHC7

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

subject: THEY SPIED ON PRESIDENT TRUMP
body:
FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE DEEP STATE |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=fcb3c6c397&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

Special Counsel John Durham, through a court filing, showed that not only did the Clinton Campaign spy on President Trump in Trump Tower, but they continued to spy on him when he was President of The United States!

This bombshell report shows that the deep state is even worse than we previously thought. And if they can spy on a sitting President, they can spy on you too. We need Congressional oversight to push back against the swamp, and I will end these draconian practices when I am elected. [Join me today to stand with President Trump and fight back against the Deep State!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=a400403e6a&e=598f6aa24c) As President Reagan famously said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction. If we don’t stop the internal forces undermining our country now, it could be too late. Together, we can drain the swamp once and for all! [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=6e7dea24bc&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=70f3ef0801&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=110c166b8e&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=06a60cf124&e=598f6aa24c) Thank you,
David Curry

---
| Team, it can be a little hard to keep up with the latest extreme positions the AZ GOP are taking on a week-to-week basis.

But it’s important to know what the priorities of the AZ GOP are – besides sucking up to Donald Trump – so we wanted to give you an update. In the last month or so, they have proposed the following:

-**_Forcing_** teachers to “out” LGBTQ students to their parents.
-**_Advancing_** an extreme 15-week abortion ban with NO EXCEPTIONS for rape.
-**_Requiring_** students to undergo NRA-sponsored gun classes.

_Arizona has real problems_ – we’re facing a historic drought, our public schools need more investment, and more. But that’s not what the AZ GOP is focusing on. **They are pushing extreme measure after extreme measure.**

**[Team, the AZ GOP continues to grow more and more extreme, not limiting their extremism to elections. Can you make a $10 donation right now to our Blue AZ Fund so we can end the AZ GOP’s control of our state and flip AZ blue?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403VpHYrPggoK1a0mzadVjKJWuOgCTojwnZGJ6dn4lEFmQdsVKGDRTa-whLCEP4VaJ3KZPS0qHDqLfpsyn3hgOA9FCu2lqktGSkes9xMtr24du_TmrhOuqqUcUOSOr4ZI9QlQM0sWANFS7vtWE47GI1icAVNmnARzET3tMia_EIkic9tY8Qq27hOhi_Bna6jN9SVEGq8cz7XfUIULy8qOdJIYQZzBl99Y77DcIFVhMfcRkw35P6ZIzlX7F87Mq0t6SJ4SvyN6b00vq_mo5eSahsTfSC_1cdGcCwn9lSJ06F4IJMZ7P4XNyhhGMNBcajQtpRRuFFoCDz2NuUYM1wlgSaLZy87F46Q9n2o0AaltuYJAR9FaN7lp2CV80c8u37l05jhyisUzrcvjE3pJ4ffZPGgk-b7sYCF9P-WlVCWSXXpaE9RftgDX_gQgOKkaaYg-4KA/3js/hj6S8knFRVWrVwA2Q3wOEA/h1/W2d7YErpW6QFYA_IpzMgpWWzUWMnGhqLbWraSmgKrCc)** [
DONATE ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403VpHYrPggoK1a0mzadVjKJWuOgCTojwnZGJ6dn4lEFmQdsVKGDRTa-whLCEP4VaJ3G4IGBbA0smSzGFEaVDi16_avDux1sijlHTQEa-nOGUI0uoL3TNzI7BSoHHblAkWT4sWBr0o12tPFQL1Qd2tjBmSrmSUxgGj4GLTXLFhqvXctHME8lc0kSimuBExZNIXilO6gvfmGilCn6x4Xh7aw4SUKd1TYdYlPzn2p8pnghp87yHDqnT23tQXaIJuykvn68zs72oL9uPFVgkjieS3dnuCz2h5WnJ1kV6kLuPIf7U6SRsI_1N3hAR-cCL7iAK7C0lf0r-_nxMjjuK_Z2eY6dSysLd13sazqsxPfjgsXnZ8QiXyx6kWLpPlO0zCgcreFeGiHBtbsRjSMUyryHMiKNbCcYBVwlX1v2tmLX1qjLtrHNzstz-pCnjp103agp7nHQ/3js/hj6S8knFRVWrVwA2Q3wOEA/h2/h_gr1RbKMSpvixQvLYIl-vCo7nZlskFonSj4xhrjNBg)
This ridiculousness has to stop. But the AZ GOP has given into **extreme, far-right ideas, and they are incapable of proposing anything else.**

Our state and our people deserve better. _They deserve elected officials who will tackle our real – not manufactured – problems._

Because of supporters like you, we’ve made incredible progress in winning elections in 2018 and 2020. Through hard work and your support, we’re on the cusp of winning the remaining statewide offices and flipping control of the AZ legislature.

Help us finish the job this year and remove the extremists from power here in Arizona.

clean_body: | | | We need an end to this extremism. | | | Team, it can be a little hard to keep up with the latest extreme positions the AZ GOP are taking on a week-to-week basis. But it’s important to know what the priorities of the AZ GOP are – besides sucking up to Donald Trump – so we wanted to give you an update. In the last month or so, they have proposed the following: -Forcing teachers to “out” LGBTQ students to their parents. -Advancing an extreme 15-week abortion ban with NO EXCEPTIONS for rape. -Requiring students to undergo NRA-sponsored gun classes. Arizona has real problems – we’re facing a historic drought, our public schools need more investment, and more. But that’s not what the AZ GOP is focusing on. They are pushing extreme measure after extreme measure. This ridiculousness has to stop. But the AZ GOP has given into extreme, far-right ideas, and they are incapable of proposing anything else. Our state and our people deserve better. They deserve elected officials who will tackle our real – not manufactured – problems. Because of supporters like you, we’ve made incredible progress in winning elections in 2018 and 2020. Through hard work and your support, we’re on the cusp of winning the remaining statewide offices and flipping control of the AZ legislature. Help us finish the job this year and remove the extremists from power here in Arizona. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We have to fight back, Arizona Democrats For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . body:
what are your thoughts? | Did you see this viral image, friend? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42116074/331714899/2035722763?amount=6&refcode=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2IwMWJlYy00Mzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nld6HaJV0dvr8ENn42Y5UEyCImFBFaumH-CNKq6nZLo=) These aren’t commercial airline routes, but the rich in their private jets leaving the Super Bowl in the hours after the game — meanwhile, millions of Americans scramble just to come up with next month’s rent. _The system is truly rigged._ **Friend, we have an income inequality crisis in this country, and it’s about damn time Wall Street and the wealthiest people pay their fair share in taxes — do you agree?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42116076/331714901/-994121507?amount=6&refcode=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2IwMWJlYy00Mzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nld6HaJV0dvr8ENn42Y5UEyCImFBFaumH-CNKq6nZLo=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42116077/331714902/-994121507?amount=6&refcode=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2IwMWJlYy00Mzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nld6HaJV0dvr8ENn42Y5UEyCImFBFaumH-CNKq6nZLo=)
---|---
It’s no secret that there is something profoundly wrong with the income distribution in the U.S.:
* We have MORE income inequality than any other developed nation in the world.
* The super-rich pay lower tax rates than the poorest Americans.
* The wealthiest 1% of Americans hold more wealth than the entire middle class.

I’ve had enough. I am running for Congress to ensure middle and working-class families have a fighter in their corner. But I really want to know you’re with me on this. **Do you think the rich should pay their fair share in taxes?**
[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42116078/331714903/-994121507?amount=6&refcode=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2IwMWJlYy00Mzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nld6HaJV0dvr8ENn42Y5UEyCImFBFaumH-CNKq6nZLo=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42116081/331714906/-994121507?amount=6&refcode=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.27b01bec-4394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2IwMWJlYy00Mzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nld6HaJV0dvr8ENn42Y5UEyCImFBFaumH-CNKq6nZLo=)
---|---
Thanks for sticking with me,
Matt West

Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220222&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220222&amount=28]
Friend,
In this day and age, there is a profound mistrust of government. I hear it everywhere I go, and that overall mistrust means that average Americans are bowing out of elections, out of watching the news, and feeling like neither political party (nor our democratic system) is working for them. So, at this moment, it’s more important than ever that we help rebuild that trust.
Case in point: there’s a new bipartisan bill that simply states that members of Congress should not be able to abuse their positions to get rich. It’s just common sense. Members of Congress shouldn’t trade stocks based on the privileged or classified information we have access to as members.
That’s why I recently announced that I will be co-sponsoring the TRUST in Congress Act and the Ban Conflicted Trading Act.
Members of Congress, by nature of their jobs, tend to know in advance about key hearings or legislative movements that could affect the price of a stock. The Ban Conflicted Trading Act bans them and their spouses from buying or selling individual stocks while in office.
Unfortunately, senior leaders from both the Republican and Democratic parties have already come out against this bill, but a bipartisan cast of Members have been pushing Speaker Pelosi to bring it to the floor for a vote.
The solutions laid out in these bills to improve government transparency are bipartisan, they’re common sense, and they will help earn back some of the trust of the American people. It’s one of the small but significant things Congress should do to help eradicate even the perception of corruption.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220222&amount=28]
Thank you for reading,
Elissa

He didn’t ask for money to re-open Loretto Hospital which was closed due to corrupt Covid vaccine distribution. He didn’t even ask for money to build a grocery store, which the Westside desperately needs. name: Larry Elder
subject: I wasn’t ready for this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA
body:
We started a movement, fellow patriot, and now we’re going to put it to work for the American people! | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c274673010e24b85af7f819aa841ecc0&_e=7nHinw1lS6csuuxi5mvkwEY9BGlVBwUQB_mkD_4zM9vCk8yJ9UKodryk8mN3U9tYbAJfvU9boCNNs6mVTKYLNgmaRw6JokaDDq2QRetPmVrZsw6Nzffi_UMAF-PAC8b1dxe0HHmRPZuDn9UIuYRhBgo7xy6kLh86UuHDSCUkzMtQAo0yCgfRpbQmU8aDGm96YOoK8AMxO7YZNyZAEw0pHzkyirUoFPIJYxCLz8HLpySAJ7paYVHOEzIzoDU87kUIYU9mOpw6_OqCOpbBtFjpJiLVZEpkF7aIpKcb5meaohy5DixYtsu3Rg71Py730_oqQI-JMG3MRvMVTT7xuU-0mBdf0K7PDUHQwLCVzznyZaJMyA-XN3Q6Z7bS_g6SEyxuauzJsJDQEIV_9qu5r-ug27IuGxe_RfPs7uxpU2PBqyiJmWoo0tQnq2mCuv8q1jEi)
---
Fellow patriot,

When I launched my 2021 campaign for Governor of California against Gavin Newsom, I was ready for the tough fight to come. But what I wasn’t ready for was the overwhelming support I received from all over the country.

**We started a movement, fellow patriot, and now we’re going to put it to work for the American people!**

As you probably saw, I launched [**Elder for America PAC**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c274673010e24b85af7f819aa841ecc0&_e=7nHinw1lS6csuuxi5mvkwEY9BGlVBwUQB_mkD_4zM9vCk8yJ9UKodryk8mN3U9tYbAJfvU9boCNNs6mVTKYLNgmaRw6JokaDDq2QRetPmVrZsw6Nzffi_UMAF-PAC8b1dxe0HHmRPZuDn9UIuYRhBgo7xy6kLh86UuHDSCUkzMtQAo0yCgfRpbQmU8aDGm96YOoK8AMxO7YZNyZAEw0pHzkyirUoFPIJYxCLz8HLpySqiAB9onnPyGPfCSC8zKF2hsFDIx9Bt8WXC1rTi_CNzmucHQQ8Cc3PZc-TsJv_Q8ZwTgr0ITFnPWohSdS6FneRoAZIY4AiVpBrj_NKpQbP1oiq8_dWg9y2oIgAbtqyHrr3eeLsc7UxefC3NckXc-Sbq4XTxNzZfT1wEfTRpBi4kT2Gtq3b20-6BCrgtL31URUt-R80X6EbAbk8ZpWpswTm) last month to support Republican candidates in target races around the country to help win back the House and Senate.

[**HELP LARRY ELDER SAVE AMERICA -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c274673010e24b85af7f819aa841ecc0&_e=7nHinw1lS6csuuxi5mvkwEY9BGlVBwUQB_mkD_4zM9vCk8yJ9UKodryk8mN3U9tYbAJfvU9boCNNs6mVTKYLNgmaRw6JokaDDq2QRetPmVrZsw6Nzffi_UMAF-PAC8b1dxe0HHmRPZuDn9UIuYRhBgo7xy6kLh86UuHDSCUkzMtQAo0yCgfRpbQmU8aDGm96YOoK8AMxO7YZNyZAEw0pHzkyirUoFPIJYxCLz8HLpyRJ9TUurV1ffbMlPUfSI1j-Azy0DPl2iAHue5bNsW8j-d4xxW8Spbp2xn7DvkDw3EjPXtucLuSgz0dZItH-pLcDqvOyvRGMgce4r-Rg8BukKVqDBsvwdtWexzFtOmO2c3G7kyxFhCi9UPhslMGf6aXNKdxyxoJUknjVhqukeffQnoURHgRGkgUqOSl1WTqygyGDN98luriJqmZ6kvrSB01C)
But it doesn’t stop there. Along with winning back Congress, Elder for America PAC is going to take on these fights at the local level:
1. Campaign for school choice.
2. Campaign against Critical Race Theory.
3. Campaign to get rid of soft-on-crime District Attorneys.
4. Campaign against early release of violent criminals.

As you probably saw, I launched last month to support Republican candidates in target races around the country to help win back the House and Senate. But it doesn’t stop there. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Cheny and Pelosi Hate Me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Not legit. |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2681e73a9b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I guess putting forth groundbreaking legislation to decertify the irredeemably compromised 2020 election was the straw that ultimately broke the camels’ back.

**Now, the scared and fragile Democrats are roping me into their phony January 6 th “investigation.”**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=683de3e346&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c86cd2c508&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **So what qualifies me for the privilege of being part of this sham hearing? **

**_“In the days following the January 6 th attack on the United States Capitol, you stated that you were also in Washington D.C. ‘to deliver an evidence book and letter to Vice President Pence showing key evidence of fraud in the Arizona Presidential Election, and asking him to consider postponing the awarding of electors...’ You have also indicated that you were at the Capitol Grounds on January 6 and ‘took a few photos.’”_**

So the damning evidence against me is I wanted to peacefully provide Vice President Pence with evidence and take a few photos? What a joke.

**Look at the date of the letter. February 15 th.**

**Just one week after I submitted legislation to decertify Arizona.**

**_There is a grand irony here. The letter also reads:_**

_“The Select Committee has tremendous respect for the roles and responsibilities of federal, state, and local elected officials and we do not seek information from you that is related to official actions that you took as an elected lawmaker. At the same time, we have a solemn responsibility to investigate fully the facts and circumstances of these events.”_

Tremendous respect? If that were the case perhaps they might show respect for the authority of state legislators to conduct inquiry into factual claims of mischievous behaviors such as those memorialized in HCR-2033.

**_State Legislatures are RESPONSIBLE for State Elections. Period._**

The point is this. The kangaroo court has turned their laser focus for their witch hunt on me, and on Arizona. [This is why I need your help to fight back.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8622c46351&e=44b8c466b0)

[Please support my campaign and support my fight in Arizona. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=231dd9af46&e=44b8c466b0) We are taking a lot of heat from the Democrats in DC who are afraid of what would happen if we Decertify Arizona.

[This is why we must press on, harder than ever! Please consider donating today with just $5, $10, $25, or $50!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0aff55079f&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a97d77edbf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=83bd30013e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f95ce23fec&e=44b8c466b0)

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=8b86c79e8f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=8b86c79e8f).

body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)

| Peter,**__
__****
**We are very excited to have**Collin Raye** in concert this **Wednesday** , **February 23rd** (tomorrow evening!) in Idaho. If you haven't got your tickets yet, it is not too late. In fact, if you [purchase tickets online](http://collinconcert.com) now you will save $10 off the door price.

I don't need to remind you of how great of a concert this is going to be. Collin Raye has had _4 consecutive _platinum_ albums_, with 4 of his singles reaching **Number One on the** _**Billboard**_ country music charts. My friends, he is a phenomenal performer. But above all, Collin is a _patriot_ and loves this country!

[Buy tickets today!](http://collinconcert.com) Take your spouse or friend to the Collin Raye concert **tomorrow evening in Emmett, Idaho** at [Stoney's Road House](https://stoneysroadhouse.com).

There are also a _few_ **VIP** **Tickets** left as well! Here is the link to purchase tickets online: [**www.CollinConcert.com**](http://www.collinconcert.com)**
**
See you there! :-D

* * *
**Concert Sponsors**

[](http://ersinc-nw.com/)

body:

Friend, The Build Back Better Act would be transformative for New Jersey families. **The bill would deliver affordable healthcare, lower prescription drug costs, cheaper childcare, climate action, and middle-class tax relief.** Plus, it would keep a quarter-million New Jersey children out of poverty thanks to the extended Child Tax Credit. Bill Pascrell is proud to have voted for this bill in the House in December and urges his Senate colleagues to join him in supporting this transformative legislation that helps middle-class families. **[Bill has been a champion for this legislation since it was first announced, and he's still fighting for it. Will you sign on to support our fight to "Bill" Back Better?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXd5XIJlToiKqHiKJ2pu-n4VDJnnDzjK-dV5HzODvdr8Vf7rvpICgS3EtEQo0q5s4sSnHDMgMy9qYnQokmjOHvmBWKBYvanaT2SKZMlDH67xgXB-YPVBOx-RtEIzUjqsBhRGBGzoN4ayjVSm0D_B2LFyIqJI_IVPECPLbUjjNpHLhypfiFQiNnNmnMnZL5j1ZvA7kf21S55hmDs1Q3UK92vsmd2vEXyQSuvhmG-J3BAlsyyybfKECIApW2-cq9F3nBmy8xpfsI0aFY52wWs41Q3o/3js/httTTPgPTO69zSj_m6zwRA/h1/hcriNOZTD7r5957Q0lSQZQri581MlIEqhYXeydjrTs4)** **[Add your name! →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXd5XIJlToiKqHiKJ2pu-n4VDJnnDzjK-dV5HzODvdr8Vf7rvpICgS3EtEQo0q5s4sSnHDMgMy9qYnQokmjOHvmDjkkB_Ia06JnzBLElR8hEfoe0Zjb9a_T6xrnonFgFe_n-2qEwZBpP2jbC7VNMtACxS10S596gsKczxJwrad_AOAwWJ62Qad70y7m1TXBvFM-8eOZs2YLMlBKTnYEwc_9v-GWAumcmv73oHq5bf5siIiSvXbsjdTan-WWcXjrGImbtcXC5YJqW1x1X3ljMQMS8/3js/httTTPgPTO69zSj_m6zwRA/h2/AzEcr7j2OytwwfDYGbwdoddUmjsTrVUBWgvXkyr4Yls)** Thank you, friend! \- Team Pascrell

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: I’m Scott Baugh and I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=d544de2d94&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,

It’s time to bring sane representation back to Orange County!

**I’m Scott Baugh** \- a local business owner who had the privilege to serve Orange County in our State Assembly, where **I led Republicans fighting back against California’s pro-lockdown, anti-freedom left-wing politicians.**

I’ve Chaired both Orange County’s Republican Party and Orange County’s Gang Reduction Intervention Program, as well as helped found the Institute for Fair Elections and Orange County Marathon Foundation.

I love the O.C. and want to see it represented in the U.S. House by somebody who will work to bring jobs and industry to Southern California!

Unfortunately, Orange County’s current representative – Katie Porter – has been doing the opposite. She’s a cheerleader for Gavin Newsom’s and Nancy Pelosi’s inflationary agenda.

What she refuses to admit and what I know to be true is that _prosperity and freedom are directly linked._ I will always fight to limit the state’s ability to infringe on our liberties!

_I also know that law, order, and public safety aren’t negotiable_ \- they are the bare minimum that any government promises its constituents. _That’s why we need to strengthen our Southern border and stand up for our police officers_ – two things Katie Porter _refuses_ to do.

**Peter, here’s the frank truth** : the only way we’re going to see success in protecting our freedoms and ensuring our public safety is if Republicans take back Congress in November. That means **defeating Katie Porter** to turn the new California 47th red!

**It’s time we had a Representative in the House who put the needs and freedoms of Orange County above their far-left agenda. I am determined to be that Representative for you.**

**So, please, will you join me in fighting to take back Orange County’s congressional seat for Orange County’s people?**
---
| [JOIN US](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=a0a7e8fea0&e=8a657725d1 "JOIN US")
---
| For Orange County,
Scott Baugh
---
| | [Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322]( "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322")

What she refuses to admit and what I know to be true is that prosperity and freedom are directly linked. I will always fight to limit the state’s ability to infringe on our liberties! I also know that law, order, and public safety aren’t negotiable \- they are the bare minimum that any government promises its constituents. That’s why we need to strengthen our Southern border and stand up for our police officers – two things Katie Porter refuses to do. Peter, here’s the frank truth : the only way we’re going to see success in protecting our freedoms and ensuring our public safety is if Republicans take back Congress in November. That means defeating Katie Porter to turn the new California 47th red! It’s time we had a Representative in the House who put the needs and freedoms of Orange County above their far-left agenda. I am determined to be that Representative for you. So, please, will you join me in fighting to take back Orange County’s congressional seat for Orange County’s people? | "JOIN US" | For Orange County, Scott Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322" | Copyright © 2022 Scott Baugh for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we’re putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

| | |

| | |
Friend,

I’m writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America’s truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we’ve endured over the past two years, _and we’re taking action._

**That’s right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80028&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMg== "SUPPORT THE
CONVOY")_**
We’ve had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it’s just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN’T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don’t stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80028&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMg== "which is why
we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our
independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80029&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9MTU= "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$30 = 20 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80030&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9MzA= "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

**_[$150 = 100 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80031&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9MTUw "$150 = 100
Miles")_**

**_[$375 = 250 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80032&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9Mzc1 "$375 = 250
Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80033&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9NzUw "$750 = 500
Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80034&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9MTUwMA== "$1,500 = 1,000
Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we’re putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=147906&L=80028&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMg== "So, I hope you’ll

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don’t stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, == "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform." Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! = "$15 = 10 Miles" = "$30 = 20 Miles" "$150 = 100 Miles" "$375 = 250 Miles" "$750 = 500 Miles" == "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles" We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we’re putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back. == "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount." body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office
#teamkatie

Rep. Liz Cheney with close friend Rep. Jamie Raskin, whose wife has been nominated for a job that would allow her to cause significant harm to Wyoming’s industries

Rep. Liz Cheney has not uttered a word in protest against Biden’s nominee for the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, a nominee whose clearly-stated policy views would allow her to cause significant harm to Wyoming’s industries. The nominee, Sarah Bloom Raskin, is an ardent opponent of fossil fuels and, if confirmed, is expected to use her position to limit energy industry access to capital. Raskin is the wife of Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-MD), Cheney’s close friend and colleague on the sham January 6th Committee, which continues its unrelenting attacks on former President Donald Trump and his supporters.
Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives in Wyoming, today issued the following statement:
“It can be accurately stated that the most dangerous place in Washington, D.C. is between Liz Cheney and a television camera when she’s promoting her work on the illegitimate January 6th Committee. But she has been strangely silent when it comes to her friend on the committee, Democratic Congressman Jamie Raskin, and the fact that his wife has been nominated for the powerful job of regulating banking.
“Sarah Bloom Raskin is an outspoken, radical opponent of the fossil fuels industries that are critically important not only to Wyoming, but the country as a whole. She has repeatedly argued for starving our traditional energy industries of money as a means to advance her extreme environmentalist agenda. She would be a disaster for Wyoming, and this doesn’t take into account serious questions about her past behavior in securing a sweetheart arrangement for a Colorado bank to which she was connected. This is another case of powerful people becoming more powerful and wealthy, while normal people at home suffer the consequences.
“Cheney is doing Nancy Pelosi’s political dirty work on the January 6th Committee. It is now obvious that she will remain entirely silent on an unqualified and dangerous nominee whose goal is to destroy our energy industries, in order to protect her friendship with a Democrat on the committee. While it’s true that the Senate is charged with considering the president’s nominations, as our only member of the House of Representatives, it is Cheney’s responsibility to expose the underlying corruption and stand up and be heard in opposition. Once again, she is not doing her job because she cares more about her D.C. elitist friends and their quests for power than she does about protecting the people of Wyoming.”

name: Morgan Harper
subject: “Angry Black woman”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220222-701-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=701%2E90090%2Er9IMAS ]Morgan Harper

This is
what we are running against in this race. This is why we need to stand up
to right-wing extremism.

During last night’s debate, Josh Mandel:

* Said I’m “dumber than AOC.”
* Called me “angry” multiple times during the debate.
* Characterized Black Lives Matter activists as “thugs.”

I refuse to be characterized as an “angry black woman” for fighting for
what’s right. I’m more motivated than ever to run this race for the
people.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/26654?t=1003&akid=701%2E90090%2Er9IMAS ]We’re in an uphill battle against extremely racist and sexist rhetoric
from opponents who will do whatever they can to discredit me and our
campaign. Can you help me fight back by donating $5 or
anything you can right now?

It’s UNACCEPTABLE that in 2022, Black women like me still have to face
these racist and sexist comments when we speak up, but what’s even more
unfortunate is that this isn’t anything unique.

People like Josh Mandel have told Black women what we should do and what
we should say for too long! I’m sick of my fellow Black women and girls
having to endure this narrative and not having the space or opportunity to
fight back.

Josh Mandel’s comments are an example of the insidious racial stereotypes
thrown at Black women every day and I won’t stand for it.

They say we’re too loud, too angry, too much. People like Josh Mandel
don’t want people who look like me to take up space. But I refuse to be
silenced. I’m passionate about creating a better Ohio and a better world —
and I’m not going to slow down now.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/26654?t=1004&akid=701%2E90090%2Er9IMAS ]Can you help power our campaign today by donating $5?
Black women candidates raise on average half of what white candidates
raise, so it’s critical that our grassroots campaign has a steady stream
of donations.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/26660?refcode=em20220222-701&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=701%2E90090%2Er9IMAS ]Contribute $5

We’ve NEVER elected a Black woman from Ohio to the U.S. Senate. I won’t

Morgan

clean_body: [ ]Morgan Harper This is what we are running against in this race. This is why we need to stand up to right-wing extremism. During last night’s debate, Josh Mandel: Said I’m “dumber than AOC.” Called me “angry” multiple times during the debate. * Characterized Black Lives Matter activists as “thugs.” I refuse to be characterized as an “angry black woman” for fighting for what’s right. I’m more motivated than ever to run this race for the people. [ ]We’re in an uphill battle against extremely racist and sexist rhetoric from opponents who will do whatever they can to discredit me and our campaign. Can you help me fight back by donating $5 or anything you can right now? It’s UNACCEPTABLE that in 2022, Black women like me still have to face these racist and sexist comments when we speak up, but what’s even more unfortunate is that this isn’t anything unique. People like Josh Mandel have told Black women what we should do and what we should say for too long! I’m sick of my fellow Black women and girls having to endure this narrative and not having the space or opportunity to fight back. Josh Mandel’s comments are an example of the insidious racial stereotypes thrown at Black women every day and I won’t stand for it. They say we’re too loud, too angry, too much. People like Josh Mandel don’t want people who look like me to take up space. But I refuse to be silenced. I’m passionate about creating a better Ohio and a better world — and I’m not going to slow down now. [ ]Can you help power our campaign today by donating $5? Black women candidates raise on average half of what white candidates raise, so it’s critical that our grassroots campaign has a steady stream of donations. [ ]Contribute $5 We’ve NEVER elected a Black woman from Ohio to the U.S. Senate. I won’t stop until we change that. And I refuse to let someone like Josh Mandel stand in the way. Thank you for your time and support, Morgan [ ][IMG] Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

| | | Friend, One year of Governor McKee has been disastrous, four more years would be devastating. First his administration allowed health insurance companies to hike rates in the midst of the pandemic. Then he was caught giving a multi-million dollar state contract to one of his close allies. And most recently he misled the public by hiding COVID data right before the highest spike of the pandemic. But today, Governor McKee announced that he’s seeking a second term as Governor. Like us, you’re might wondering how he thinks he can win a campaign after a scandal ridden first year as Governor. What Governor McKee hasn’t told you is that he’s spent his first year as Governor raking in cash from corporate PACs and corporate lobbyists while pushing a conservative agenda that benefits corporations and the ultra-wealthy. Friend, we can’t afford another 4 years of the McKee administration. Unlike the Governor, Matt and Cynthia are refusing to take money from corporate PACs and corporate lobbyists. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Pictures from Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter, I'm fired up.
#
Peter, I'm fired up.
This weekend, I joined my friend Rep. Sylvia Garcia and labor leaders in Austin ahead of the March 1st Texas primary to get out the vote for Greg Casar — a proven community leader running for Congress in TX-35 who consistently puts working families first:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220222?refcode=em20220222-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=1051_420207_SWiaoS&akid=1051%2E420207%2ESWiaoS)
Expanding our progressive coalition in the House starts with strong candidates like Greg, who is ready to dive headfirst into our tough but necessary fights on Medicare for All, climate action, creating good jobs, affordable housing, and so much more. **But this primary in Texas is a big one — and as the first congressional primary of this midterm election year, what we achieve now could set the tone for the rest of the cycle.**
[**So I have to ask: Can you contribute $3 today to help our movement elect more progressives and defend the Democratic majority in Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220222?refcode=em20220222-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=1051_420207_SWiaoS&akid=1051%2E420207%2ESWiaoS) _We can’t afford to fall short — not with so much on the line for working people:_
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220222?refcode=em20220222-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=1051_420207_SWiaoS&akid=1051%2E420207%2ESWiaoS)**
If you want to read more about our year-round organizing work, I’m attaching our team’s email from over the weekend down below.
In solidarity,
Pramila
\-----Forwarded Message-----
Sent: February 19, 2022
From: Team Jayapal
Subject: Pramila in Texas
Peter,
Regardless of the election cycle, our team is always working to organize communities, register voters, and build progressive power. Last year, we made over 100,000 calls to voters, and we are gearing up to help elect Democrats like Greg Casar in the upcoming Texas primaries.
In-person early voting has already begun in Texas — and Pramila is in Texas _right now_ getting out the vote for Greg. The 2022 election cycle is officially underway.
[**It takes immense resources to run such a robust organizing program like this, and every contribution ensures that our team can continue this vital work. Can you contribute $3 to fuel Pramila’s year-round organizing work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220222?refcode=em20220222-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=1051_420207_SWiaoS&akid=1051%2E420207%2ESWiaoS)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220222?refcode=em20220222-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&refcode2=1051_420207_SWiaoS&akid=1051%2E420207%2ESWiaoS)**
Pramila is proud to run a year-round organizing program. Many elected officials wait until September of an election year to begin their organizing efforts. Team Pramila believes in doing things a little differently — we organize all year, every year because we know power cannot be built in a span of a few weeks.
Pramila started out as an organizer, fighting locally (and successfully) to raise the minimum wage in Seattle to $15. She hasn’t stopped being an organizer and she won’t stop knocking doors and building power for the people.
[**Peter, can you contribute $3 today to help Pramila defend the Democratic majority in Congress and organize to elect progressives? There’s a lot of work to do to expand our Progressive Caucus and ensure the GOP does not take power.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220222?refcode=em20220222-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=42&refcode2=1051_420207_SWiaoS&akid=1051%2E420207%2ESWiaoS)
We’ll be sure to update you on Pramila’s trip to Texas and her organizing work across the country as this election year continues.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Giffords
subject: A huge victory for Sandy Hook parents against the gun industry. Now we must join them in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It is hard to overstate the importance of this victory.
#

Friends -
Last week, several parents of children killed during the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School won a historic $73 million settlement against Remington, the maker of the weapon used in the massacre.
It is hard to overstate the importance of this victory.
Since 2005, most believed the gun industry was immune from lawsuits where there has been “criminal or unlawful use” of a firearm or ammunition.
This victory in court is a huge milestone—but is the exception to the rule, and we must do more.
Imagine the courage of these families. Imagine losing your child, then pressing on to push for background checks, losing that fight months later and deciding to continue to seek justice—for years—in what everyone said was an uphill struggle at best.
Now Congress must finish the job. Congress must repeal the Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act (PLCAA) that has shielded them for 17 years.
If the Sandy Hook families can have the courage to keep up the fight, the least we can do is make our voices heard with them:
[**Sign Giffords’ petition: Tell Congress to repeal the immunity granted to gun manufacturers and dealers in the Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/plcaa_petition_feb22?source=em220222-1-15&t=1&akid=1607%2E3935704%2ErTVSWF)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/plcaa_petition_feb22?source=em220222-1-15&t=2&akid=1607%2E3935704%2ErTVSWF)**
Civil liability has historically played a critical role in injury prevention lawsuits against the tobacco industry and forced cigarette manufacturers to adopt new ways to market their products to prevent youth smoking, and against car manufacturers to adopt better safety measures and reduce automobile deaths.
It’s time to place the firearm industry on equal ground with other American industries.
Sign our petition if you agree.
[**Sign Giffords’ petition: Tell Congress to repeal the immunity granted to gun manufacturers and dealers in the Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/plcaa_petition_feb22?source=em220222-1-15&t=3&akid=1607%2E3935704%2ErTVSWF)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/plcaa_petition_feb22?source=em220222-1-15&t=4&akid=1607%2E3935704%2ErTVSWF)**
Thank you.
Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1607%2E3935704%2ErTVSWF) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen Action
subject: [SIGN ON] Tell the government no drilling in Alaska
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We can flex our grassroots power.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-bureau-land-management-willow/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&t=2&akid=12945%2E53494%2EW2NoY1) | The Arctic is warming rapidly. Fossil fuel companies are to blame. And ConocoPhillips wants to put "chillers" in the ground under its proposed drilling project so the permafrost won't melt while they pump out millions of barrels of oil. It's totally dystopian.
---

| [TAKE ACTION NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-bureau-land-management-willow/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&t=3&akid=12945%2E53494%2EW2NoY1)
---
Friend,
Here's the deal: In late 2020, the Trump administration approved the Willow Master Development Plan—a 30-year plan to drill for fossil fuels in sensitive Alaskan ecosystems and near Indigenous communities. It would be the single largest oil extraction project currently proposed on U.S. public land.
Willow is deeply incompatible with President Biden's climate commitment to reduce greenhouse gas pollution. It's slated to pump nearly 600 million barrels of oil over three decades—that's roughly equivalent to the annual greenhouse gas pollution of a third of all coal plants in the country. If there were ever a project the Biden administration should reject on climate grounds, it's this one. (Trust me on this: I'm one of Evergreen's new Policy Leads, and I work on our Freedom From Fossil Fuels policy beat. Nice to meet you!)
**And now, we have a rare chance to tell the government that directly.** The Bureau of Land Management has opened a public comment period about Willow's environmental impact.
[**_Will you sign a public comment speaking out against Willow? Just add your name, and we'll officially submit it on your behalf before the upcoming deadline!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-bureau-land-management-willow/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&t=4&akid=12945%2E53494%2EW2NoY1)
[SUBMIT AN OFFICIAL COMMENT](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-bureau-land-management-willow/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&t=5&akid=12945%2E53494%2EW2NoY1)
---
Our fight for a just, livable clean energy future isn't just about passing legislation or urging executive action. It's about showing up at _every_ opportunity and flexing our grassroots power for climate wins across all of the government.
Willow is an urgent threat to the future we're fighting for. This is our chance to shut it down and directly influence policy. [**_Add your name to make an official comment today! (We have a pre-written comment ready for you, and we'll take care of officially submitting it before the approaching deadline.)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-bureau-land-management-willow/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&t=6&akid=12945%2E53494%2EW2NoY1)
Thank you for taking direct action today,
Mattea Mrkusic
Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
P.S. We submitted more than 2,500 of your official comments on banking's impact on the climate crisis to the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency earlier this month. [**_Click here to submit your official comment against drilling for fossil fuels in Alaska and help us smash that record!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-bureau-land-management-willow/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&t=7&akid=12945%2E53494%2EW2NoY1)
[MAKE AN OFFICIAL COMMENT](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-bureau-land-management-willow/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&source=ema_2022-02-22_BLM_willow_&t=8&akid=12945%2E53494%2EW2NoY1)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=12945%2E53494%2EW2NoY1). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

It's about showing up at every opportunity and flexing our grassroots power for climate wins across all of the government. Willow is an urgent threat to the future we're fighting for. This is our chance to shut it down and directly influence policy. Thank you for taking direct action today, Mattea Mrkusic Policy Lead, Evergreen Action P.S. We submitted more than 2,500 of your official comments on banking's impact on the climate crisis to the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency earlier this month.

Apologies for reaching out again, friend, but I need you to hear this urgent update.
_**FIRST:**_ I reached out to tell you that I was falling dangerously short of my fundraising goal.
_**THEN:**_ Hundreds of grassroots supporters from all across the country stepped up to close my fundraising gap.

**In the race that will determine Senate control, I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio – and top Democrats like Fred Guttenberg have said "we need an advocate like Val Demings, whose strength and integrity is exactly what Florida needs to replace him."**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the Senate Republican campaign arm is funding a new ad buy to blanket the airwaves with personal attacks against me _._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42117144/331724670/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2476-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjE4NzMzMS01MTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gom7GEfzo6tVeXpBZE6WHGedfW8iEXRr9MzVqpCQkow=)**

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Elise Stefanik, remember her?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
GOP Senate candidate Ted Budd was just endorsed by this woman:
#

New York Republican Rep. Elise Stefanik just waded into the North Carolina Senate race and endorsed one of our extreme GOP opponents, Rep. Ted Budd.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-t1&refcode2=439.357359.lZ2nds&t=1&akid=439%2E357359%2ElZ2nds)_Image credit: Associated Press_
Remember her?
She’s one of the most ardent defenders of Trump’s lies and corruption in Congress. She tried to blame Speaker Pelosi for the January 6 insurrection and said "Nancy Pelosi bears responsibility, as speaker of the House, for the tragedy." She has not only tried to protect Steve Bannon, but she went on his podcast to promote conspiracy theories about election fraud.
And guess what? Ted Budd said he was “honored” to have her endorsement.
Budd has made clear he will put Donald Trump and conspiracy theories before North Carolinians — and now the far-right is rewarding his loyalty and spending millions of dollars to prop up his campaign.
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign to help us fight back against the far-right national Republicans who are trying to keep this seat? We need a U.S. Senator who will be a voice for our families, not an extremist who will spread Trump’s lies and dishonesty.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220222-1-t1&refcode2=439.357359.lZ2nds&noskip=true&t=2&akid=439%2E357359%2ElZ2nds)

body:

name: Team Reeves
subject: Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement by King George Sheriff Chris Giles
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REEVES FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement by King George Sheriff Chris Giles
| | |
---
| | [](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100017f23759aa3-589ca1ec-23ed-4b27-ba2c-fbb66eeb643d-000000/ZyHD14VBJyqTJgMbbSVU-yDqA8E=259)
---
| |
---
| **Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement by King George Sheriff Chris Giles** Today, Senator Bryce Reeves (R-Spotsylvania) announced the endorsement of King George Sheriff, Chris Giles. Sheriff Giles said, "After serving 29 years as both a deputy in King George and now as Sheriff, I can endorse Bryce Reeves with full confidence in the 7th Congressional District. Not only does he understand the ins and outs of law enforcement after serving as a narcotics detective in Prince William County, but as a Senator he has stood his ground time and again: advocating for law enforcement, defending our God-given rights, and fighting for conservative values. I appreciate his commitment to service and I am eager to continue working with him as our Congressman."
Bryce Reeves stated, “Sheriff Giles is in touch with the needs of our law enforcement in our community, and I am so honored to have his support in this race. As a former narcotics detective, I know first hand the concerns of our law enforcement community. I have always stood with them in Richmond, and will continue to do so in Washington, where I will be one of only eight former law enforcement officials in the House of Representatives.” Sheriff Giles has been with the King George Sheriffs Office since January of 1993. He was elected to Sheriff, after being chief deputy, in 2019 securing over 66% of the vote. Sheriff Giles is next in a long list of support from the law enforcement community in this race. Other Sheriffs from the 7th Congressional District supporting Reeves in this campaign include Sheriff Jenkins (Culpeper), Sheriff Lippa (Caroline), Sheriff Higgs (Fredericksburg), Sheriff Decatur (Stafford), Sheriff Harris (Spotsylvania) and Sheriff Amos (Orange). Bryce has also received endorsements from Sheriffs outside the district, including from the those in both Louisa and Montgomery counties. In addition, Commonwealth Attorney Travis Bird of Spotsylvania has thrown his support behind Senator Reeves. Members of the General Assembly in the 7th District have also been rallying around Bryce's campaign. Members of the General Assembly that have endorsed Bryce Reeves include Del. Rob Bell (R-Albemarle), Del. Nick Freitas (R-Culpeper), Del. Tara Durant (R-Stafford), Del. Phillip Scott (R-Spotsylvania), Senator Richard Stuart (R-Westmoreland) and former Speaker Bill Howell (R-Stafford). Other key endorsements for the Reeves campaign include activists like Paul Galanti as well as national groups and leaders, including former Secretary of Energy Rick Perry, former ICE Director Tom Homan, Senator Marco Rubio, SEAL PAC, and FreedomWorks. ### Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, auxiliary sheriff’s deputy in Culpeper County, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. He currently represents the 17th District in the Virginia Senate, which includes the City of Fredericksburg and the Counties of Albemarle (part), Culpeper (part), Louisa (part), Orange, and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is the Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County.
---
|

subject: AG Paxton Sues Biden to End Airplane Mask Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION
body:
These anti-science mandates must end. | | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=3fee122d38&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
|
Patriot -

Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton here.

**I am suing the CDC and the Biden Administration to finally END the intrusive and anti-science mask mandates on airlines and at airports.**

The science is clear \- most masks do nothing to prevent the transmission of COVID-19, and forcing all travelers to wear masks defies common sense.

The law is also clear - Congress has never voted to give the CDC the authority to mandate masks, and the Biden Administration's executive overreach _must end._

It is time to fight back against the power-hungry bureaucrats and virtue-signaling leftists trying to control our lives forever.

Joe Biden has relied on executive edicts and big government bullying to circumvent Congress and enforce a tyrannical agenda. **Republican Attorneys General are the last line of defense** \- and we need your help to defeat radical Democrats and take our freedom back. _[Can you pitch in $15 today to support my lawsuit and END mask mandates for good?](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=f538ab6adc&e=edf8a4d16d)_
