clean_body: | | | | Our next Congresswoman from Wyoming. | Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy Endorses This is HUGE for us, Peter! Leader McCarthy is one of President Trump’s best allies and a strong supporter of Conservative Values. He understands how STRONG our movement is! They know we deserve better and we demand better. I am proud to receive Kevin McCarthy's endorsement. He understands that Liz Cheney has cast her lot with the D.C. elites and doesn’t represent Wyoming or our principals. I hope to see your name on our list of endorsements. Thank you, Harriet Hageman \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Hageman Subject: Kevin McCarthy endorses Harriet Hageman To: Peter, Earlier today, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, released a statement endorsing Harriet Hageman for Congress. We hope you’ll join him in supporting Harriet, our nation depends on it. We need to remove Liz Cheney from office and we need YOUR help. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

Hey, Peter — our field operations are in full swing! Every weekend, our volunteers are out knocking on doors, meeting voters in the 8th District, and collecting petition signatures to get Yadira on the ballot. This work — the work of on-the-ground organizing, talking face to face with voters, and making sure they know that Dr. Caraveo will be a champion for working families like them — is where our race will be won. **But we can’t do this work without your support. | | | Hi there, Republicans’ attacks on democracy and Democrats’ failure to hold them accountable is deeply concerning. We need to protect voting rights, guarantee the right to vote, get mail-in ballots across the country, and enact ranked-choice voting. [**We need to get corporate money out of politics, which is why I refuse all corporate PAC money. Can you chip in with a quick donation here?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42117460/331725715/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmYyYWRhNS01Nzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p5I-B0Wl3iZsjwqKnSBnsYI6r0rokh_XaotBf63_Nz8=) We need to hold Trump and his thugs truly accountable. Where are the consequences for Trump and Stephen Miller putting kids in cages? Where are the consequences for January 6? Where are the consequences for the incredible corruption and bribery of Trump’s administration? I’m fed up with the corruption and greed in our politics. There is virtually no connection between what the public wants and what Congress actually does — because Congress is so bought off by corporate interests. I don’t have friends in high places. I’m not taking meetings with corporate lobbyists. Last winter, I was out on the street collecting trash from homeless camps and dumping it in front of City Hall because the city refused to do its job and pick up the trash. I want to keep challenging the powerful: in Congress. [**If you can, please chip into my campaign, because I’m not fighting for corporations and their lobbyists — I’m fighting for YOU.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42117461/331725716/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmYyYWRhNS01Nzk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p5I-B0Wl3iZsjwqKnSBnsYI6r0rokh_XaotBf63_Nz8=) name: Drew Thompson
subject: Join Jane Timken & Sen. Rob Portman!
body:
Next weekend! [](https://) **Senator Portman is back on the campaign trail!** Peter, Jane Timken is going to win the great state of Ohio. Senator Rob Portman's endorsement is a testament to her surging momentum. Join him next Friday, March 4th, as he travels our state to rally support for Jane as _**his choice**_ to carry on the America First agenda in Washington D.C. Losing our U.S. Senate seat to the Democrats is not an option, and Jane is the person best equipped to win this primary in May, and defeat Tim Ryan in November. Join Senator Portman and Jane Timken next week to find out why! _**Rally for Ohio**_ **Jane Timken & Sen. Portman** Friday, March 4th Hamilton County GOP - 11:45 a.m.
Montgomery County GOP - 1:45 p.m.

name: Team Cora via CoraForMontana.com
subject: We couldn’t resist highlighting Zinke’s hypocrisy on this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
Montana deserves a leader who practices what they preach. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42112140/331680927/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTY2M2RkMy0yZTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOa405MHJQ9zn88BtTm5GEPEHOgDj3bGXanfvb-tBFo=) Friend, By now, you’ve probably seen the news that federal watchdogs confirmed what we’ve long-known about Ryan Zinke: **That he abused his position at the Department of the Interior for personal gain.** Zinke’s response to being exposed has been a case study in deflection and poor leadership. Rather than own up, Zinke blamed “the deep state” for running a smear campaign against him. He even released an ad styling himself in the image of President Roosevelt, along with some half-baked “man in the arena” references. It was truly bizarre. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42112151/331680928/655314317?refcode=em-2.22.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTY2M2RkMy0yZTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOa405MHJQ9zn88BtTm5GEPEHOgDj3bGXanfvb-tBFo=) _Even after all this, Zinke has a... high opinion of himself. _ It’s fitting that Ryan Zinke is trying to sell himself as being a “Republican modeled after Theodore Roosevelt” despite destroying the environmental protections and national monuments established by Roosevelt himself. His perception of himself has always been divorced from reality, but he isn’t fooling anyone on where his priorities really lie.

**His legacy is defined by his ethics violations, and even The Natural Resources Defense Council (NDRC) described Ryan Zinke’s tenure at the Department of the Interior as a “a full-scale attack on Teddy Roosevelt’s legacy.”**

Montana deserves a leader who actually practices what they preach -- not someone who deflects and hopes voters like you are too naive to know the difference. [**If you’re ready to send someone to Congress who will actually uphold Teddy Roosevelt’s legacy and protect our public lands, donate $3 to Cora’s campaign today. She represents our only shot at making sure Zinke doesn’t get another chance to represent Montanans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42112153/331681076/655314317?refcode=em-2.22.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTY2M2RkMy0yZTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOa405MHJQ9zn88BtTm5GEPEHOgDj3bGXanfvb-tBFo=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42112154/331681104/655314317?refcode=em-2.22.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTY2M2RkMy0yZTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOa405MHJQ9zn88BtTm5GEPEHOgDj3bGXanfvb-tBFo=)

clean_body: Montana deserves a leader who practices what they preach. | = Friend, By now, you’ve probably seen the news that federal watchdogs confirmed what we’ve long-known about Ryan Zinke: That he abused his position at the Department of the Interior for personal gain. Zinke’s response to being exposed has been a case study in deflection and poor leadership. Rather than own up, Zinke blamed “the deep state” for running a smear campaign against him. He even released an ad styling himself in the image of President Roosevelt, along with some half-baked “man in the arena” references. It was truly bizarre. = Even after all this, Zinke has a... high opinion of himself. It’s fitting that Ryan Zinke is trying to sell himself as being a “Republican modeled after Theodore Roosevelt” despite destroying the environmental protections and national monuments established by Roosevelt himself. His perception of himself has always been divorced from reality, but he isn’t fooling anyone on where his priorities really lie. His legacy is defined by his ethics violations, and even The Natural Resources Defense Council (NDRC) described Ryan Zinke’s tenure at the Department of the Interior as a “a full-scale attack on Teddy Roosevelt’s legacy.” Montana deserves a leader who actually practices what they preach -- not someone who deflects and hopes voters like you are too naive to know the difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, friend. Team Cora Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Kevin Kiley
subject: More Districts End Masks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Make Crime Illegal Again](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopq9JmMVAjQjFCQAkMRPDW4wD0cBjPDrj5aiOSpNULsRg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb22_final&n=1) Our bill to repeal Prop. 47 has incredible momentum. It is now up to 25 co-authors, has a hearing date in two weeks, and is getting wide national coverage. See my latest interview on Fox News [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharN6geUXsnPtRHYnrhuPr0WQlgvuKLSkvk5IEed97NE8oA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb22_final&n=2). It’s a pretty radical idea: make crime illegal again in California. The vote by the Assembly Public Safety Committee is on March 8. A list of Members is [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=bth9lGgMiVMMD8FEmqCbEPO-iOT_BuqLX_H4xK5y9OguSyXG8KR_m8K37qt-UcbG&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb22_final&n=3). And [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvaGE_dL30m3umomz1M9lIjmh3otrw3BxSiSOFajFK8I2hwRiSl24c-koeDE6ZkSvg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb22_final&n=4) is a list of Senators who will vote the next week on cutting off Newsom’s emergency powers. It’s of course insane that this must wait until after the State of Emergency’s 2-year anniversary. But in the meantime, courageous local leaders are taking action. Several school districts in my area have [gone mask optional](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvXjywgur4GeOjOHd8mH7XIVDSK0MRCQXzBKAjtiS-a4doKS0cDrEIHszc71g9laew&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb22_final&n=5). Their insurers confirmed they won't lose coverage – so that excuse is gone. Newsom, for his part, openly stated at a news conference last week that teachers unions won't let him end the mask mandate. At least he no longer tries to hide who's really in charge. The student vaccine bills will also be heard soon. If the Legislature advances them, this year’s red wave could turn into a tsunami. [I need your help to keep fighting](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb22_final&n=6) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwfuw_7_x8TcH1v1qg2HUFlk6SYn-m6HGZAQTJbs_CSVw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb22_final&n=7) Kevin Kiley
CA Legislator & Candidate for Congress
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

name: Karen Bass
subject: First primary debate is officially in the books!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Team —

I just stepped off the stage at Loyola Marymount University's primary debate, and I'm fired up.

Tonight, I shared our plans for addressing the humanitarian crisis of homelessness and laid out our collective vision for Los Angeles. Our city has limitless potential, and by using state, local, and federal resources, we will create a pathway for progress for every single Angeleno.

Our campaign is history in the making. And I was only able to share our plans for L.A. on that stage tonight because of you, team. So **thank you**.

We've gotten to this point because of your support. And your dedication to our movement for social and economic justice has helped us secure a lead in the polls. But we can't take our foot off the gas. We have less than four months to reach folks in every corner of this city before the primary to share our vision for L.A. **In just a few days, we face a crucial fundraising deadline, and we can't afford to come up short.**

February is the shortest month of the year, so I'm counting on additional grassroots donations to help us reach our ambitious $50,000 end-of-month goal. **[If you're ready to make our vision for this city a reality, please chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to support my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42117485/331725851/1203702855?ms=em22_220222_eom1_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220222_eom1_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220222_eom1_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220222_eom1_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hkN7W4zroUSy2RPY9u9n726y9SmIBvu%2FzeACAEIpcRDc7EDubTgfv6qaw6CN6vXgq%2Br%2Fde3xh2cE1R3JwSQWEpuajc7fr%2Bd2ZiPi7DZ8KTZNz3iP%2FGXKb%2BvQFr5UPB3ZH%2Fbp6PbGTkBUn0%2BqhFWc0w%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2U1OTZiNi01OTk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ffeZvL-LQ5-osk8U_8RVWx-5IOTMnpeqlYPAcMhXLs=&emci=afc98b25-1c94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=23e596b6-5994-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2429742)**

We are ONE WEEK away from the Texas Democratic Primary — **meaning we have one week to continue to show Texan voters that Joe is the right candidate to defeat Ken Paxton this November. **

[**Will you contribute to Joe's campaign now so that we can finish this Primary strong?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=cbea6c0d55&e=5d8d80652b)

We've been saying this for a while, but the message grows more urgent by the day. We must elect the Democrat with the best chance to win in November and restore ethics and integrity to the office of Texas Attorney General.

That's why the [**Houston Chronicle**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=34b83d0953&e=5d8d80652b), the [**Dallas Morning News**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=f655aab81b&e=5d8d80652b), and [**so many of our elected leaders in Texas**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=f471d6c8bc&e=5d8d80652b) have endorsed Joe: they know he has what it takes to win and they trust him to do what's right for Texas.

[**So as we enter this final push before Primary Day on March 1, will you chip in once again to help us win this election?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=1420c2b65c&e=5d8d80652b)

Every dollar counts and gets us that much closer to a statewide-elected Democrat in 2022. If you've waited until the stakes are higher to give, this is it. We need your help today.

[**Donate today and help Joe win.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=1b602394a2&e=5d8d80652b)

name: Alvin Williams
subject: Herschel Walker has got Democrats shaking in their boots!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=1)
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=2)
---
Peter,
Football legend and black conservative Herschel Walker has got the Democrats shaking in their boots!
It’s only a matter of time before he crosses the end zone on Election Day and robs the Democrats of their one-seat majority in the Senate!
And no one’s more scared than his opponent, Raphael Warnock...
Warnock won his seat by the skin of his teeth against an unpopular Republican in 2020. _So just think about the shellacking he’s going to get from one of Georgia’s most famous athletes!_
Herschel isn’t afraid of anybody. Especially Raphael Warnock:
_“They want to talk about Senator Warnock and whatever he did to get into office. But now, he’s going to have to face me... and it’s not going to be as easy as he thought it was going to be.”_
Herschel’s confidence, name recognition, and conservative bonafides will help propel him to victory. In fact, polls already show him pulling ahead of Warnock:
[](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=3)
---
**But he needs you, Peter, in his corner to get him over the finish line.**
I know you want to see Herschel flip control of the Senate from the Democrats to the Republicans.
Herschel’s candidacy couldn’t have come at a better time.
In just one year, Joe Biden and the Democrats have managed to tear our country apart in more ways than anyone thought possible.
[](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=4)
---
If you want to know how Joe and the Dems are doing, here you go:
* They’ve turned our cops into bad guys, **defunding police departments** , which has led to thousands of officers resigning or taking early retirement while crime rises to all-time highs.
* They’ve embarrassed us on the world stage with their **botched withdrawal from Afghanistan** that has our adversaries laughing at us.
* They’ve **driven inflation through the roof** , making it harder for you to buy groceries or fill up your car.
* And they’re forcing **Critical Race Theory** down our children’s throats, teaching them that America is an inherently evil, racist country and that we should be ashamed of it.

Well I for one am NOT ashamed of America!
And neither is Herschel!
[](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=5)
---
The Democrats know they’re becoming more unpopular with voters, which is why they’re doubling down on the big fat lie that all Republicans are racist.
You and I both know that’s not true, but black voters only hear the liberal side of the story that says only government can create prosperity.
_They NEVER hear the truth about conservatism._
And the Democrats have worked very hard to keep them from hearing it. **It’s the _only_ way they know to keep blacks voting for Democrats.**
Its why, for instance, they call men like **Sheriff David Clarke** a _"traitor to his race."_
It’s why they're hell-bent on defeating **Sen. Tim Scott** \- a GOP rising star who’s known for championing personal responsibility.
And that's why they attack **Dr. Ben Carson** with articles titled _"F*ck Ben Carson"_ and call him hateful names like _"Uncle Tom."_
# And now their _NEW TARGET_ is _Herschel Walker_.
The Democrats know that we only have to convince 12% of black voters that Republicans are NOT racists to prevent them from winning another election.
This is why they’re busy pumping millions of dollars into this campaign.
Big Tech billionaires and Hollywood elites are going to bankroll Raphael Warnock’s campaign like they have for Democrats all around the country.
And while they fund his campaign of lies, the lamestream media lapdogs at “CNNLOL” and “MSDNC” will suppress any stories that paint him in a bad light while scrutinizing every moment of Herschel’s life to try and make him look bad.
But after several years of lying about the Russian collusion hoax or gushing over actor Jussie Smollett’s fake attack on himself by _“Trump supporters...”_
_Just as Herschel ran over his opponents on the football field, he’s going to plow through the Democrats in 2022!_
[](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=6)
---
##### _“People on the opposing team didn’t like it when I ran over them. But that’s how you get the job done.”_
-Herschel Walker
Herschel is the right man to be running for the Senate from Georgia. Just read what Herschel has said about some of the issues facing our country:
**Pro-God:**
First off, I want to say that Jesus Christ is my Lord and Savior... if I don’t acknowledge Him, He won’t acknowledge me.
**Democrat Race-Baiting**
Democrats label anything they disagree with as racist. Georgia’s voting law does NOT prevent black people from voting like Senator Warnock says it does. This is not about voter suppression, it is about President Biden and the federal government wanting more power.
**Democrat Failures for Black America:**
You all have been in office for years and have done nothing for African Americans. Every four years you do this for a vote. And the violence and death in our communities, yet you say nothing?
**Supporting Our Police:**
_We need BOLD leaders in Washington who stand up and support our members of law enforcement. This isn’t a matter of Republican vs. Democrat, or white vs. black. This is a matter of doing what’s RIGHT for this country._
**Supporting Small Business:**
_I’d rather go down standing up trying to save my company, than be on my knees begging the government for a handout._
**When black Americans see Herschel Walker in the U.S. Senate, they’ll leave the Democrat plantation and deprive the left of the support they need to stay in power and cripple the Democrat Party for generations.**
That’s why I expect them to fight dirtier than ever. There’s no lie they won’t tell, no trick they won’t pull to enslave the minds of black Americans and keep their hands on the levers of power.
**[This is why I need to know if Black America’s PAC Action Fund can count on your support to help cultivate the next generation of black conservative leaders like Herschel Walker.](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=7)**
We were early supporters of **Tim Scott** and helped him become the first black Senator elected to the U.S. Senate in the South since Reconstruction.
Our support helped **Mia Love** become the first black female Republican ever elected to U.S. Congress, then helped **Burgess Owens** retake Mia’s House seat from Democrats after they poured millions into defeating her.
[](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=8)
---
In fact, if you see a black conservative serving in office or speaking out against the Liberal LIES on the state or national level – you can trust that we’re there providing them the invaluable support they need every step of the way.
**_And right now, we’re on the front lines fighting to save our conservative values by exposing the Liberal Lies, reclaiming black voters from the Democrat Party, and helping them learn about solid conservatives like Herschel Walker._**
**[So can I count on you to join the fight with an URGENT donation of 20.22 today? Or perhaps you understand the importance of taking the fight to the Democrats and want to contribute more?](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=9)**
**[A generous gift of $40, $75, $150, $500, $1,000 or more can help broadcast our message to expose the Liberal LIES, speak the truth, and spread conservativism to the black Community, where it’s needed most.](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=10)**
I can tell you from personal experience - once the message of conservatism reaches black voters, it spreads like wildfire and obliterates the liberal lies that keep them voting for Democrats.
**Remember, even a small increase in black voting Republican could _CRIPPLE_ the Democrat Party for many years to come...**
**[So please, Peter, say you’ll join me in fighting back against the liberal lies and reclaim black voters with your generous donation of $40, $75, $150, $500, $1,000 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=11)**
**[Even if all you can send is $5 it will make a BIG difference.](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=12)**
Together, you and I can _destroy_ the Liberal LIES, _reclaim_ black voters, and _cripple_ the Democrat Party, but only with your immediate action today.
| [](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=13)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=14)

Herschel’s victory will put control of the Senate back into Republican hands! **[Help Black America’s PAC Action Fund defeat the liberal lies and propel Herschel to victory and with your generous gift of $20.22, $40, $75, $150, $500, $1,000 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=15)** | [](https://www.bampac.org/herschelwalkerbaf?info=2022EA0102&recruiter_id=62256&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0102&n=16)

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, Football legend and black conservative Herschel Walker has got the Democrats shaking in their boots! It’s only a matter of time before he crosses the end zone on Election Day and robs the Democrats of their one-seat majority in the Senate! And no one’s more scared than his opponent, Raphael Warnock... Warnock won his seat by the skin of his teeth against an unpopular Republican in 2020. So just think about the shellacking he’s going to get from one of Georgia’s most famous athletes! Herschel isn’t afraid of anybody. Especially Raphael Warnock: “They want to talk about Senator Warnock and whatever he did to get into office. But now, he’s going to have to face me... and it’s not going to be as easy as he thought it was going to be.” Herschel’s confidence, name recognition, and conservative bonafides will help propel him to victory. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The establishment is attacking Greg Casar
body:
Greg Casar’s establishment opponent is attacking him using GOP talking points.
#
Peter,
Greg Casar is running for Congress in Texas’ 35th district to deliver a bold agenda for working people — from reproductive rights to Medicare for All. And the movement is 100% behind him. Greg has the support of AOC, Bernie, and other progressive leaders because they know he’ll work on behalf of the people in Congress.
Greg is ready to fight for a better Texas, but right now, his establishment opponent is attacking him for his progressive leadership on reallocating police funding towards public goods like mental health services and supporting the unhoused.
[With just days left until election day, we need to make sure that Greg’s campaign has the resources to fight back against these Republican-style attacks. Will you chip in $3 directly to Greg’s campaign to fuel the voter outreach he’ll need to win this race?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95828?refcode=em20220222-22103&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=22103%2E1203867%2Eks3gDY)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95828?refcode=em20220222-22103&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=22103%2E1203867%2Eks3gDY)**
As a member of the Austin City Council, Greg fought tirelessly, leading on issues of labor rights, reproductive justice, civil rights, and more. He successfully raised wages for thousands of workers, ended all personal marijuana arrests in his city, and closed inexcusable tax loopholes for the wealthiest.
We’re not surprised that a Democrat is using GOP talking points to attack a progressive like Greg Casar. When elections get tough, progressives like Greg become targets for smear campaigns. But we won’t let them win. We know Greg is the best candidate in this race to take on serious issues like housing and public safety.
[That is why we’re asking if you’ll make a direct contribution to Greg Casar’s campaign.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95828?refcode=em20220222-22103&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22103%2E1203867%2Eks3gDY) Justice Democrats like Greg don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money, which means your direct contribution can make a huge difference in these final days.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=22103%2E1203867%2Eks3gDY) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=22103%2E1203867%2Eks3gDY) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220222-22103-footer&t=24&refcode2=22103_1203867_ks3gDY&akid=22103%2E1203867%2Eks3gDY)**
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

_**A case update on the Durham Report prepared for Peter**_
**From the desk of Jim Jordan**
After a 2-year smear campaign that cost the American taxpayers millions, no evidence was found of President Trump conspiring with Russia. But the woke Left ignored the facts and kept pushing lie after lie, resulting in yet another (failed) effort to remove President Trump from office by impeachment.

Just a few days ago, new BOMBSHELL court documents revealed what we suspected all along...that it was indeed Clinton cronies behind the Trump/Russia hoax the entire time!

Special counsel John Durham’s report on the Trump/Russia hoax revealed that Clinton’s campaign worked to spy on President Donald Trump and attempted to generate the false narrative that ultimately served as the basis for the bogus impeachment attempt.

**[Should Hillary be held accountable for this crime?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ac08a5cfaa424693a2daf0cdbd3c31f5&_e=5oHvjRs4OzYS-mB6TFFcQxsRIWE-EZnqAFSTA-xUJg3D1gDre8yotItuyf1_K4CQz0HYybQcYBrW4xe6Jo-r6K3NmZl7eopo-FmJ3iRBQcjzj1s5BhyILOW1gfHuhXvMOAxGrCZrvRTO48vIqDrN99PIJAAgipCS5UzjSolaPpU2KCItJRF3wkj4B6yQ1AbXv-jLoIUyq7I-Ij4tCSy9JQ2nWqn445rMe52AtEsQFhMZxfWCdavEwq9OoMYpIuWN0k5WpeanCdLFItUxYk70HWnfgx1IORyLxycX3av0UhmGKLegS9HXnCE9R9hmbFCEY8okNaaJHGnDnMH-Bkxp4cmQwYpF7AuHim6j4XqS8GvtV5lMkboRZnk_Ftmzti7N6VZZAYBwIMF9Cg_tA5UncpWa0Hws6ggreJsJg5FD7XRqO9hUrrTbBlumIW1umxXuvhQN31sSRnAgoMawO_61KU7vMDhasPpOpalYlqaBQ6fxdWPX2ZPQunMxJNDneL7Y8daSJ0uab7urcR1Wsih8obwhvrCTXFeJSLqVLBv-RoI%3D)**

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ac08a5cfaa424693a2daf0cdbd3c31f5&_e=5oHvjRs4OzYS-mB6TFFcQxsRIWE-EZnqAFSTA-xUJg3D1gDre8yotItuyf1_K4CQz0HYybQcYBrW4xe6Jo-r6K3NmZl7eopo-FmJ3iRBQcjzj1s5BhyILOW1gfHuhXvMOAxGrCZrvRTO48vIqDrN99PIJAAgipCS5UzjSolaPpU2KCItJRF3wkj4B6yQ1AbXv-jLoIUyq7I-Ij4tCSy9JQ2nWqn445rMe52AtEsQFhMZxfWCdavEwq9OoMYpIuWN0k5WpeanCdLFItUxYk70HWnfgx1IORyLxycX3av0UhmGKLegS9HXnCE9R9hmbFCEY8okNaaJHGnDnMH-Bkxp4UdTxIGFGlstkxws8ZJLQItjAf2d5uESlX0QvoSrgXCNA6fMORfhesNrDjuJcaAs1DbIpJrV-8N_qP_EeLe9I-4AC8d19eKOy9bs03QX2_tl303EawpfT0L6t0yslP0700fx8D4Ij19mUhyfBsOfWyWhCAdMJXZfTZVXsH7aG1whVtvD7bTIiZiCBSTcXLM5rI3ankhcxt1O7C02YY98EvY%3D)
Clearly, this was an illegal effort to unseat a sitting President! I know the Left isn’t held accountable to the same standards as the rest of us Americans, but can you imagine the media outrage if it was a Republican campaign caught spying on a Democrat president?

clean_body: Prepared personally for Peter by Jim Jordan From the desk of Jim Jordan | A case update on the Durham Report prepared for Peter From the desk of Jim Jordan After a 2-year smear campaign that cost the American taxpayers millions, no evidence was found of President Trump conspiring with Russia. But the woke Left ignored the facts and kept pushing lie after lie, resulting in yet another (failed) effort to remove President Trump from office by impeachment. Just a few days ago, new BOMBSHELL court documents revealed what we suspected all along...that it was indeed Clinton cronies behind the Trump/Russia hoax the entire time! Special counsel John Durham’s report on the Trump/Russia hoax revealed that Clinton’s campaign worked to spy on President Donald Trump and attempted to generate the false narrative that ultimately served as the basis for the bogus impeachment attempt. Clearly, this was an illegal effort to unseat a sitting President! I know the Left isn’t held accountable to the same standards as the rest of us Americans, but can you imagine the media outrage if it was a Republican campaign caught spying on a Democrat president? Clinton’s operatives have been caught red handed, including her campaign’s attorney, who has been criminally charged with lying to the FBI. So much for Clinton being the “guardian of democracy” like the Left claims! I’m sure you remember Hillary saying, “it’s awfully good that someone with the temperament of Donald Trump isn’t in charge of the law in our country” to which President Trump responded, “Because you’d be in jail!” Well Peter, I think it’s about time that Spying Crooked Hillary face the consequences of her actions in the form of jail time. | | | **_
_****_Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.

---

Peter, seven weeks into this election year, I wanted to reach out to you and explain why it’s so important that we meet our February end-of-month goal.
**We’re now just over ___four_ months away from the New York primary.** And that means that every fundraising deadline between now and then is _absolutely critical_ for my re-election campaign. We no longer have the luxury of time.
That’s why my team set the ambitious goal to raise $20,000 by tonight at midnight, but we’re still $3,384 short. With my campaign depending on this deadline, I must ask: **[Will you rush a donation of $50, $15, or even $5 before midnight to power our fight for justice and equality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114457/331689821/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk340-fr-warmup13-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJlNjUwOS0zODk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2-IwhDYzQy3VZOAKdfs4rM02S8WRJwwk58pYDrF67w=)**

As the attorney general of New York, I’ve brought fights to some of the most powerful people and organizations in the country to ensure that the rights of every New Yorker are protected.
I’m running for re-election because I’m not finished fighting for New York yet – but I can’t win these fights alone. **That’s why, with time running out before New Yorkers begin to cast their ballots, I’m relying on fearless fighters like you to give this campaign the boost it needs.**
[**Peter, I can’t afford to fall short of _any_ goal now that we're in the election year. Can I count on you to make a difference for New York and rush a donation of whatever you can spare?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42114462/331689826/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk340-fr-warmup13-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJlNjUwOS0zODk0LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2-IwhDYzQy3VZOAKdfs4rM02S8WRJwwk58pYDrF67w=)
Thank you so much for being in this fight with me.

clean_body: | | | = Peter, seven weeks into this election year, I wanted to reach out to you and explain why it’s so important that we meet our February end-of-month goal. We’re now just over _four months away from the New York primary. And that means that every fundraising deadline between now and then is absolutely critical for my re-election campaign. We no longer have the luxury of time. That’s why my team set the ambitious goal to raise $20,000 by tonight at midnight, but we’re still $3,384 short. With my campaign depending on this deadline, I must ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = As the attorney general of New York, I’ve brought fights to some of the most powerful people and organizations in the country to ensure that the rights of every New Yorker are protected. I’m running for re-election because I’m not finished fighting for New York yet – but I can’t win these fights alone. That’s why, with time running out before New Yorkers begin to cast their ballots, I’m relying on fearless fighters like you to give this campaign the boost it needs. = Thank you so much for being in this fight with me. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

name: Team AOC
subject: This Girl Scout troop is specifically designed to serve girls experiencing homelessness.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You can help support Troop 6000, the first Girl Scout troop founded by and for girls experiencing homelessness.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220222-2811-header&t=1&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm)
Five years ago, Alexandria’s district came together to establish **Troop 6000, the first Girl Scout troop founded by and for girls experiencing homelessness.**
Troop 6000 is a Girl Scout program specially designed to serve girls in the New York City Shelter System. Each week, Troop 6000 meets in shelters across the city. Troop meetings are facilitated by trained troop leaders – women also living in the shelter system paired with community-based volunteers – and give girls the opportunity to make new friends, earn badges, and see themselves as leaders in their communities.
[It’s Girl Scout cookies season! That means you have the opportunity to support this program for girls empowerment by buying delicious Girl Scout cookies — from Samoas and Tagalongs, to Thin Mints or your favorite flavor!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10407?t=2&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm)
**[Support Troop 6000 — Order your cookies here »](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10407?t=3&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm)**
Proceeds from every box sold help the hundreds of Girl Scouts in Troop 6000 go to Girl Scout camp, earn badges, and do so many other fun Girl Scout activities.
The New York City Shelter System is meant to provide temporary, emergency housing for families. The average stay for a family in a city shelter can be up to 18 months.
Every girl deserves a chance to reach her full potential: to have her eyes opened to possibilities for college and careers, to make loving and supportive friends, to learn from caring female mentors, and to chart her own course to achieve her goals. That’s what Troop 6000 is all about.
[Help support Troop 6000’s mission by purchasing Girl Scout cookies today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10407?t=4&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220222-2811-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=5&refcode2=2811_2526796__OmDMm&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220222-2811-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=6&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2811%2E2526796%2E_OmDMm)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: You can help support Troop 6000, the first Girl Scout troop founded by and for girls experiencing homelessness. Five years ago, Alexandria’s district came together to establish Troop 6000, the first Girl Scout troop founded by and for girls experiencing homelessness. Troop 6000 is a Girl Scout program specially designed to serve girls in the New York City Shelter System. Each week, Troop 6000 meets in shelters across the city. Troop meetings are facilitated by trained troop leaders – women also living in the shelter system paired with community-based volunteers – and give girls the opportunity to make new friends, earn badges, and see themselves as leaders in their communities. Proceeds from every box sold help the hundreds of Girl Scouts in Troop 6000 go to Girl Scout camp, earn badges, and do so many other fun Girl Scout activities. The New York City Shelter System is meant to provide temporary, emergency housing for families. The average stay for a family in a city shelter can be up to 18 months. Every girl deserves a chance to reach her full potential: to have her eyes opened to possibilities for college and careers, to make loving and supportive friends, to learn from caring female mentors, and to chart her own course to achieve her goals. That’s what Troop 6000 is all about. Thank you, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com
